value="2026-06-30"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="principalSignature">Principal Signature Text</label> <input type="text" id="principalSignature" placeholder="Enter principal signature text" value="Dr. Robert Wilson"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="footerText">Footer Text</label> <input type="text" id="footerText" placeholder="Enter footer text" value="This ID card is the property of University of Technology"> </div> <h2 class="section-title">Upload Images</h2> <div class="form-group"> <label>Upload Student Photo</label> <div class="upload-area" id="studentPhotoUpload"> <i class="fas fa-user-circle"></i> <p>Click to upload student photo</p> <input type="file" id="studentPhoto" accept="image/*" style="display: none;"> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Upload University Logo</label> <div class="upload-area" id="logoUpload"> <i class="fas fa-university"></i> <p>Click to upload university logo</p> <input type="file" id="universityLogo" accept="image/*" style="display: none;"> </div> </div> <h2 class="section-title">Design Customization</h2> <div class="form-group"> <label>Primary Color Palette</label> <div class="color-palette"> <div class="palette-color active" style="background-color: #1a73e8;" data-color="#1a73e8"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #d23f31;" data-color="#d23f31"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #f9ab00;" data-color="#f9ab00"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #34a853;" data-color="#34a853"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #673ab7;" data-color="#673ab7"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #e91e63;" data-color="#e91e63"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #00bcd4;" data-color="#00bcd4"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #ff5722;" data-color="#ff5722"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #795548;" data-color="#795548"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #607d8b;" data-color="#607d8b"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #9c27b0;" data-color="#9c27b0"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #009688;" data-color="#009688"></div> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Card Background Color</label> <div class="color-palette"> <div class="palette-color active" style="background-color: #ffffff;" data-bgcolor="#ffffff"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #f5f5f5;" data-bgcolor="#f5f5f5"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #e8f4fd;" data-bgcolor="#e8f4fd"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #fff8e1;" data-bgcolor="#fff8e1"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #f3e5f5;" data-bgcolor="#f3e5f5"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #e8f5e9;" data-bgcolor="#e8f5e9"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #ffebee;" data-bgcolor="#ffebee"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #fce4ec;" data-bgcolor="#fce4ec"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #f3e5f5;" data-bgcolor="#f3e5f5"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #e8eaf6;" data-bgcolor="#e8eaf6"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #e3f2fd;" data-bgcolor="#e3f2fd"></div> <div class="palette-color" style="background-color: #e0f2f1;" data-bgcolor="#e0f2f1"></div> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="fontFamily">Font Family</label> <select id="fontFamily"> <option value="Poppins">Poppins</option> <option value="Roboto">Roboto</option> <option value="Montserrat">Montserrat</option> <option value="Open Sans">Open Sans</option> <option value="Lato">Lato</option> <option value="Arial">Arial</option> <option value="Georgia">Georgia</option> </select> </div> <h3 class="section-title">Photo Customization</h3> <div class="form-group"> <label for="photoSize">Photo Size</label> <input type="range" id="photoSize" min="80" max="180" value="130"> <span id="photoSizeValue">130px</span> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="photoBorderColor">Photo Border Color</label> <input type="color" id="photoBorderColor" value="#1a73e8"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="photoBorderWidth">Photo Border Width</label> <input type="range" id="photoBorderWidth" min="1" max="10" value="4"> <span id="photoBorderWidthValue">4px</span> </div> <h3 class="section-title">Institute Name Customization</h3> <div class="style-controls"> <div class="form-group"> <label for="instituteFontSize">Institute Font Size</label> <input type="range" id="instituteFontSize" min="10" max="24" value="18"> <span id="instituteFontSizeValue">18px</span> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="instituteColor">Institute Text Color</label> <input type="color" id="instituteColor" value="#ffffff"> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <div class="checkbox-group"> <input type="checkbox" id="boldInstitute" checked> <label for="boldInstitute">Bold Institute Name</label> </div> </div> <h3 class="section-title">Student Name Customization</h3> <div class="style-controls"> <div class="form-group"> <label for="nameFontSize">Name Font Size</label> <input type="range" id="nameFontSize" min="16" max="32" value="26"> <span id="nameFontSizeValue">26px</span> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="textFontSize">Text Font Size</label> <input type="range" id="textFontSize" min="10" max="20" value="14"> <span id="textFontSizeValue">14px</span> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <div class="checkbox-group"> <input type="checkbox" id="boldName" checked> <label for="boldName">Bold Student Name</label> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <div class="checkbox-group"> <input type="checkbox" id="boldLabels" checked> <label for="boldLabels">Bold Field Labels</label> </div> </div> <h3 class="section-title">Footer Text Customization</h3> <div class="style-controls"> <div class="form-group"> <label for="footerFontSize">Footer Font Size</label> <input type="range" id="footerFontSize" min="8" max="16" value="10"> <span id="footerFontSizeValue">10px</span> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="footerColor">Footer Text Color</label> <input type="color" id="footerColor" value="#666666"> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <div class="checkbox-group"> <input type="checkbox" id="italicFooter"> <label for="italicFooter">Italic Footer Text</label> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <div class="checkbox-group"> <input type="checkbox" id="boldFooter"> <label for="boldFooter">Bold Footer Text</label> </div> </div> <div class="button-group"> <button class="generate-btn" id="generateBtn"> <i class="fas fa-sync-alt"></i> Generate Card </button> <button class="download-btn" id="downloadBtn"> <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download Card </button> </div> <div class="download-options" id="downloadOptions"> <div class="format-btn active" data-format="png">PNG</div> <div class="format-btn" data-format="jpg">JPG</div> <div class="format-btn" data-format="pdf">PDF</div> </div> </div> <div class="preview"> <div class="id-card" id="idCard"> <div class="card-header"> <div class="university-logo" id="logoPreview"> <i class="fas fa-university" style="font-size: 1.8rem; color: #1a73e8;"></i> </div> <div class="university-name" id="universityPreview">University of Technology</div> </div> <div class="card-body"> <div class="student-photo" id="photoPreview"> <i class="fas fa-user" style="font-size: 4rem; color: #ccc;"></i> </div> <div class="student-name" id="namePreview">John Alexander</div> <div class="student-id" id="idPreview">STU-2023-001</div> <div class="card-details"> <div class="detail-row"> <span class="detail-label">Roll No:</span> <span id="rollPreview">CS-2023-045</span> </div> <div class="detail-row"> <span class="detail-label">Subject:</span> <span id="subjectPreview">Computer Science</span> </div> <div class="detail-row"> <span class="detail-label">Session:</span> <span id="sessionPreview">2023-2024</span> </div> <div class="detail-row"> <span class="detail-label">Issue Date:</span> <span id="issueDatePreview">01 Sep 2023</span> </div> <div class="detail-row"> <span class="detail-label">Expire Date:</span> <span id="expireDatePreview">30 Jun 2026</span> </div> </div> </div> <div class="card-footer"> <div class="footer-text" id="footerTextPreview">This ID card is the property of University of Technology</div> <div class="signature-area"> <div class="signature"> <div class="principal-label">Principal</div> <div id="principalSignaturePreview">Dr. Robert Wilson</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <script> document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { // DOM Elements const studentNameInput = document.getElementById('studentName'); const studentIdInput = document.getElementById('studentId'); const rollInput = document.getElementById('roll'); const subjectInput = document.getElementById('subject'); const sessionInput = document.getElementById('session'); const universityInput = document.getElementById('university'); const issueDateInput = document.getElementById('issueDate'); const expireDateInput = document.getElementById('expireDate'); const principalSignatureInput = document.getElementById('principalSignature'); const footerTextInput = document.getElementById('footerText'); const fontFamilySelect = document.getElementById('fontFamily'); const nameFontSizeInput = document.getElementById('nameFontSize'); const nameFontSizeValue = document.getElementById('nameFontSizeValue'); const textFontSizeInput = document.getElementById('textFontSize'); const textFontSizeValue = document.getElementById('textFontSizeValue'); const instituteFontSizeInput = document.getElementById('instituteFontSize'); const instituteFontSizeValue = document.getElementById('instituteFontSizeValue'); const instituteColorInput = document.getElementById('instituteColor'); const photoSizeInput = document.getElementById('photoSize'); const photoSizeValue = document.getElementById('photoSizeValue'); const photoBorderColorInput = document.getElementById('photoBorderColor'); const photoBorderWidthInput = document.getElementById('photoBorderWidth'); const photoBorderWidthValue = document.getElementById('photoBorderWidthValue'); const footerFontSizeInput = document.getElementById('footerFontSize'); const footerFontSizeValue = document.getElementById('footerFontSizeValue'); const footerColorInput = document.getElementById('footerColor'); const italicFooterCheckbox = document.getElementById('italicFooter'); const boldFooterCheckbox = document.getElementById('boldFooter'); const boldNameCheckbox = document.getElementById('boldName'); const boldLabelsCheckbox = document.getElementById('boldLabels'); const boldInstituteCheckbox = document.getElementById('boldInstitute'); const colorOptions = document.querySelectorAll('.palette-color[data-color]'); const bgColorOptions = document.querySelectorAll('.palette-color[data-bgcolor]'); const studentPhotoInput = document.getElementById('studentPhoto'); const studentPhotoUpload = document.getElementById('studentPhotoUpload'); const universityLogoInput = document.getElementById('universityLogo'); const logoUpload = document.getElementById('logoUpload'); const generateBtn = document.getElementById('generateBtn'); const downloadBtn = document.getElementById('downloadBtn'); const downloadOptions = document.getElementById('downloadOptions'); const formatButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.format-btn'); // Preview Elements const namePreview = document.getElementById('namePreview'); const idPreview = document.getElementById('idPreview'); const rollPreview = document.getElementById('rollPreview'); const subjectPreview = document.getElementById('subjectPreview'); const sessionPreview = document.getElementById('sessionPreview'); const universityPreview = document.getElementById('universityPreview'); const issueDatePreview = document.getElementById('issueDatePreview'); const expireDatePreview = document.getElementById('expireDatePreview'); const principalSignaturePreview = document.getElementById('principalSignaturePreview'); const footerTextPreview = document.getElementById('footerTextPreview'); const photoPreview = document.getElementById('photoPreview'); const logoPreview = document.getElementById('logoPreview'); const idCard = document.getElementById('idCard'); const detailLabels = document.querySelectorAll('.detail-label'); // Current settings let currentColor = '#1a73e8'; let currentBgColor = '#ffffff'; let currentFormat = 'png'; // Event Listeners studentNameInput.addEventListener('input', updatePreview); studentIdInput.addEventListener('input', updatePreview); rollInput.addEventListener('input', updatePreview); subjectInput.addEventListener('input', updatePreview); sessionInput.addEventListener('input', updatePreview); universityInput.addEventListener('input', updatePreview); issueDateInput.addEventListener('input', updatePreview); expireDateInput.addEventListener('input', updatePreview); principalSignatureInput.addEventListener('input', updatePreview); footerTextInput.addEventListener('input', updatePreview); fontFamilySelect.addEventListener('change', updateFont); nameFontSizeInput.addEventListener('input', updateFontSizes); textFontSizeInput.addEventListener('input', updateFontSizes); instituteFontSizeInput.addEventListener('input', updateInstituteStyles); instituteColorInput.addEventListener('input', updateInstituteStyles); photoSizeInput.addEventListener('input', updatePhotoStyles); photoBorderColorInput.addEventListener('input', updatePhotoStyles); photoBorderWidthInput.addEventListener('input', updatePhotoStyles); footerFontSizeInput.addEventListener('input', updateFooterStyles); footerColorInput.addEventListener('input', updateFooterStyles); italicFooterCheckbox.addEventListener('change', updateFooterStyles); boldFooterCheckbox.addEventListener('change', updateFooterStyles); boldNameCheckbox.addEventListener('change', updateFontStyles); boldLabelsCheckbox.addEventListener('change', updateFontStyles); boldInstituteCheckbox.addEventListener('change', updateInstituteStyles); // Color selection colorOptions.forEach(option => { option.addEventListener('click', function() { colorOptions.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('active')); this.classList.add('active'); currentColor = this.getAttribute('data-color'); updateColor(); }); }); // Background color selection bgColorOptions.forEach(option => { option.addEventListener('click', function() { bgColorOptions.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('active')); this.classList.add('active'); currentBgColor = this.getAttribute('data-bgcolor'); updateBgColor(); }); }); // Photo upload studentPhotoUpload.addEventListener('click', function() { studentPhotoInput.click(); }); studentPhotoInput.addEventListener('change', function(e) { if (e.target.files && e.target.files[0]) { const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(event) { photoPreview.innerHTML = '<img src="' + event.target.result + '" alt="Student Photo">'; }; reader.readAsDataURL(e.target.files[0]); } }); // Logo upload logoUpload.addEventListener('click', function() { universityLogoInput.click(); }); universityLogoInput.addEventListener('change', function(e) { if (e.target.files && e.target.files[0]) { const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(event) { logoPreview.innerHTML = '<img src="' + event.target.result + '" alt="University Logo">'; }; reader.readAsDataURL(e.target.files[0]); } }); // Download format selection formatButtons.forEach(button => { button.addEventListener('click', function() { formatButtons.forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active')); this.classList.add('active'); currentFormat = this.getAttribute('data-format'); }); }); // Generate button generateBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { updatePreview(); alert('ID Card has been updated with your customizations!'); }); // Download button downloadBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { downloadCard(); }); // Functions function updatePreview() { namePreview.textContent = studentNameInput.value || 'Student Name'; idPreview.textContent = studentIdInput.value || 'STU-XXXX-XXX'; rollPreview.textContent = rollInput.value || 'Roll No'; subjectPreview.textContent = subjectInput.value || 'Subject'; sessionPreview.textContent = sessionInput.value || 'Session'; universityPreview.textContent = universityInput.value || 'University Name'; principalSignaturePreview.textContent = principalSignatureInput.value || 'Principal Signature'; footerTextPreview.textContent = footerTextInput.value || 'Footer Text'; // Format dates if (issueDateInput.value) { const issueDate = new Date(issueDateInput.value); issueDatePreview.textContent = formatDate(issueDate); } else { issueDatePreview.textContent = 'Issue Date'; } if (expireDateInput.value) { const expireDate = new Date(expireDateInput.value); expireDatePreview.textContent = formatDate(expireDate); } else { expireDatePreview.textContent = 'Expire Date'; } } function formatDate(date) { const months = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Aug', 'Sep', 'Oct', 'Nov', 'Dec']; return date.getDate() + ' ' + months[date.getMonth()] + ' ' + date.getFullYear(); } function updateFont() { const selectedFont = fontFamilySelect.value; idCard.style.fontFamily = selectedFont; } function updateFontSizes() { const nameSize = nameFontSizeInput.value; const textSize = textFontSizeInput.value; namePreview.style.fontSize = nameSize + 'px'; nameFontSizeValue.textContent = nameSize + 'px'; const textElements = [idPreview, rollPreview, subjectPreview, sessionPreview, issueDatePreview, expireDatePreview, principalSignaturePreview, ...detailLabels]; textElements.forEach(el => { el.style.fontSize = textSize + 'px'; }); textFontSizeValue.textContent = textSize + 'px'; } function updateInstituteStyles() { const instituteSize = instituteFontSizeInput.value; const instituteColor = instituteColorInput.value; universityPreview.style.fontSize = instituteSize + 'px'; universityPreview.style.color = instituteColor; instituteFontSizeValue.textContent = instituteSize + 'px'; if (boldInstituteCheckbox.checked) { universityPreview.style.fontWeight = 'bold'; } else { universityPreview.style.fontWeight = 'normal'; } } function updatePhotoStyles() { const photoSize = photoSizeInput.value; const borderColor = photoBorderColorInput.value; const borderWidth = photoBorderWidthInput.value; // Update CSS variable document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--photo-size', photoSize + 'px'); // Update photo preview photoPreview.style.width = photoSize + 'px'; photoPreview.style.height = photoSize + 'px'; photoPreview.style.borderColor = borderColor; photoPreview.style.borderWidth = borderWidth + 'px'; // Update display values photoSizeValue.textContent = photoSize + 'px'; photoBorderWidthValue.textContent = borderWidth + 'px'; } function updateFooterStyles() { const footerSize = footerFontSizeInput.value; const footerColor = footerColorInput.value; footerTextPreview.style.fontSize = footerSize + 'px'; footerTextPreview.style.color = footerColor; footerFontSizeValue.textContent = footerSize + 'px'; if (italicFooterCheckbox.checked) { footerTextPreview.style.fontStyle = 'italic'; } else { footerTextPreview.style.fontStyle = 'normal'; } if (boldFooterCheckbox.checked) { footerTextPreview.style.fontWeight = 'bold'; } else { footerTextPreview.style.fontWeight = 'normal'; } } function updateFontStyles() { if (boldNameCheckbox.checked) { namePreview.style.fontWeight = 'bold'; } else { namePreview.style.fontWeight = 'normal'; } if (boldLabelsCheckbox.checked) { detailLabels.forEach(label => { label.style.fontWeight = 'bold'; }); } else { detailLabels.forEach(label => { label.style.fontWeight = 'normal'; }); } } function updateColor() { document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--primary-color', currentColor); const cardHeader = document.querySelector('.card-header'); cardHeader.style.background = currentColor; const studentPhoto = document.querySelector('.student-photo'); studentPhoto.style.borderColor = currentColor; } function updateBgColor() { idCard.style.background = currentBgColor; } // Download function function downloadCard() { const cardElement = document.getElementById('idCard'); html2canvas(cardElement, { scale: 3, useCORS: true, logging: false, backgroundColor: null }).then(canvas => { if (currentFormat === 'png' || currentFormat === 'jpg') { // For PNG and JPG formats const link = document.createElement('a'); link.download = 'student-id-card.' + currentFormat; link.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/' + currentFormat); document.body.appendChild(link); link.click(); document.body.removeChild(link); } else if (currentFormat === 'pdf') { // For PDF format const { jsPDF } = window.jspdf; const pdf = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', 'a4'); const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); const pdfWidth = pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth(); const pdfHeight = (canvas.height * pdfWidth) / canvas.width; pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight); pdf.save('student-id-card.pdf'); } }).catch(error => { console.error('Error generating card:', error); alert('Error generating card. Please try again.'); }); } // Initialize updatePreview(); updateFontSizes(); updateFontStyles(); updateInstituteStyles(); updatePhotoStyles(); updateFooterStyles(); // Set default dates if empty const today = new Date(); const nextYear = new Date(today.getFullYear() + 1, today.getMonth(), today.getDate()); if (!issueDateInput.value) { issueDateInput.valueAsDate = today; } if (!expireDateInput.value) { expireDateInput.valueAsDate = nextYear; } }); </script> </body> </html> <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title>Student ID Card Generator</title> <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css"> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto:wght@300;400;500;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Open+Sans:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=League+Spartan:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <script src="https://html2canvas.hertzen.com/dist/html2canvas.min.js"></script> <style> * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; } body { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5f7fa 0%, #c3cfe2 100%); color: #333; min-height: 100vh; padding: 20px; } .container { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; } header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 30px; padding: 20px; background: #fff; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } header h1 { color: #2c3e50; font-size: 2.8rem; margin-bottom: 10px; } header p { color: #7f8c8d; font-size: 1.2rem; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; } .app-container { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 30px; margin-bottom: 40px; } .controls-panel { flex: 1; min-width: 300px; background: #fff; border-radius: 15px; padding: 25px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .preview-panel { flex: 1; min-width: 500px; background: #fff; border-radius: 15px; padding: 25px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .panel-title { font-size: 1.5rem; color: #2c3e50; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 2px solid #ecf0f1; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .panel-title i { color: #3498db; } .control-group { margin-bottom: 25px; } .control-label { display: block; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #2c3e50; } .control-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 15px; border: 2px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 1rem; transition: all 0.3s; } .control-input:focus { border-color: #3498db; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.2); } .select-group { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr)); gap: 10px; margin-top: 10px; } .size-option { padding: 12px; border: 2px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; font-weight: 500; } .size-option:hover { border-color: #3498db; background-color: #f8fafc; } .size-option.active { border-color: #3498db; background-color: #3498db; color: white; } .color-option { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; border: 3px solid #fff; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); transition: transform 0.2s; } .color-option:hover { transform: scale(1.1); } .color-option.active { transform: scale(1.1); border-color: #2c3e50; } .font-option { padding: 10px; border: 2px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; } .font-option:hover { border-color: #3498db; } .font-option.active { border-color: #3498db; background-color: #f8fafc; } .file-upload { position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: inline-block; width: 100%; } .file-upload-btn { width: 100%; padding: 12px 15px; background-color: #ecf0f1; border: 2px dashed #bdc3c7; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; color: #7f8c8d; font-weight: 500; } .file-upload-btn:hover { background-color: #dfe6e9; border-color: #3498db; } .file-upload input[type="file"] { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; opacity: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; cursor: pointer; } .preview-container { width: 100%; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 20px; background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 10px; min-height: 500px; } #id-card { background: white; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 15px 35px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.3s; } .id-card-header { background: #2c3e50; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center; border-radius: 12px 12px 0 0; } .id-card-body { padding: 25px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } /* Round Logo Style */ .id-card-logo { width: 100px; height: 100px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; margin-bottom: 15px; border: 4px solid #ecf0f1; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .id-card-photo { width: 150px; height: 180px; border-radius: 8px; object-fit: cover; border: 4px solid #ecf0f1; margin-bottom: 20px; background-color: #f8f9fa; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #bdc3c7; font-size: 0.9rem; } .id-card-details { width: 100%; } .id-card-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 12px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; } .id-card-label { font-weight: 600; color: #2c3e50; flex: 1; } .id-card-value { flex: 2; color: #34495e; } .id-card-footer { padding: 15px 25px; background: #f8f9fa; border-top: 1px solid #eee; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; border-radius: 0 0 12px 12px; } .footer-section { padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 5px; } .buttons-container { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 20px; margin-top: 30px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .btn { padding: 15px 30px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; transition: all 0.3s; } .btn-primary { background: #3498db; color: white; } .btn-primary:hover { background: #2980b9; transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 7px 15px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.3); } .btn-secondary { background: #2ecc71; color: white; } .btn-secondary:hover { background: #27ae60; transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 7px 15px rgba(46, 204, 113, 0.3); } .btn-download { background: #9b59b6; color: white; } .btn-download:hover { background: #8e44ad; transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 7px 15px rgba(155, 89, 182, 0.3); } .github-note { background: #2c3e50; color: white; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; margin-top: 30px; text-align: center; } .github-note h3 { margin-bottom: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; } .github-note p { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.6; } .mt-10 { margin-top: 10px; } .color-picker-container { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-top: 10px; } .color-picker-label { font-weight: 500; color: #555; min-width: 150px; } .color-input-group { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .color-preview { width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 6px; border: 2px solid #ddd; } @media (max-width: 1100px) { .app-container { flex-direction: column; } .controls-panel, .preview-panel { min-width: 100%; } } </style> </head> <body> <div class="container"> <header> <h1><i class="fas fa-id-card"></i> Student ID Card Generator</h1> <p>Create professional student ID cards for schools, colleges, universities, or organizations. Customize every aspect and download your design.</p> <p style="color: #3498db; margin-top: 10px; font-weight: 600;">Optimized for GitHub Student Developer Pack approval</p> </header> <div class="app-container"> <!-- Controls Panel --> <div class="controls-panel"> <h2 class="panel-title"><i class="fas fa-sliders-h"></i> Customize ID Card</h2> <div class="control-group"> <label class="control-label">ID Card Size</label> <div class="select-group"> <div class="size-option active" data-width="336" data-height="212">Standard (86x54mm)</div> <div class="size-option" data-width="380" data-height="240">Large (95x60mm)</div> <div class="size-option" data-width="300" data-height="190">Small (75x48mm)</div> <div class="size-option" data-width="420" data-height="265">Custom</div> </div> </div> <div class="control-group"> <label class="control-label">Custom Size (Pixels)</label> <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px;"> <input type="number" id="custom-width" class="control-input" placeholder="Width" value="336" min="200" max="800"> <input type="number" id="custom-height" class="control-input" placeholder="Height" value="212" min="150" max="600"> </div> </div> <div class="control-group"> <label class="control-label">Institution Details</label> <input type="text" id="institution-name" class="control-input" placeholder="Institution Name" value="GitHub University"> <div class="color-picker-container mt-10"> <span class="color-picker-label">Header Color:</span> <div class="color-input-group"> <input type="color" id="institution-color" class="control-input" value="#2c3e50" style="width: 60px; padding: 0; height: 40px;"> <div id="institution-color-preview" class="color-preview" style="background-color: #2c3e50;"></div> </div> </div> <div class="color-picker-container mt-10"> <span class="color-picker-label">Header Font Color:</span> <div class="color-input-group"> <input type="color" id="institution-font-color" class="control-input" value="#ffffff" style="width: 60px; padding: 0; height: 40px;"> <div id="institution-font-color-preview" class="color-preview" style="background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #ddd;"></div> </div> </div> <div class="control-group"> <label class="control-label">Institute Font Family</label> <div class="select-group" id="institute-font-group"> <div class="font-option active" data-font="League Spartan">League Spartan</div> <div class="font-option" data-font="Poppins">Poppins</div> <div class="font-option" data-font="Roboto">Roboto</div> <div class="font-option" data-font="Montserrat">Montserrat</div> </div> </div> <div class="file-upload mt-10"> <div class="file-upload-btn"> <i class="fas fa-upload"></i> Upload Institution Logo (Round Shape) </div> <input type="file" id="logo-upload" accept="image/*"> </div> </div> <div class="control-group"> <label class="control-label">Student Details</label> <input type="text" id="student-name" class="control-input" placeholder="Student Full Name" value="Alex Johnson"> <input type="text" id="student-id" class="control-input mt-10" placeholder="Student ID Number" value="GH2023001"> <input type="text" id="student-course" class="control-input mt-10" placeholder="Course/Program" value="Computer Science"> <input type="text" id="student-year" class="control-input mt-10" placeholder="Year/Semester" value="3rd Year"> <input type="text" id="student-dob" class="control-input mt-10" placeholder="Date of Birth" value="15/05/2001"> <!-- Custom Issue Date Option --> <input type="text" id="student-issue-date" class="control-input mt-10" placeholder="Issue Date (DD/MM/YYYY)" value="01/09/2023"> <input type="text" id="student-validity" class="control-input mt-10" placeholder="Valid Until" value="30/06/2024"> <div class="file-upload mt-10"> <div class="file-upload-btn"> <i class="fas fa-upload"></i> Upload Student Photo (Optional) </div> <input type="file" id="photo-upload" accept="image/*"> </div> </div> <div class="control-group"> <label class="control-label">Card Background</label> <div class="select-group" id="bg-color-group"> <div class="color-option active" style="background-color: #ffffff;" data-color="#ffffff"></div> <div class="color-option" style="background-color: #f8f9fa;" data-color="#f8f9fa"></div> <div class="color-option" style="background-color: #e3f2fd;" data-color="#e3f2fd"></div> <div class="color-option" style="background-color: #f3e5f5;" data-color="#f3e5f5"></div> <div class="color-option" style="background-color: #e8f5e8;" data-color="#e8f5e8"></div> <div class="color-option" style="background-color: #fff3e0;" data-color="#fff3e0"></div> </div> <input type="color" id="custom-color" class="control-input mt-10" value="#3498db"> </div> <div class="control-group"> <label class="control-label">Footer Background Colors</label> <div class="color-picker-container mt-10"> <span class="color-picker-label">Issued Date BG:</span> <div class="color-input-group"> <input type="color" id="issue-bg-color" class="control-input" value="#f8f9fa" style="width: 60px; padding: 0; height: 40px;"> <div id="issue-bg-color-preview" class="color-preview" style="background-color: #f8f9fa;"></div> </div> </div> <div class="color-picker-container mt-10"> <span class="color-picker-label">Expire Date BG:</span> <div class="color-input-group"> <input type="color" id="expire-bg-color" class="control-input" value="#f8f9fa" style="width: 60px; padding: 0; height: 40px;"> <div id="expire-bg-color-preview" class="color-preview" style="background-color: #f8f9fa;"></div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="control-group"> <label class="control-label">Body Font Family</label> <div class="select-group" id="body-font-group"> <div class="font-option active" data-font="Poppins">Poppins</div> <div class="font-option" data-font="Roboto">Roboto</div> <div class="font-option" data-font="Open Sans">Open Sans</div> <div class="font-option" data-font="Montserrat">Montserrat</div> </div> </div> <div class="control-group"> <label class="control-label">Body Font Color & Size</label> <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px;"> <input type="color" id="font-color" class="control-input" value="#2c3e50" style="flex: 1;"> <input type="range" id="font-size" class="control-input" min="12" max="20" value="16" style="flex: 2;"> </div> <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 5px;"> <span>Small</span> <span>Medium</span> <span>Large</span> </div> </div> <div class="buttons-container"> <button class="btn btn-primary" id="generate-btn"> <i class="fas fa-sync-alt"></i> Update Preview </button> <button class="btn btn-secondary" id="reset-btn"> <i class="fas fa-redo"></i> Reset to Default </button> </div> </div> <!-- Preview Panel --> <div class="preview-panel"> <h2 class="panel-title"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> ID Card Preview</h2> <div class="preview-container"> <div id="id-card" style="width: 336px; height: 212px;"> <div class="id-card-header" id="id-header"> <h3 id="id-institution">GitHub University</h3> </div> <div class="id-card-body" id="id-body"> <div style="display: flex; width: 100%;"> <div style="flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;"> <img id="id-logo" src="" alt="Institution Logo" class="id-card-logo" style="display: none;"> <div id="id-photo" class="id-card-photo"> <span>No Photo</span> </div> </div> <div class="id-card-details" style="flex: 2; margin-left: 20px;"> <div class="id-card-row"> <div class="id-card-label">Name:</div> <div class="id-card-value" id="id-name">Alex Johnson</div> </div> <div class="id-card-row"> <div class="id-card-label">ID No:</div> <div class="id-card-value" id="id-number">GH2023001</div> </div> <div class="id-card-row"> <div class="id-card-label">Course:</div> <div class="id-card-value" id="id-course">Computer Science</div> </div> <div class="id-card-row"> <div class="id-card-label">Year:</div> <div class="id-card-value" id="id-year">3rd Year</div> </div> <div class="id-card-row"> <div class="id-card-label">DOB:</div> <div class="id-card-value" id="id-dob">15/05/2001</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="id-card-footer"> <div id="issued-date-section" class="footer-section"> <strong>Issued:</strong> <span id="id-issue">01/09/2023</span> </div> <div id="expire-date-section" class="footer-section"> <strong>Expires:</strong> <span id="id-expiry">30/06/2024</span> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="buttons-container"> <button class="btn btn-download" id="download-btn"> <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download ID Card </button> </div> </div> </div> <div class="github-note"> <h3><i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub Student Developer Pack Ready</h3> <p>This ID Card Generator creates professional student ID cards that meet the requirements for GitHub Student Developer Pack verification. Make sure your card includes your name, photo, institution name, issue date, and expiration date for best results.</p> </div> </div> <script> // DOM Elements const idCard = document.getElementById('id-card'); const sizeOptions = document.querySelectorAll('.size-option'); const customWidth = document.getElementById('custom-width'); const customHeight = document.getElementById('custom-height'); const colorOptions = document.querySelectorAll('.color-option'); const customColor = document.getElementById('custom-color'); const fontColor = document.getElementById('font-color'); const fontSize = document.getElementById('font-size'); const generateBtn = document.getElementById('generate-btn'); const resetBtn = document.getElementById('reset-btn'); const downloadBtn = document.getElementById('download-btn'); const logoUpload = document.getElementById('logo-upload'); const photoUpload = document.getElementById('photo-upload'); // Color pickers const institutionColor = document.getElementById('institution-color'); const institutionFontColor = document.getElementById('institution-font-color'); const institutionColorPreview = document.getElementById('institution-color-preview'); const institutionFontColorPreview = document.getElementById('institution-font-color-preview'); // Footer background color pickers const issueBgColor = document.getElementById('issue-bg-color'); const expireBgColor = document.getElementById('expire-bg-color'); const issueBgColorPreview = document.getElementById('issue-bg-color-preview'); const expireBgColorPreview = document.getElementById('expire-bg-color-preview'); // ID Card elements to update const idInstitution = document.getElementById('id-institution'); const idLogo = document.getElementById('id-logo'); const idPhoto = document.getElementById('id-photo'); const idName = document.getElementById('id-name'); const idNumber = document.getElementById('id-number'); const idCourse = document.getElementById('id-course'); const idYear = document.getElementById('id-year'); const idDob = document.getElementById('id-dob'); const idIssue = document.getElementById('id-issue'); const idExpiry = document.getElementById('id-expiry'); const idHeader = document.getElementById('id-header'); const idBody = document.getElementById('id-body'); const issuedDateSection = document.getElementById('issued-date-section'); const expireDateSection = document.getElementById('expire-date-section'); // Form input elements const institutionName = document.getElementById('institution-name'); const studentName = document.getElementById('student-name'); const studentId = document.getElementById('student-id'); const studentCourse = document.getElementById('student-course'); const studentYear = document.getElementById('student-year'); const studentDob = document.getElementById('student-dob'); const studentIssueDate = document.getElementById('student-issue-date'); const studentValidity = document.getElementById('student-validity'); // Font options const instituteFontOptions = document.querySelectorAll('#institute-font-group .font-option'); const bodyFontOptions = document.querySelectorAll('#body-font-group .font-option'); // Initialize with default values const today = new Date(); const formattedDate = `${today.getDate().toString().padStart(2, '0')}/${(today.getMonth()+1).toString().padStart(2, '0')}/${today.getFullYear()}`; // Update color previews on input institutionColor.addEventListener('input', function() { institutionColorPreview.style.backgroundColor = this.value; }); institutionFontColor.addEventListener('input', function() { institutionFontColorPreview.style.backgroundColor = this.value; }); issueBgColor.addEventListener('input', function() { issueBgColorPreview.style.backgroundColor = this.value; }); expireBgColor.addEventListener('input', function() { expireBgColorPreview.style.backgroundColor = this.value; }); // Event Listeners for Size Options sizeOptions.forEach(option => { option.addEventListener('click', function() { sizeOptions.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('active')); this.classList.add('active'); if (this.textContent !== 'Custom') { const width = this.getAttribute('data-width'); const height = this.getAttribute('data-height'); idCard.style.width = `${width}px`; idCard.style.height = `${height}px`; customWidth.value = width; customHeight.value = height; } }); }); // Custom size inputs customWidth.addEventListener('input', function() { const activeSize = document.querySelector('.size-option.active'); if (activeSize.textContent === 'Custom') { idCard.style.width = `${this.value}px`; } }); customHeight.addEventListener('input', function() { const activeSize = document.querySelector('.size-option.active'); if (activeSize.textContent === 'Custom') { idCard.style.height = `${this.value}px`; } }); // Background Color Options colorOptions.forEach(option => { option.addEventListener('click', function() { colorOptions.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('active')); this.classList.add('active'); const color = this.getAttribute('data-color'); idCard.style.backgroundColor = color; customColor.value = color; }); }); // Custom color picker customColor.addEventListener('input', function() { idCard.style.backgroundColor = this.value; colorOptions.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('active')); }); // Institute Font Options instituteFontOptions.forEach(option => { option.addEventListener('click', function() { instituteFontOptions.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('active')); this.classList.add('active'); }); }); // Body Font Options bodyFontOptions.forEach(option => { option.addEventListener('click', function() { bodyFontOptions.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('active')); this.classList.add('active'); }); }); // Font Color fontColor.addEventListener('input', function() { // Update all body text elements const bodyTextElements = idBody.querySelectorAll('.id-card-label, .id-card-value'); bodyTextElements.forEach(el => { el.style.color = this.value; }); }); // Font Size fontSize.addEventListener('input', function() { const size = this.value; idCard.style.fontSize = `${size}px`; }); // Update ID Card with form values generateBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { console.log('Update button clicked'); // Debug // Update institution details idInstitution.textContent = institutionName.value || 'Institution Name'; console.log('Institution name updated:', institutionName.value); // Debug // Update institution header colors idHeader.style.backgroundColor = institutionColor.value; idHeader.style.color = institutionFontColor.value; console.log('Header colors updated'); // Debug // Update institute font const activeInstituteFont = document.querySelector('#institute-font-group .font-option.active'); if (activeInstituteFont) { idHeader.style.fontFamily = activeInstituteFont.getAttribute('data-font'); console.log('Institute font updated:', activeInstituteFont.getAttribute('data-font')); // Debug } // Update student details idName.textContent = studentName.value || 'Student Name'; idNumber.textContent = studentId.value || 'ID Number'; idCourse.textContent = studentCourse.value || 'Course/Program'; idYear.textContent = studentYear.value || 'Year/Semester'; idDob.textContent = studentDob.value || 'Date of Birth'; idExpiry.textContent = studentValidity.value || 'Expiration Date'; console.log('Student details updated'); // Debug // Update issue date - use custom if provided, otherwise use today's date if (studentIssueDate.value && studentIssueDate.value.trim() !== '') { idIssue.textContent = studentIssueDate.value; } else { idIssue.textContent = formattedDate; } console.log('Issue date updated:', idIssue.textContent); // Debug // Update footer background colors - FIXED issuedDateSection.style.backgroundColor = issueBgColor.value; expireDateSection.style.backgroundColor = expireBgColor.value; console.log('Footer BG colors updated - Issue:', issueBgColor.value, 'Expire:', expireBgColor.value); // Debug // Apply body font const activeBodyFont = document.querySelector('#body-font-group .font-option.active'); if (activeBodyFont) { idBody.style.fontFamily = activeBodyFont.getAttribute('data-font'); console.log('Body font updated:', activeBodyFont.getAttribute('data-font')); // Debug } // Apply body font color const bodyTextElements = idBody.querySelectorAll('.id-card-label, .id-card-value'); bodyTextElements.forEach(el => { el.style.color = fontColor.value; }); console.log('Body font color updated:', fontColor.value); // Debug // Apply background color const activeColor = document.querySelector('.color-option.active'); if (activeColor) { idCard.style.backgroundColor = activeColor.getAttribute('data-color'); console.log('Card BG color updated:', activeColor.getAttribute('data-color')); // Debug } // Show success message showNotification('ID Card updated successfully!', 'success'); }); // Reset to default resetBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { // Reset form inputs institutionName.value = 'GitHub University'; studentName.value = 'Alex Johnson'; studentId.value = 'GH2023001'; studentCourse.value = 'Computer Science'; studentYear.value = '3rd Year'; studentDob.value = '15/05/2001'; studentIssueDate.value = '01/09/2023'; studentValidity.value = '30/06/2024'; // Reset institution colors institutionColor.value = '#2c3e50'; institutionFontColor.value = '#ffffff'; institutionColorPreview.style.backgroundColor = '#2c3e50'; institutionFontColorPreview.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff'; // Reset footer background colors issueBgColor.value = '#f8f9fa'; expireBgColor.value = '#f8f9fa'; issueBgColorPreview.style.backgroundColor = '#f8f9fa'; expireBgColorPreview.style.backgroundColor = '#f8f9fa'; // Reset size sizeOptions.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('active')); sizeOptions[0].classList.add('active'); idCard.style.width = '336px'; idCard.style.height = '212px'; customWidth.value = '336'; customHeight.value = '212'; // Reset colors colorOptions.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('active')); colorOptions[0].classList.add('active'); idCard.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff'; customColor.value = '#3498db'; // Reset institute fonts instituteFontOptions.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('active')); instituteFontOptions[0].classList.add('active'); // Reset body fonts bodyFontOptions.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('active')); bodyFontOptions[0].classList.add('active'); // Reset font color and size fontColor.value = '#2c3e50'; fontSize.value = '16'; idCard.style.fontSize = '16px'; // Reset logo and photo idLogo.style.display = 'none'; idLogo.src = ''; idPhoto.innerHTML = '<span>No Photo</span>'; // Clear file inputs logoUpload.value = ''; photoUpload.value = ''; // Update ID card generateBtn.click(); // Show notification showNotification('ID Card reset to default values!', 'info'); }); // Logo upload - Round shape logoUpload.addEventListener('change', function() { if (this.files && this.files[0]) { const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e) { idLogo.src = e.target.result; idLogo.style.display = 'block'; // Ensure round shape idLogo.classList.add('id-card-logo'); } reader.readAsDataURL(this.files[0]); } }); // Photo upload photoUpload.addEventListener('change', function() { if (this.files && this.files[0]) { const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e) { idPhoto.innerHTML = ''; const img = document.createElement('img'); img.src = e.target.result; img.style.width = '100%'; img.style.height = '100%'; img.style.objectFit = 'cover'; img.style.borderRadius = '4px'; idPhoto.appendChild(img); } reader.readAsDataURL(this.files[0]); } }); // Download ID Card as image downloadBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { // Show loading state const originalText = downloadBtn.innerHTML; downloadBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Generating Image...'; downloadBtn.disabled = true; // Use html2canvas to capture the ID card html2canvas(idCard, { scale: 3, backgroundColor: null, useCORS: true, logging: false }).then(canvas => { // Create download link const link = document.createElement('a'); link.download = `student-id-card-${studentId.value || 'sample'}.png`; link.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); link.click(); // Reset button downloadBtn.innerHTML = originalText; downloadBtn.disabled = false; // Show success message showNotification('ID Card downloaded successfully!', 'success'); }).catch(error => { console.error('Error generating image:', error); downloadBtn.innerHTML = originalText; downloadBtn.disabled = false; showNotification('Error downloading ID Card. Please try again.', 'error'); }); }); // Initialize with default values window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { // Set initial values idIssue.textContent = studentIssueDate.value || formattedDate; // Set initial colors institutionColorPreview.style.backgroundColor = institutionColor.value; institutionFontColorPreview.style.backgroundColor = institutionFontColor.value; issueBgColorPreview.style.backgroundColor = issueBgColor.value; expireBgColorPreview.style.backgroundColor = expireBgColor.value; // Apply initial background color const activeColor = document.querySelector('.color-option.active'); if (activeColor) { idCard.style.backgroundColor = activeColor.getAttribute('data-color'); } // Apply initial footer colors issuedDateSection.style.backgroundColor = issueBgColor.value; expireDateSection.style.backgroundColor = expireBgColor.value; console.log('Page loaded with default values'); // Debug }); // Notification function function showNotification(message, type) { // Remove any existing notification const existingNotification = document.querySelector('.notification'); if (existingNotification) { existingNotification.remove(); } // Create notification element const notification = document.createElement('div'); notification.className = `notification ${type}`; notification.innerHTML = ` <i class="fas fa-${type === 'success' ? 'check-circle' : type === 'error' ? 'exclamation-circle' : 'info-circle'}"></i> <span>${message}</span> `; // Style the notification notification.style.position = 'fixed'; notification.style.top = '20px'; notification.style.right = '20px'; notification.style.padding = '15px 20px'; notification.style.borderRadius = '8px'; notification.style.boxShadow = '0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'; notification.style.display = 'flex'; notification.style.alignItems = 'center'; notification.style.gap = '10px'; notification.style.zIndex = '1000'; notification.style.fontWeight = '500'; notification.style.animation = 'slideIn 0.3s ease'; if (type === 'success') { notification.style.backgroundColor = '#2ecc71'; notification.style.color = 'white'; } else if (type === 'error') { notification.style.backgroundColor = '#e74c3c'; notification.style.color = 'white'; } else { notification.style.backgroundColor = '#3498db'; notification.style.color = 'white'; } // Add to document document.body.appendChild(notification); // Remove after 3 seconds setTimeout(() => { notification.style.animation = 'slideOut 0.3s ease'; setTimeout(() => { if (notification.parentNode) { notification.parentNode.removeChild(notification); } }, 300); }, 3000); // Add CSS animations const style = document.createElement('style'); style.textContent = ` @keyframes slideIn { from { transform: translateX(100%); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } } @keyframes slideOut { from { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } to { transform: translateX(100%); opacity: 0; } } `; document.head.appendChild(style); } </script> </body> </html> <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title>Student ID Card Generator</title> <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css"> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Roboto+Slab:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Raleway:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <style> * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; } body { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5f7fa 0%, #c3cfe2 100%); min-height: 100vh; padding: 20px; } .container { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; } header { text-align: center; padding: 25px 0; background: #fff; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); margin-bottom: 30px; } h1 { color: #2c3e50; margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 2.8rem; } .subtitle { color: #7f8c8d; font-size: 1.2rem; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.6; } .github-badge { display: inline-block; background: #333; color: white; padding: 8px 15px; border-radius: 20px; margin-top: 15px; font-size: 0.9rem; } .github-badge i { margin-right: 8px; } .main-content { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 30px; margin-bottom: 30px; } .editor-panel { flex: 1; min-width: 300px; background: white; border-radius: 15px; padding: 25px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .preview-panel { flex: 1; min-width: 300px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .panel-title { font-size: 1.5rem; color: #2c3e50; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 2px solid #eee; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 20px; } label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: 500; color: #34495e; } input, select, .color-picker, .date-input, textarea { width: 100%; padding: 12px 15px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 1rem; transition: all 0.3s; } input:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus { outline: none; border-color: #3498db; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.2); } .color-picker { height: 45px; padding: 5px; cursor: pointer; } .date-input { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .date-input input { flex: 1; } .file-upload { position: relative; display: inline-block; width: 100%; } .file-upload input[type="file"] { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; opacity: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; cursor: pointer; } .file-upload-label { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 12px; background: #f8f9fa; border: 2px dashed #ddd; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; } .file-upload-label:hover { background: #e9ecef; border-color: #3498db; } .checkbox-group { display: flex; align-items: center; margin-top: 10px; } .checkbox-group input { width: auto; margin-right: 10px; } .preset-sizes { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 10px; margin-top: 10px; } .size-btn { padding: 10px; background: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; } .size-btn:hover, .size-btn.active { background: #3498db; color: white; border-color: #3498db; } .btn { display: inline-block; padding: 14px 25px; background: #3498db; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; text-align: center; width: 100%; margin-top: 10px; } .btn:hover { background: #2980b9; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.3); } .btn-download { background: #2ecc71; margin-top: 20px; } .btn-download:hover { background: #27ae60; box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(46, 204, 113, 0.3); } .btn-reset { background: #e74c3c; } .btn-reset:hover { background: #c0392b; box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.3); } #idCard { width: 350px; height: 500px; background: white; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); overflow: hidden; position: relative; margin-bottom: 25px; } .id-card-header { height: 100px; background: linear-gradient(to right, #2c3e50, #3498db); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; position: relative; } .institute-logo { position: absolute; left: 20px; height: 70px; width: 70px; border-radius: 50%; background: white; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; border: 3px solid white; } .institute-logo img { max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; object-fit: contain; } .institute-name { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; text-align: center; margin: 0 20px 0 90px; } .id-card-body { padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: calc(100% - 100px); } .main-content-area { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 10px; } .photo-section { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; gap: 15px; } .vertical-text-container { width: 30px; height: 155px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #ddd; overflow: hidden; } .vertical-text { writing-mode: vertical-rl; text-orientation: mixed; transform: rotate(180deg); font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px; text-align: center; padding: 10px 0; } .student-photo-container { width: 130px; height: 155px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; background: #f8f9fa; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .student-photo { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .placeholder-photo { color: #bbb; font-size: 3.5rem; } .student-info { flex: 1; } .info-row { display: flex; margin-bottom: 10px; padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px dashed #eee; } .info-label { font-weight: 700; width: 110px; color: #2c3e50; font-size: 0.9rem; } .info-value { flex: 1; color: #34495e; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; } .id-card-footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; margin-top: 20px; padding-top: 15px; border-top: 1px solid #eee; } .dates { font-size: 0.8rem; } .issue-date, .expiry-date { margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 700; } .signature-area { text-align: center; width: 120px; } .signature-line { border-top: 1px solid #2c3e50; margin: 5px 0; width: 100%; } .principal-signature { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 5px; } .features { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 15px; } .feature { display: flex; align-items: center; background: white; padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); } .feature i { margin-right: 10px; color: #3498db; font-size: 1.2rem; } .instructions { background: white; border-radius: 15px; padding: 25px; margin-top: 30px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .instructions h3 { color: #2c3e50; margin-bottom: 15px; } .instructions ul { padding-left: 20px; color: #34495e; line-height: 1.8; } .instructions li { margin-bottom: 10px; } .github-approval { background: #2c3e50; color: white; padding: 15px; border-radius: 10px; margin-top: 15px; } @media (max-width: 1100px) { .main-content { flex-direction: column; } #idCard { width: 100%; max-width: 400px; } } @media (max-width: 768px) { h1 { font-size: 2.2rem; } .preset-sizes { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .features { flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .main-content-area { flex-direction: column; } .photo-section { flex-direction: column; } .vertical-text-container { width: 155px; height: 30px; } .vertical-text { writing-mode: horizontal-tb; transform: none; padding: 0 10px; } .student-photo-container { width: 120px; height: 140px; margin: 0 auto 15px; } } </style> </head> <body> <div class="container"> <header> <h1>Student ID Card Generator</h1> <p class="subtitle">Create customized ID cards for schools, colleges, universities, or any institution. Export high-quality ID cards suitable for GitHub Student Developer Pack approval.</p> <div class="github-badge"> <i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub Student Developer Pack Compatible </div> </header> <div class="main-content"> <div class="editor-panel"> <h2 class="panel-title">ID Card Customization</h2> <div class="form-group"> <label for="cardSize">Card Size</label> <select id="cardSize"> <option value="standard">Standard (3.375" x 2.125")</option> <option value="credit">Credit Card Size (3.370" x 2.125")</option> <option value="vertical">Vertical (2.125" x 3.375")</option> <option value="custom">Custom Size</option> </select> <div class="preset-sizes"> <div class="size-btn" data-width="350" data-height="220">Small</div> <div class="size-btn active" data-width="350" data-height="500">Medium</div> <div class="size-btn" data-width="400" data-height="600">Large</div> </div> <div id="customSizeControls" style="display: none; margin-top: 15px;"> <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px;"> <div style="flex: 1;"> <label>Width (px)</label> <input type="number" id="customWidth" min="200" max="800" value="350"> </div> <div style="flex: 1;"> <label>Height (px)</label> <input type="number" id="customHeight" min="200" max="800" value="500"> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="instituteName">Institute Name</label> <input type="text" id="instituteName" placeholder="Enter school/college/university name" value="University of Technology"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="logoUpload">Institute Logo</label> <div class="file-upload"> <input type="file" id="logoUpload" accept="image/*"> <div class="file-upload-label"> <i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt"></i> &nbsp; Upload Logo </div> </div> <div class="checkbox-group"> <input type="checkbox" id="removeLogo"> <label for="removeLogo">Remove logo</label> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="studentName">Student Name</label> <input type="text" id="studentName" placeholder="Enter student's full name" value="Alex Johnson"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="studentId">Student ID</label> <input type="text" id="studentId" placeholder="Enter student ID" value="UT-2023-78945"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="department">Department</label> <input type="text" id="department" placeholder="Enter department" value="Computer Science"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="batchYear">Batch/Year</label> <input type="text" id="batchYear" placeholder="Enter batch/year" value="2023-2024"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="studentAddress">Student Address</label> <textarea id="studentAddress" rows="3" placeholder="Enter student's address">123 Main Street, Tech City, TC 10001</textarea> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="studentPhoto">Student Photo</label> <div class="file-upload"> <input type="file" id="studentPhoto" accept="image/*"> <div class="file-upload-label"> <i class="fas fa-user-circle"></i> &nbsp; Upload Student Photo </div> </div> <div class="checkbox-group"> <input type="checkbox" id="removePhoto"> <label for="removePhoto">Remove photo</label> </div> </div> <!-- Vertical Text Customization --> <div class="form-group"> <label for="verticalText">Vertical Text</label> <input type="text" id="verticalText" placeholder="Enter vertical text" value="STUDENT ID CARD"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="verticalTextFont">Vertical Text Font</label> <select id="verticalTextFont"> <option value="Poppins">Poppins</option> <option value="Roboto Slab">Roboto Slab</option> <option value="Montserrat">Montserrat</option> <option value="Oswald">Oswald</option> <option value="Playfair Display">Playfair Display</option> <option value="Raleway">Raleway</option> <option value="Arial">Arial</option> <option value="Times New Roman">Times New Roman</option> </select> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="verticalTextColor">Vertical Text Color</label> <input type="color" id="verticalTextColor" class="color-picker" value="#2c3e50"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="verticalTextBgColor">Vertical Text Background Color</label> <input type="color" id="verticalTextBgColor" class="color-picker" value="#f8f9fa"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="verticalTextSize">Vertical Text Size</label> <select id="verticalTextSize"> <option value="small">Small</option> <option value="medium" selected>Medium</option> <option value="large">Large</option> <option value="xlarge">Extra Large</option> </select> </div> <div class="checkbox-group"> <input type="checkbox" id="showVerticalText" checked> <label for="showVerticalText">Show Vertical Text</label> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="principalName">Principal Name (for signature)</label> <input type="text" id="principalName" placeholder="Enter principal's name" value="Dr. Robert Smith"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="principalTitle">Principal Title</label> <input type="text" id="principalTitle" placeholder="Enter principal's title" value="Principal"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Background Color</label> <input type="color" id="backgroundColor" class="color-picker" value="#ffffff"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Header Color</label> <input type="color" id="headerColor" class="color-picker" value="#2c3e50"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="mainFont">Main Font (Student Info)</label> <select id="mainFont"> <option value="Poppins">Poppins</option> <option value="Arial">Arial</option> <option value="Helvetica">Helvetica</option> <option value="Times New Roman">Times New Roman</option> <option value="Georgia">Georgia</option> <option value="Courier New">Courier New</option> </select> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="headerFont">Header Font (Institute Name)</label> <select id="headerFont"> <option value="Roboto Slab">Roboto Slab</option> <option value="Montserrat">Montserrat</option> <option value="Oswald">Oswald</option> <option value="Playfair Display">Playfair Display</option> <option value="Raleway">Raleway</option> <option value="Poppins">Poppins</option> </select> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="dateFont">Date Font (Issue/Expire)</label> <select id="dateFont"> <option value="Roboto Slab">Roboto Slab</option> <option value="Montserrat">Montserrat</option> <option value="Oswald">Oswald</option> <option value="Playfair Display">Playfair Display</option> <option value="Raleway">Raleway</option> <option value="Poppins">Poppins</option> </select> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="fontColor">Font Color</label> <input type="color" id="fontColor" class="color-picker" value="#2c3e50"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Dates</label> <div class="date-input"> <div style="flex: 1;"> <label for="issueDate">Issue Date</label> <input type="date" id="issueDate" value="2023-09-01"> </div> <div style="flex: 1;"> <label for="expiryDate">Expiry Date</label> <input type="date" id="expiryDate" value="2024-08-31"> </div> </div> </div> <button class="btn" id="updateBtn">Update ID Card</button> <button class="btn btn-reset" id="resetBtn">Reset to Default</button> </div> <div class="preview-panel"> <h2 class="panel-title">ID Card Preview</h2> <div id="idCard"> <div class="id-card-header"> <div class="institute-logo"> <i class="fas fa-university placeholder-logo"></i> </div> <div class="institute-name">University of Technology</div> </div> <div class="id-card-body"> <div class="main-content-area"> <div class="photo-section"> <div class="vertical-text-container"> <div class="vertical-text">STUDENT ID CARD</div> </div> <div class="student-photo-container"> <i class="fas fa-user-graduate placeholder-photo"></i> </div> </div> <div class="student-info"> <div class="info-row"> <div class="info-label">Name:</div> <div class="info-value">Alex Johnson</div> </div> <div class="info-row"> <div class="info-label">ID No:</div> <div class="info-value">UT-2023-78945</div> </div> <div class="info-row"> <div class="info-label">Department:</div> <div class="info-value">Computer Science</div> </div> <div class="info-row"> <div class="info-label">Batch:</div> <div class="info-value">2023-2024</div> </div> <div class="info-row"> <div class="info-label">Address:</div> <div class="info-value">123 Main Street, Tech City, TC 10001</div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="id-card-footer"> <div class="dates"> <div class="issue-date">Issued: Sep 01, 2023</div> <div class="expiry-date">Expires: Aug 31, 2024</div> </div> <div class="signature-area"> <div class="signature-line"></div> <div class="principal-signature">Dr. Robert Smith</div> <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600;">Principal</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="features"> <div class="feature"> <i class="fas fa-palette"></i> <span>Customizable</span> </div> <div class="feature"> <i class="fas fa-download"></i> <span>High Quality</span> </div> <div class="feature"> <i class="fab fa-github"></i> <span>GitHub Approved</span> </div> </div> <button class="btn btn-download" id="downloadBtn"> <i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download ID Card </button> </div> </div> <div class="instructions"> <h3>How to Create GitHub Student Developer Pack Approved ID Card</h3> <ul> <li>Make sure to include your full name as it appears on your academic records</li> <li>Include the current date of issue and a future expiration date (at least 6 months from now)</li> <li>Use your official student ID number issued by your institution</li> <li>The ID card must clearly show your institution's name and logo</li> <li>Include your photo for better verification (optional but recommended)</li> <li>Download the ID card in PNG format for submission</li> <li>Ensure all information is accurate and clearly visible</li> </ul> <div class="github-approval"> <i class="fab fa-github"></i> This ID card generator produces cards that meet GitHub Student Developer Pack requirements for student verification. </div> </div> </div> <!-- html2canvas library for downloading the ID card as image --> <script src="https://html2canvas.hertzen.com/dist/html2canvas.min.js"></script> <script> // DOM elements const idCard = document.getElementById('idCard'); const cardSize = document.getElementById('cardSize'); const customSizeControls = document.getElementById('customSizeControls'); const customWidth = document.getElementById('customWidth'); const customHeight = document.getElementById('customHeight'); const instituteName = document.getElementById('instituteName'); const logoUpload = document.getElementById('logoUpload'); const removeLogo = document.getElementById('removeLogo'); const studentName = document.getElementById('studentName'); const studentId = document.getElementById('studentId'); const department = document.getElementById('department'); const batchYear = document.getElementById('batchYear'); const studentAddress = document.getElementById('studentAddress'); const principalName = document.getElementById('principalName'); const principalTitle = document.getElementById('principalTitle'); const studentPhoto = document.getElementById('studentPhoto'); const removePhoto = document.getElementById('removePhoto'); const backgroundColor = document.getElementById('backgroundColor'); const headerColor = document.getElementById('headerColor'); const mainFont = document.getElementById('mainFont'); const headerFont = document.getElementById('headerFont'); const dateFont = document.getElementById('dateFont'); const fontColor = document.getElementById('fontColor'); const issueDate = document.getElementById('issueDate'); const expiryDate = document.getElementById('expiryDate'); const updateBtn = document.getElementById('updateBtn'); const resetBtn = document.getElementById('resetBtn'); const downloadBtn = document.getElementById('downloadBtn'); const sizeButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.size-btn'); // New vertical text elements const verticalText = document.getElementById('verticalText'); const verticalTextFont = document.getElementById('verticalTextFont'); const verticalTextColor = document.getElementById('verticalTextColor'); const verticalTextBgColor = document.getElementById('verticalTextBgColor'); const verticalTextSize = document.getElementById('verticalTextSize'); const showVerticalText = document.getElementById('showVerticalText'); // Default values const defaultValues = { instituteName: 'University of Technology', studentName: 'Alex Johnson', studentId: 'UT-2023-78945', department: 'Computer Science', batchYear: '2023-2024', studentAddress: '123 Main Street, Tech City, TC 10001', principalName: 'Dr. Robert Smith', principalTitle: 'Principal', backgroundColor: '#ffffff', headerColor: '#2c3e50', mainFont: 'Poppins', headerFont: 'Roboto Slab', dateFont: 'Roboto Slab', fontColor: '#2c3e50', verticalText: 'STUDENT ID CARD', verticalTextFont: 'Poppins', verticalTextColor: '#2c3e50', verticalTextBgColor: '#f8f9fa', verticalTextSize: 'medium', showVerticalText: true, issueDate: '2023-09-01', expiryDate: '2024-08-31' }; // Format date for display function formatDate(dateString) { const date = new Date(dateString); const options = { year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' }; return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', options); } // Function to apply fonts to different sections function applyFonts() { // Apply main font to student info const mainTextElements = [ ...document.querySelectorAll('.info-label'), ...document.querySelectorAll('.info-value'), ...document.querySelectorAll('.principal-signature'), ...document.querySelectorAll('.principal-signature + div') ]; mainTextElements.forEach(el => { el.style.fontFamily = mainFont.value; }); // Apply header font to institute name document.querySelector('.institute-name').style.fontFamily = headerFont.value; document.querySelector('.institute-name').style.fontWeight = '700'; // Apply date font to issue and expire dates document.querySelector('.issue-date').style.fontFamily = dateFont.value; document.querySelector('.expiry-date').style.fontFamily = dateFont.value; document.querySelector('.issue-date').style.fontWeight = '700'; document.querySelector('.expiry-date').style.fontWeight = '700'; // Apply vertical text font const verticalTextElement = document.querySelector('.vertical-text'); if (verticalTextElement) { verticalTextElement.style.fontFamily = verticalTextFont.value; } } // Function to apply font color to all text elements function applyFontColor() { // Apply to all text elements const textElements = [ ...document.querySelectorAll('.info-label'), ...document.querySelectorAll('.info-value'), ...document.querySelectorAll('.issue-date'), ...document.querySelectorAll('.expiry-date'), ...document.querySelectorAll('.principal-signature'), ...document.querySelectorAll('.principal-signature + div') ]; textElements.forEach(el => { el.style.color = fontColor.value; }); // Apply to signature line document.querySelector('.signature-line').style.borderTopColor = fontColor.value; // Make labels bold document.querySelectorAll('.info-label').forEach(el => { el.style.fontWeight = '700'; }); // Make dates bold document.querySelectorAll('.issue-date, .expiry-date').forEach(el => { el.style.fontWeight = '700'; }); // Make principal signature bold document.querySelectorAll('.principal-signature').forEach(el => { el.style.fontWeight = '700'; }); // Apply vertical text color const verticalTextElement = document.querySelector('.vertical-text'); if (verticalTextElement) { verticalTextElement.style.color = verticalTextColor.value; } } // Function to update vertical text function updateVerticalText() { const verticalTextElement = document.querySelector('.vertical-text'); const verticalTextContainer = document.querySelector('.vertical-text-container'); if (!verticalTextElement) return; // Update text content verticalTextElement.textContent = verticalText.value || defaultValues.verticalText; // Update font verticalTextElement.style.fontFamily = verticalTextFont.value; // Update color verticalTextElement.style.color = verticalTextColor.value; // Update background color verticalTextContainer.style.backgroundColor = verticalTextBgColor.value; // Update font size let fontSize; switch(verticalTextSize.value) { case 'small': fontSize = '0.9rem'; break; case 'medium': fontSize = '1.2rem'; break; case 'large': fontSize = '1.5rem'; break; case 'xlarge': fontSize = '1.8rem'; break; default: fontSize = '1.2rem'; } verticalTextElement.style.fontSize = fontSize; // Show/hide vertical text if (showVerticalText.checked) { verticalTextContainer.style.display = 'flex'; } else { verticalTextContainer.style.display = 'none'; } // Make vertical text bold verticalTextElement.style.fontWeight = '700'; } // Update ID card preview function updateIdCard() { console.log("Updating ID Card..."); // Update card size if (cardSize.value === 'custom') { customSizeControls.style.display = 'block'; idCard.style.width = customWidth.value + 'px'; idCard.style.height = customHeight.value + 'px'; } else { customSizeControls.style.display = 'none'; if (cardSize.value === 'standard') { idCard.style.width = '350px'; idCard.style.height = '220px'; } else if (cardSize.value === 'credit') { idCard.style.width = '337px'; idCard.style.height = '212px'; } else if (cardSize.value === 'vertical') { idCard.style.width = '212px'; idCard.style.height = '337px'; } } // Update institute name document.querySelector('.institute-name').textContent = instituteName.value || defaultValues.instituteName; // Update student info const infoValues = document.querySelectorAll('.info-value'); if (infoValues.length >= 5) { infoValues[0].textContent = studentName.value || defaultValues.studentName; infoValues[1].textContent = studentId.value || defaultValues.studentId; infoValues[2].textContent = department.value || defaultValues.department; infoValues[3].textContent = batchYear.value || defaultValues.batchYear; infoValues[4].textContent = studentAddress.value || defaultValues.studentAddress; } // Update principal signature document.querySelector('.principal-signature').textContent = principalName.value || defaultValues.principalName; document.querySelector('.principal-signature + div').textContent = principalTitle.value || defaultValues.principalTitle; // Update dates const issueDateFormatted = formatDate(issueDate.value); const expiryDateFormatted = formatDate(expiryDate.value); document.querySelector('.issue-date').textContent = `Issued: ${issueDateFormatted}`; document.querySelector('.expiry-date').textContent = `Expires: ${expiryDateFormatted}`; // Update colors idCard.style.backgroundColor = backgroundColor.value; document.querySelector('.id-card-header').style.background = `linear-gradient(to right,
