onclick="toggleSection(this)"><span class="arrow">&#9660;</span> Card Design & Background</div> <div class="section-content"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Card Border Radius (px)</label> <input type="number" id="borderRadius" value="12" min="0" max="40" onchange="render()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Card Outline Style</label> <div class="outline-options"> <button class="outline-btn active" onclick="setOutline('none',this)">None</button> <button class="outline-btn" onclick="setOutline('solid',this)">Solid</button> <button class="outline-btn" onclick="setOutline('double',this)">Double</button> <button class="outline-btn" onclick="setOutline('dashed',this)">Dashed</button> <button class="outline-btn" onclick="setOutline('groove',this)">Groove</button> <button class="outline-btn" onclick="setOutline('ridge',this)">Ridge</button> <button class="outline-btn" onclick="setOutline('inset',this)">Inset</button> </div> </div> <div class="form-group" id="outlineColorGroup" style="display:none"> <label>Outline Color</label> <input type="color" id="outlineColor" value="#1a237e" onchange="render()"> </div> <div class="form-group" id="outlineWidthGroup" style="display:none"> <label>Outline Width (px)</label> <input type="number" id="outlineWidth" value="3" min="1" max="10" onchange="render()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Texture Overlay</label> <div class="texture-options"> <button class="texture-btn active" onclick="setTexture('none',this)" title="None" style="background:#eee;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;color:#999;">None</button> <button class="texture-btn" onclick="setTexture('dots',this)" title="Dots" style="background:radial-gradient(circle,#000 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:6px 6px;"></button> <button class="texture-btn" onclick="setTexture('lines',this)" title="Lines" style="background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,#000,#000 1px,transparent 1px,transparent 6px);"></button> <button class="texture-btn" onclick="setTexture('diagonal',this)" title="Diagonal" style="background:repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,#000,#000 1px,transparent 1px,transparent 6px);"></button> <button class="texture-btn" onclick="setTexture('crosshatch',this)" title="Crosshatch" style="background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,#000,#000 1px,transparent 1px,transparent 6px),repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,#000,#000 1px,transparent 1px,transparent 6px);"></button> <button class="texture-btn" onclick="setTexture('waves',this)" title="Waves" style="background:repeating-linear-gradient(135deg,#000,#000 1px,transparent 1px,transparent 8px);"></button> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Background Type</label> <div class="bg-type-btns"> <button class="bg-type-btn active" onclick="setBgType('solid',this)">Solid</button> <button class="bg-type-btn" onclick="setBgType('gradient',this)">Gradient</button> <button class="bg-type-btn" onclick="setBgType('image',this)">Image</button> </div> </div> <div class="bg-sub active" id="bgSolid"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Background Color</label> <input type="color" id="bgSolidColor" value="#ffffff" onchange="render()"> </div> </div> <div class="bg-sub" id="bgGradient"> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Color 1</label> <input type="color" id="bgGrad1" value="#e3f2fd" onchange="render()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Color 2</label> <input type="color" id="bgGrad2" value="#ffffff" onchange="render()"> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Gradient Direction (deg)</label> <input type="number" id="bgGradAngle" value="180" min="0" max="360" onchange="render()"> </div> </div> <div class="bg-sub" id="bgImage"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Background Image</label> <div class="file-upload-area" onclick="document.getElementById('bgImageUpload').click()"> Click to upload background image </div> <input type="file" id="bgImageUpload" accept="image/*" hidden onchange="handleBgImage(event)"> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- Download --> <div class="section" style="border-bottom:none;"> <button class="download-btn" onclick="downloadCard()">&#11015; Download ID Card as PNG</button> <p class="tip-text" style="text-align:center;margin-top:8px;">High-resolution export for printing or digital submission</p> </div> </div> <!-- PREVIEW --> <div class="preview-panel"> <div class="preview-label">Live Preview</div> <div class="id-card-wrapper"> <div class="id-card" id="idCard"></div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- html2canvas CDN --> <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js"></script> <script> // ---- FONT LIST ---- const fonts = [ 'Poppins','Roboto','Open Sans','Lato','Montserrat','Oswald', 'Raleway','Merriweather','Playfair Display','Source Code Pro', 'Nunito','Ubuntu','PT Serif','Libre Baskerville','Bitter' ]; // ---- FONT CONFIGS ---- const fontCfg = { instName: { family:'Poppins', size:14, color:'#1a237e', bold:true, italic:false }, subtitle: { family:'Poppins', size:10, color:'#555555', bold:false, italic:false }, studentName: { family:'Poppins', size:12, color:'#111111', bold:true, italic:false }, info: { family:'Poppins', size:9, color:'#222222', bold:false, italic:false }, infoLabel: { family:'Poppins', size:9, color:'#000000', bold:true, italic:false }, dates: { family:'Poppins', size:8, color:'#333333', bold:false, italic:false }, signature: { family:'Playfair Display', size:11, color:'#1a1a1a', bold:false, italic:true }, }; // ---- STATE ---- let logoDataUrl = null; let photoDataUrl = null; let bgImageDataUrl = null; let cardOutline = 'none'; let cardTexture = 'none'; let bgType = 'solid'; // ---- INIT FONT SELECTS ---- function initFontSelects() { const keys = ['instName','subtitle','studentName','info','infoLabel','dates','signature']; keys.forEach(key => { const sel = document.getElementById('fc_'+key+'_fam'); if (!sel) return; sel.innerHTML = ''; fonts.forEach(f => { const opt = document.createElement('option'); opt.value = f; opt.textContent = f; if (f === fontCfg[key].family) opt.selected = true; sel.appendChild(opt); }); }); } // ---- TOGGLE FUNCTIONS ---- function toggleSection(el) { el.classList.toggle('collapsed'); const content = el.nextElementSibling; content.classList.toggle('hidden'); } function toggleBold(key, btn) { fontCfg[key].bold = !fontCfg[key].bold; btn.classList.toggle('active'); render(); } function toggleItalic(key, btn) { fontCfg[key].italic = !fontCfg[key].italic; btn.classList.toggle('active'); render(); } // ---- SIZE ---- function setSize(w, h, btn) { document.querySelectorAll('.size-preset-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('cardWidth').value = w; document.getElementById('cardHeight').value = h; updateCardSize(); } function updateCardSize() { render(); } // ---- FILE HANDLERS ---- function readFile(input, cb) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = e => cb(e.target.result); reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function handleLogo(e) { readFile(e.target, d => { logoDataUrl = d; render(); }); } function handlePhoto(e) { readFile(e.target, d => { photoDataUrl = d; render(); }); } function handleBgImage(e) { readFile(e.target, d => { bgImageDataUrl = d; render(); }); } // ---- OUTLINE ---- function setOutline(type, btn) { document.querySelectorAll('.outline-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); cardOutline = type; document.getElementById('outlineColorGroup').style.display = type==='none'?'none':'block'; document.getElementById('outlineWidthGroup').style.display = type==='none'?'none':'block'; render(); } // ---- TEXTURE ---- function setTexture(type, btn) { document.querySelectorAll('.texture-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); cardTexture = type; render(); } // ---- BACKGROUND ---- function setBgType(type, btn) { document.querySelectorAll('.bg-type-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); bgType = type; document.querySelectorAll('.bg-sub').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active')); document.getElementById('bg' + type.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+type.slice(1)).classList.add('active'); render(); } // ---- TEXTURE SVG ---- function getTextureSvg() { const textures = { none: '', dots: `<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='8' height='8'><circle cx='4' cy='4' r='1' fill='#000'/></svg>`, lines: `<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='8' height='8'><line x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='8' stroke='#000' stroke-width='0.8'/></svg>`, diagonal: `<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='8' height='8'><line x1='0' y1='8' x2='8' y2='0' stroke='#000' stroke-width='0.7'/></svg>`, crosshatch: `<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='8' height='8'><line x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='8' stroke='#000' stroke-width='0.5'/><line x1='0' y1='0' x2='8' y2='0' stroke='#000' stroke-width='0.5'/></svg>`, waves: `<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='20' height='10'><path d='M0 5 Q5 0 10 5 T20 5' fill='none' stroke='#000' stroke-width='0.5'/></svg>`, }; return textures[cardTexture] || ''; } // ---- HELPER: font style string ---- function fs(key) { const c = fontCfg[key]; return `font-family:'${c.family}',sans-serif; font-size:${c.size}px; color:${c.color}; font-weight:${c.bold?'700':'400'}; font-style:${c.italic?'italic':'normal'};`; } // ---- FORMAT DATE ---- function fmtDate(val) { if (!val) return '—'; const d = new Date(val); return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year:'numeric', month:'short', day:'numeric' }); } // ---- RENDER ---- function render() { const card = document.getElementById('idCard'); const w = parseInt(document.getElementById('cardWidth').value) || 340; const h = parseInt(document.getElementById('cardHeight').value) || 215; const br = parseInt(document.getElementById('borderRadius').value) || 0; // Background let bgStyle = ''; if (bgType === 'solid') { bgStyle = `background:${document.getElementById('bgSolidColor').value};`; } else if (bgType === 'gradient') { const g1 = document.getElementById('bgGrad1').value; const g2 = document.getElementById('bgGrad2').value; const angle = document.getElementById('bgGradAngle').value; bgStyle = `background:linear-gradient(${angle}deg, ${g1}, ${g2});`; } else { bgStyle = `background:#fff;`; } // Outline let outlineStyle = ''; if (cardOutline !== 'none') { const oc = document.getElementById('outlineColor').value; const ow = document.getElementById('outlineWidth').value; outlineStyle = `border:${ow}px ${cardOutline} ${oc};`; } // Texture let textureHtml = ''; if (cardTexture !== 'none') { const svg = getTextureSvg(); const encoded = btoa(svg); textureHtml = `<div class="card-texture-overlay" style="background:url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,${encoded}');background-repeat:repeat;"></div>`; } // BG Image let bgImgHtml = ''; if (bgType === 'image' && bgImageDataUrl) { bgImgHtml = `<img class="card-bg-image" src="${bgImageDataUrl}" alt="">`; } // Logo let logoHtml = logoDataUrl ? `<img class="card-logo" src="${logoDataUrl}" alt="Logo">` : `<div class="card-logo-placeholder">Logo</div>`; // Photo let photoHtml = photoDataUrl ? `<img class="card-photo" src="${photoDataUrl}" alt="Photo">` : `<div class="card-photo-placeholder">Photo</div>`; // Values const instName = document.getElementById('instName').value || ''; const subtitle = document.getElementById('subtitle').value || ''; const studentName = document.getElementById('studentName').value || ''; const studentId = document.getElementById('studentId').value || ''; const department = document.getElementById('department').value || ''; const session = document.getElementById('session').value || ''; const bloodGroup = document.getElementById('bloodGroup').value || ''; const dob = document.getElementById('dob').value || ''; const address = document.getElementById('address').value || ''; const issueDate = document.getElementById('issueDate').value || ''; const expiryDate = document.getElementById('expiryDate').value || ''; const sigName = document.getElementById('sigName').value || ''; const sigTitle = document.getElementById('sigTitle').value || ''; card.style.width = w + 'px'; card.style.height = h + 'px'; card.style.borderRadius = br + 'px'; card.setAttribute('style', `width:${w}px; height:${h}px; border-radius:${br}px; ${bgStyle} ${outlineStyle} box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);`); let infoRows = ''; const addRow = (label, value) => { if (value) { infoRows += `<div class="card-info-row"> <span class="card-info-label" style="${fs('infoLabel')}">${label}:</span> <span class="card-info-value" style="${fs('info')}">${value}</span> </div>`; } }; addRow('ID No', studentId); addRow('Dept', department); addRow('Session', session); addRow('Blood', bloodGroup); addRow('DOB', fmtDate(dob)); addRow('Address', address); card.innerHTML = ` ${bgImgHtml} ${textureHtml} <div class="card-content"> <div class="card-header"> ${logoHtml} <div class="card-institution-name" style="${fs('instName')}">${instName}</div> </div> <div class="card-subtitle" style="${fs('subtitle')}">${subtitle}</div> <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;width:100%;align-items:flex-start;"> <div class="card-photo-section">${photoHtml}</div> <div class="card-info-table" style="flex:1;"> <div class="card-info-row" style="margin-bottom:5px;"> <span style="${fs('studentName')}">${studentName}</span> </div> ${infoRows} </div> </div> <div class="card-dates"> <div class="card-date-item"> <div class="card-date-label" style="${fs('dates')}font-weight:700;">Issue Date</div> <div style="${fs('dates')}">${fmtDate(issueDate)}</div> </div> <div class="card-date-item"> <div class="card-date-label" style="${fs('dates')}font-weight:700;">Expiry Date</div> <div style="${fs('dates')}">${fmtDate(expiryDate)}</div> </div> </div> <div class="card-signature-area"> <div class="card-signature-name" style="${fs('signature')}">${sigName}</div> <div class="card-signature-line">${sigTitle}</div> </div> </div> `; } // ---- DOWNLOAD ---- function downloadCard() { const card = document.getElementById('idCard'); html2canvas(card, { scale: 3, useCORS: true, backgroundColor: null, logging: false, }).then(canvas => { const link = document.createElement('a'); link.download = 'student-id-card.png'; link.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); link.click(); }).catch(err => { alert('Download failed. Please try again.'); console.error(err); }); } // ---- INIT ---- initFontSelects(); render(); </script> </body> </html> <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title>Student ID Card Generator</title> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Syne:wght@400;700;800&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@300;400;600&family=Oswald:wght@300;400;600&family=Raleway:wght@300;400;700&family=Lora:wght@400;600;700&family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;600;700&family=Dancing+Script:wght@400;700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Bitter:wght@400;700&family=Exo+2:wght@300;400;700&family=Nunito:wght@300;400;700&family=Poppins:wght@300;400;600;700&family=Cinzel:wght@400;700&family=Josefin+Sans:wght@300;400;700&family=Abril+Fatface&family=Anton&family=Righteous&family=Satisfy&family=Pacifico&family=Merriweather:wght@300;400;700&family=EB+Garamond:wght@400;700&family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;700&family=Titillium+Web:wght@300;400;700&family=Ubuntu:wght@300;400;700&family=Zilla+Slab:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js"></script> <style> :root { --bg: #0d0f14; --surface: #13161e; --surface2: #1a1e2a; --border: #2a2f40; --accent: #4f8ef7; --accent2: #a78bfa; --text: #e8eaf0; --text-muted: #7880a0; --success: #34d399; } * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } header { background: var(--surface); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 18px 32px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; } .logo-icon { width: 38px; height: 38px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2)); border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 18px; } header h1 { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.5px; } header p { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 1px; } .app-body { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .sidebar { width: 370px; min-width: 330px; background: var(--surface); border-right: 1px solid var(--border); overflow-y: auto; padding-bottom: 40px; } .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 5px; } .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border); border-radius: 10px; } .section { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); } .section-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 14px 20px; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; background: var(--surface); transition: background 0.2s; } .section-header:hover { background: var(--surface2); } .section-title { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent); } .section-toggle { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.8rem; transition: transform 0.3s; } .section.open .section-toggle { transform: rotate(180deg); } .section-body { display: none; padding: 16px 20px; background: var(--surface2); gap: 12px; flex-direction: column; } .section.open .section-body { display: flex; } label { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-muted); display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; } input[type="text"], input[type="date"], input[type="number"], select { width: 100%; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 7px; color: var(--text); padding: 8px 11px; font-size: 0.83rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; } input:focus, select:focus { border-color: var(--accent); } .row2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; } .row3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; } .btn { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2)); border: none; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; padding: 9px 16px; font-size: 0.82rem; font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.1s; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; } .btn:hover { opacity: 0.88; } .btn:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .btn:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } .btn-outline { background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-muted); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 400; } .btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); } .btn-sm { padding: 5px 10px; font-size: 0.72rem; } .btn-danger { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ef4444, #dc2626); } input[type="color"] { width: 36px; height: 36px; padding: 2px; border-radius: 7px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); } .color-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .color-row input[type="text"] { flex: 1; } .upload-area { border: 2px dashed var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s; position: relative; } .upload-area:hover { border-color: var(--accent); } .upload-area input[type="file"] { position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0; cursor: pointer; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .upload-area .upload-icon { font-size: 1.4rem; margin-bottom: 4px; } .upload-area p { font-size: 0.76rem; color: var(--text-muted); } .uploaded-name { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--success); margin-top: 4px; display: none; } .size-presets { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .preset-btn { background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.72rem; padding: 5px 9px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .preset-btn:hover, .preset-btn.active { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); background: rgba(79,142,247,0.08); } .texture-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 6px; } .texture-opt { aspect-ratio: 1.6; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.2s; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } .texture-opt:hover, .texture-opt.active { border-color: var(--accent); } .texture-opt canvas { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; } .texture-opt span { font-size: 0.58rem; color: #fff; position: absolute; bottom: 2px; left: 0; right: 0; text-align: center; text-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,1); font-weight: 700; } .outline-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 6px; } .outline-opt { height: 36px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid var(--border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--text-muted); transition: all 0.2s; background: var(--bg); } .outline-opt:hover, .outline-opt.active { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); } .font-style-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; } .style-btn { background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; color: var(--text-muted); width: 34px; height: 34px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.9rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 0.2s; } .style-btn:hover, .style-btn.active { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); background: rgba(79,142,247,0.1); } input[type="range"] { width: 100%; accent-color: var(--accent); } .preview-area { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start; padding: 36px 32px; gap: 20px; overflow-y: auto; background: var(--bg); } .preview-label { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-muted); align-self: flex-start; } #card-wrapper { filter: drop-shadow(0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.65)); } /* THE CARD */ #id-card { position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .card-bg-layer { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0; } #card-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1; display: none; } /* Texture canvas sits above bg layers, below content */ #card-texture-canvas { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 2; pointer-events: none; } .card-content { position: relative; z-index: 3; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; padding: 18px 18px 14px; } .card-header { text-align: center; width: 100%; } .card-logo-wrap { margin-bottom: 5px; } #card-logo-img { max-height: 48px; max-width: 100%; object-fit: contain; display: none; } #card-logo-placeholder { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 auto; font-size: 0.56rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); } #card-inst-name { font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; text-align: center; } #card-subtitle { text-align: center; margin-top: 2px; } #card-id-label { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 30px; padding: 2px 12px; font-size: 0.58rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); margin: 6px auto 7px; display: inline-block; } .card-body { display: flex; gap: 12px; width: 100%; align-items: flex-start; } #card-photo-img { object-fit: cover; border-radius: 6px; display: none; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); flex-shrink: 0; } #card-photo-placeholder { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 2px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); font-size: 0.56rem; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; flex-shrink: 0; } .card-info { flex: 1; } .card-field { margin-bottom: 5px; } .field-label { font-size: 0.52rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; opacity: 0.6; } .field-value { font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; } .card-footer { width: 100%; margin-top: auto; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); padding-top: 7px; } .sig-block { text-align: center; } #sig-line { width: 70px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-bottom: 3px; } .sig-name { font-size: 0.57rem; opacity: 0.75; } .download-bar { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .tag { background: rgba(79,142,247,0.15); color: var(--accent); font-size: 0.68rem; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 20px; } </style> </head> <body> <header> <div class="logo-icon">🪪</div> <div> <h1>Student ID Card Generator</h1> <p>Design, customize &amp; download professional student ID cards</p> </div> </header> <div class="app-body"> <div class="sidebar"> <!-- SIZE --> <div class="section open" id="sec-size"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-size')"><span class="section-title">📐 Card Size</span><span class="section-toggle">▼</span></div> <div class="section-body"> <div class="size-presets"> <button class="preset-btn active" onclick="applyPreset(this,320,200)">CR80</button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(this,340,215)">ID-1</button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(this,280,178)">Compact</button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(this,380,240)">Large</button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(this,420,265)">XL</button> </div> <div class="row2"> <div><label>Width (px)</label><input type="number" id="card-w" value="320" min="220" max="600" oninput="updateCardSize()"></div> <div><label>Height (px)</label><input type="number" id="card-h" value="200" min="140" max="420" oninput="updateCardSize()"></div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- INSTITUTION --> <div class="section open" id="sec-inst"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-inst')"><span class="section-title">🏫 Institution</span><span class="section-toggle">▼</span></div> <div class="section-body"> <div><label>Logo</label> <div class="upload-area"><input type="file" id="logo-upload" accept="image/*" onchange="handleLogoUpload(event)"><div class="upload-icon">🖼️</div><p>Click to upload logo</p><div class="uploaded-name" id="logo-name"></div></div> </div> <div><label>Institution Name</label><input type="text" id="inst-name" value="Springfield University" oninput="updateCard()"></div> <div class="row3"> <div><label>Font</label> <select id="inst-name-font" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="'Syne',sans-serif" selected>Syne</option> <option value="'Cinzel',serif">Cinzel</option> <option value="'Playfair Display',serif">Playfair</option> <option value="'Abril Fatface',cursive">Abril Fatface</option> <option value="'Anton',sans-serif">Anton</option> <option value="'Bebas Neue',cursive">Bebas Neue</option> <option value="'Righteous',cursive">Righteous</option> <option value="'Oswald',sans-serif">Oswald</option> <option value="'Josefin Sans',sans-serif">Josefin Sans</option> <option value="'Montserrat',sans-serif">Montserrat</option> <option value="'Raleway',sans-serif">Raleway</option> <option value="'Poppins',sans-serif">Poppins</option> <option value="'Titillium Web',sans-serif">Titillium</option> <option value="'Ubuntu',sans-serif">Ubuntu</option> <option value="'Cormorant Garamond',serif">Cormorant</option> <option value="'EB Garamond',serif">EB Garamond</option> <option value="'Merriweather',serif">Merriweather</option> <option value="'Lora',serif">Lora</option> <option value="'Zilla Slab',serif">Zilla Slab</option> <option value="'Exo 2',sans-serif">Exo 2</option> <option value="'Space Mono',monospace">Space Mono</option> </select> </div> <div><label>Size</label><input type="number" id="inst-name-size" value="13" min="8" max="30" oninput="updateCard()"></div> <div><label>Style</label> <div class="font-style-row"> <button class="style-btn active" id="inst-bold" onclick="toggleStyle('inst-bold')"><b>B</b></button> <button class="style-btn" id="inst-italic" onclick="toggleStyle('inst-italic')"><i>I</i></button> </div> </div> </div> <div><label>Color</label> <div class="color-row"> <input type="color" id="inst-name-color" value="#ffffff" oninput="syncHex('inst-name-color','inst-name-color-hex');updateCard()"> <input type="text" id="inst-name-color-hex" value="#ffffff" maxlength="7" oninput="syncPicker('inst-name-color','inst-name-color-hex');updateCard()"> </div> </div> <div><label>Subtitle (centered, below name)</label><input type="text" id="subtitle" value="Department of Computer Science" oninput="updateCard()"></div> <div class="row3"> <div><label>Font</label> <select id="subtitle-font" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="'DM Sans',sans-serif" selected>DM Sans</option> <option value="'Nunito',sans-serif">Nunito</option> <option value="'Quicksand',sans-serif">Quicksand</option> <option value="'Raleway',sans-serif">Raleway</option> <option value="'Poppins',sans-serif">Poppins</option> <option value="'Montserrat',sans-serif">Montserrat</option> <option value="'Josefin Sans',sans-serif">Josefin</option> <option value="'Ubuntu',sans-serif">Ubuntu</option> <option value="'Lora',serif">Lora</option> <option value="'Space Mono',monospace">Mono</option> </select> </div> <div><label>Size</label><input type="number" id="subtitle-size" value="8" min="6" max="18" oninput="updateCard()"></div> <div><label>Style</label> <div class="font-style-row"> <button class="style-btn" id="sub-bold" onclick="toggleStyle('sub-bold')"><b>B</b></button> <button class="style-btn" id="sub-italic" onclick="toggleStyle('sub-italic')"><i>I</i></button> </div> </div> </div> <div><label>Color</label> <div class="color-row"> <input type="color" id="subtitle-color" value="#dde8ff" oninput="syncHex('subtitle-color','subtitle-color-hex');updateCard()"> <input type="text" id="subtitle-color-hex" value="#dde8ff" maxlength="7" oninput="syncPicker('subtitle-color','subtitle-color-hex');updateCard()"> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- STUDENT INFO --> <div class="section open" id="sec-student"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-student')"><span class="section-title">🎓 Student Info</span><span class="section-toggle">▼</span></div> <div class="section-body"> <div><label>Student Photo (optional)</label> <div class="upload-area"><input type="file" id="photo-upload" accept="image/*" onchange="handlePhotoUpload(event)"><div class="upload-icon">📷</div><p>Click to upload photo</p><div class="uploaded-name" id="photo-name"></div></div> <button class="btn btn-outline btn-sm btn-danger" style="margin-top:6px" onclick="clearPhoto()">✕ Remove Photo</button> </div> <div><label>Full Name</label><input type="text" id="student-name" value="John Alexander Smith" oninput="updateCard()"></div> <div class="row3"> <div><label>Font</label> <select id="student-name-font" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="'DM Sans',sans-serif" selected>DM Sans</option> <option value="'Syne',sans-serif">Syne</option> <option value="'Poppins',sans-serif">Poppins</option> <option value="'Montserrat',sans-serif">Montserrat</option> <option value="'Raleway',sans-serif">Raleway</option> <option value="'Quicksand',sans-serif">Quicksand</option> <option value="'Nunito',sans-serif">Nunito</option> <option value="'Ubuntu',sans-serif">Ubuntu</option> <option value="'Lora',serif">Lora</option> <option value="'Merriweather',serif">Merriweather</option> <option value="'Playfair Display',serif">Playfair</option> <option value="'Dancing Script',cursive">Dancing Script</option> <option value="'Satisfy',cursive">Satisfy</option> <option value="'Pacifico',cursive">Pacifico</option> <option value="'Space Mono',monospace">Space Mono</option> </select> </div> <div><label>Size</label><input type="number" id="student-name-size" value="11" min="7" max="24" oninput="updateCard()"></div> <div><label>Style</label> <div class="font-style-row"> <button class="style-btn active" id="sname-bold" onclick="toggleStyle('sname-bold')"><b>B</b></button> <button class="style-btn" id="sname-italic" onclick="toggleStyle('sname-italic')"><i>I</i></button> </div> </div> </div> <div><label>Name Color</label> <div class="color-row"> <input type="color" id="student-name-color" value="#ffffff" oninput="syncHex('student-name-color','student-name-color-hex');updateCard()"> <input type="text" id="student-name-color-hex" value="#ffffff" maxlength="7" oninput="syncPicker('student-name-color','student-name-color-hex');updateCard()"> </div> </div> <div class="row2"> <div><label>Student ID</label><input type="text" id="student-id" value="CS-2024-0042" oninput="updateCard()"></div> <div><label>Class / Year</label><input type="text" id="student-class" value="4th Year" oninput="updateCard()"></div> </div> <div><label>Address</label><input type="text" id="student-address" value="123 Campus Road, Springfield" oninput="updateCard()"></div> <div class="row2"> <div><label>Issue Date</label><input type="date" id="issue-date" value="2024-01-15" oninput="updateCard()"></div> <div><label>Expiry Date</label><input type="date" id="exp-date" value="2025-12-31" oninput="updateCard()"></div> </div> <div><label>Fields Font</label> <select id="fields-font" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="'DM Sans',sans-serif" selected>DM Sans</option> <option value="'Nunito',sans-serif">Nunito</option> <option value="'Quicksand',sans-serif">Quicksand</option> <option value="'Poppins',sans-serif">Poppins</option> <option value="'Montserrat',sans-serif">Montserrat</option> <option value="'Raleway',sans-serif">Raleway</option> <option value="'Ubuntu',sans-serif">Ubuntu</option> <option value="'Titillium Web',sans-serif">Titillium</option> <option value="'Space Mono',monospace">Space Mono</option> <option value="'Lora',serif">Lora</option> <option value="'Bitter',serif">Bitter</option> </select> </div> <div class="row2"> <div><label>Fields Size</label><input type="number" id="fields-size" value="8" min="6" max="16" oninput="updateCard()"></div> <div><label>Fields Color</label> <div class="color-row" style="margin-top:5px"> <input type="color" id="fields-color" value="#ffffff" oninput="syncHex('fields-color','fields-color-hex');updateCard()"> <input type="text" id="fields-color-hex" value="#ffffff" maxlength="7" oninput="syncPicker('fields-color','fields-color-hex');updateCard()"> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- SIGNATURE --> <div class="section" id="sec-sig"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-sig')"><span class="section-title">✒️ Signature</span><span class="section-toggle">▼</span></div> <div class="section-body"> <div><label>Signatory Name</label><input type="text" id="sig-name" value="Dr. Robert Williams" oninput="updateCard()"></div> <div><label>Signatory Title</label><input type="text" id="sig-title" value="Principal" oninput="updateCard()"></div> <div><label>Color</label> <div class="color-row"> <input type="color" id="sig-color" value="#ffffff" oninput="syncHex('sig-color','sig-color-hex');updateCard()"> <input type="text" id="sig-color-hex" value="#ffffff" maxlength="7" oninput="syncPicker('sig-color','sig-color-hex');updateCard()"> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- BACKGROUND --> <div class="section" id="sec-bg"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-bg')"><span class="section-title">🎨 Background</span><span class="section-toggle">▼</span></div> <div class="section-body"> <div><label>Type</label> <select id="bg-type" onchange="updateBg()"> <option value="gradient">Gradient</option> <option value="solid">Solid Color</option> <option value="image">Image Upload</option> </select> </div> <div id="bg-solid-row" style="display:none"> <label>Color</label> <div class="color-row"> <input type="color" id="bg-solid-color" value="#1a2a6c" oninput="syncHex('bg-solid-color','bg-solid-hex');updateBg()"> <input type="text" id="bg-solid-hex" value="#1a2a6c" maxlength="7" oninput="syncPicker('bg-solid-color','bg-solid-hex');updateBg()"> </div> </div> <div id="bg-gradient-row"> <div class="row2"> <div><label>Color 1</label> <div class="color-row"> <input type="color" id="grad1" value="#1a2a6c" oninput="syncHex('grad1','grad1-hex');updateBg()"> <input type="text" id="grad1-hex" value="#1a2a6c" maxlength="7" oninput="syncPicker('grad1','grad1-hex');updateBg()"> </div> </div> <div><label>Color 2</label> <div class="color-row"> <input type="color" id="grad2" value="#b21f1f" oninput="syncHex('grad2','grad2-hex');updateBg()"> <input type="text" id="grad2-hex" value="#b21f1f" maxlength="7" oninput="syncPicker('grad2','grad2-hex');updateBg()"> </div> </div> </div> <div><label>Color 3</label> <div class="color-row"> <input type="color" id="grad3" value="#fdbb2d" oninput="syncHex('grad3','grad3-hex');updateBg()"> <input type="text" id="grad3-hex" value="#fdbb2d" maxlength="7" oninput="syncPicker('grad3','grad3-hex');updateBg()"> </div> </div> <div><label>Direction</label> <select id="grad-dir" onchange="updateBg()"> <option value="135deg">Diagonal ↘</option> <option value="90deg">Horizontal →</option> <option value="180deg">Vertical ↓</option> <option value="45deg">Diagonal ↗</option> <option value="circle">Radial</option> </select> </div> </div> <div id="bg-image-row" style="display:none"> <div class="upload-area"><input type="file" id="bg-upload" accept="image/*" onchange="handleBgUpload(event)"><div class="upload-icon">🖼️</div><p>Upload background image</p><div class="uploaded-name" id="bg-name"></div></div> <div style="margin-top:8px"><label>Dark Overlay: <span id="overlay-val">0.30</span></label> <input type="range" id="bg-overlay" min="0" max="0.85" step="0.05" value="0.3" oninput="document.getElementById('overlay-val').textContent=parseFloat(this.value).toFixed(2);updateBg()"> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- TEXTURE & OUTLINE --> <div class="section" id="sec-tex"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-tex')"><span class="section-title">✨ Texture & Outline</span><span class="section-toggle">▼</span></div> <div class="section-body"> <div> <label>Texture <span style="color:var(--success);font-size:0.68rem">✓ visible in download</span></label> <div class="texture-grid" id="texture-grid"></div> </div> <div><label>Texture Opacity</label> <input type="range" id="texture-opacity" min="0.05" max="1" step="0.05" value="0.35" oninput="drawTexture()"> </div> <div><label>Card Outline</label> <div class="outline-grid"> <div class="outline-opt active" data-o="none" onclick="setOutline(this)">None</div> <div class="outline-opt" data-o="solid" onclick="setOutline(this)" style="border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">Solid</div> <div class="outline-opt" data-o="double" onclick="setOutline(this)" style="border:4px double rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">Double</div> <div class="outline-opt" data-o="dashed" onclick="setOutline(this)" style="border:2px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.4)">Dashed</div> <div class="outline-opt" data-o="groove" onclick="setOutline(this)" style="border:4px groove rgba(255,255,255,0.4)">Groove</div> <div class="outline-opt" data-o="glow" onclick="setOutline(this)" style="box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(79,142,247,0.8)">Glow</div> </div> </div> <div><label>Corner Radius (px)</label><input type="number" id="card-radius" value="12" min="0" max="40" oninput="updateCard()"></div> </div> </div> </div><!-- end sidebar --> <!-- PREVIEW --> <div class="preview-area"> <div class="preview-label">Live Preview</div> <div id="card-wrapper"> <div id="id-card"> <div class="card-bg-layer" id="card-bg-layer"></div> <div id="card-overlay"></div> <canvas id="card-texture-canvas"></canvas> <div class="card-content"> <div class="card-header"> <div class="card-logo-wrap"> <img id="card-logo-img" src="" alt="Logo"> <div id="card-logo-placeholder">LOGO</div> </div> <div id="card-inst-name"></div> <div id="card-subtitle"></div> <div id="card-id-label">STUDENT IDENTITY CARD</div> </div> <div class="card-body"> <img id="card-photo-img" src="" alt="Photo"> <div id="card-photo-placeholder"><span style="font-size:1.1rem">👤</span><span>Photo</span></div> <div class="card-info"> <div class="card-field"><div class="field-label">Student Name</div><div class="field-value" id="cf-name"></div></div> <div class="card-field"><div class="field-label">Student ID</div><div class="field-value" id="cf-id"></div></div> <div class="card-field"><div class="field-label">Class / Year</div><div class="field-value" id="cf-class"></div></div> <div class="card-field"><div class="field-label">Address</div><div class="field-value" id="cf-addr"></div></div> <div class="row2" style="gap:8px;margin-top:3px"> <div class="card-field"><div class="field-label">Issue Date</div><div class="field-value" id="cf-issue"></div></div> <div class="card-field"><div class="field-label">Expiry Date</div><div class="field-value" id="cf-exp"></div></div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="card-footer"> <div class="sig-block"> <div id="sig-line" style="width:70px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin-bottom:3px"></div> <div class="sig-name" id="cf-sig"></div> <div class="sig-name" id="cf-sig-title" style="font-size:0.52rem;opacity:0.5"></div> </div> <div style="font-size:0.52rem;opacity:0.45;text-align:right"> <div>Property of</div> <div id="cf-inst-mini"></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="download-bar"> <button class="btn" id="btn-png" onclick="downloadCard('png')">⬇ Download PNG</button> <button class="btn btn-outline" id="btn-jpg" onclick="downloadCard('jpeg')">⬇ Download JPG</button> </div> <div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);text-align:center;max-width:420px;line-height:1.7"> <span class="tag">GitHub Student Pack Ready</span>&nbsp; Use a clear photo and accurate institutional details for approval. </div> </div> </div> <script> // ============================================================= // TEXTURES — all drawn via Canvas API (html2canvas captures them correctly) // ============================================================= const TEXTURES = [ { key:'none', label:'None', draw: null }, { key:'dots', label:'Dots', draw:(ctx,w,h,op)=>{ ctx.globalAlpha=op; ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.9)'; for(let x=6;x<w;x+=12) for(let y=6;y<h;y+=12){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,1,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();} }}, { key:'lines', label:'Lines', draw:(ctx,w,h,op)=>{ ctx.globalAlpha=op; ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.85)'; ctx.lineWidth=0.6; for(let y=0;y<h+8;y+=8){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(w,y);ctx.stroke();} }}, { key:'grid', label:'Grid', draw:(ctx,w,h,op)=>{ ctx.globalAlpha=op; ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.8)'; ctx.lineWidth=0.5; for(let x=0;x<w+14;x+=14){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,0);ctx.lineTo(x,h);ctx.stroke();} for(let y=0;y<h+14;y+=14){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(w,y);ctx.stroke();} }}, { key:'diag', label:'Diagonal', draw:(ctx,w,h,op)=>{ ctx.globalAlpha=op; ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.75)'; ctx.lineWidth=0.6; for(let i=-(h+10);i<w+h;i+=10){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(i,0);ctx.lineTo(i+h,h);ctx.stroke();} }}, { key:'crosshatch',label:'Cross', draw:(ctx,w,h,op)=>{ ctx.globalAlpha=op; ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.65)'; ctx.lineWidth=0.5; const s=10; for(let i=-(h+s);i<w+h;i+=s){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(i,0);ctx.lineTo(i+h,h);ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(i,h);ctx.lineTo(i+h,0);ctx.stroke();} }}, { key:'wave', label:'Wave', draw:(ctx,w,h,op)=>{ ctx.globalAlpha=op; ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.8)'; ctx.lineWidth=0.7; for(let y=10;y<h+14;y+=14){ctx.beginPath(); for(let x=0;x<=w;x+=2) ctx.lineTo(x, y+Math.sin(x/10)*4); ctx.stroke();} }}, { key:'hex', label:'Hex', draw:(ctx,w,h,op)=>{ ctx.globalAlpha=op; ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.6)'; ctx.lineWidth=0.6; const s=13,hx=s*Math.sqrt(3); for(let row=0;row*s*1.5<h+s;row++) for(let col=-1;col*hx<w+hx;col++){const x=col*hx+(row%2)*hx/2,y=row*s*1.5; ctx.beginPath(); for(let i=0;i<6;i++){const a=Math.PI/180*(60*i-30);ctx.lineTo(x+s*Math.cos(a),y+s*Math.sin(a));} ctx.closePath();ctx.stroke();} }}, { key:'noise', label:'Noise', draw:(ctx,w,h,op)=>{ const id=ctx.createImageData(w,h); for(let i=0;i<id.data.length;i+=4){const v=Math.random()*255;id.data[i]=id.data[i+1]=id.data[i+2]=v;id.data[i+3]=Math.round(op*80);} ctx.putImageData(id,0,0); }}, { key:'carbon', label:'Carbon', draw:(ctx,w,h,op)=>{ ctx.globalAlpha=op; for(let x=0;x<w;x+=10) for(let y=0;y<h;y+=10){ctx.fillStyle=((Math.floor(x/10)+Math.floor(y/10))%2===0)?'rgba(255,255,255,0.18)':'rgba(0,0,0,0.12)';ctx.fillRect(x,y,10,10);} }}, { key:'tri', label:'Triangle', draw:(ctx,w,h,op)=>{ ctx.globalAlpha=op; ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.55)'; ctx.lineWidth=0.5; const s=18; for(let row=0;row*s<h+s;row++) for(let col=-1;col*s<w+s;col++){const x=col*s+(row%2)*s/2,y=row*s; ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,y);ctx.lineTo(x+s/2,y+s);ctx.lineTo(x-s/2,y+s);ctx.closePath();ctx.stroke();} }}, { key:'brick', label:'Brick', draw:(ctx,w,h,op)=>{ ctx.globalAlpha=op; ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.5)'; ctx.lineWidth=0.6; const bw=20,bh=10; for(let row=0;row*bh<h+bh;row++){const off=(row%2)*bw/2; for(let col=-1;col*bw<w+bw;col++) ctx.strokeRect(col*bw+off,row*bh,bw,bh);} }}, ]; let currentTexture = 'none'; function buildTextureGrid() { const grid = document.getElementById('texture-grid'); grid.innerHTML = ''; TEXTURES.forEach(t => { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'texture-opt' + (t.key==='none' ? ' active' : ''); div.dataset.key = t.key; div.onclick = () => selectTexture(t.key, div); const c = document.createElement('canvas'); c.width = 64; c.height = 40; const ctx = c.getContext('2d'); ctx.fillStyle = '#1a3460'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,64,40); if (t.draw) t.draw(ctx, 64, 40, 0.65); div.appendChild(c); const span = document.createElement('span'); span.textContent = t.label; div.appendChild(span); grid.appendChild(div); }); } function selectTexture(key, el) { document.querySelectorAll('#texture-grid .texture-opt').forEach(e => e.classList.remove('active')); el.classList.add('active'); currentTexture = key; drawTexture(); } function drawTexture() { const card = document.getElementById('id-card'); const tc = document.getElementById('card-texture-canvas'); const w = card.offsetWidth, h = card.offsetHeight; tc.width = w; tc.height = h; tc.style.width = w + 'px'; tc.style.height = h + 'px'; const ctx = tc.getContext('2d'); ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h); const t = TEXTURES.find(x => x.key === currentTexture); const op = parseFloat(document.getElementById('texture-opacity').value); if (t && t.draw) { ctx.save(); t.draw(ctx, w, h, op); ctx.restore(); } } // ============================================================= // OUTLINE // ============================================================= const OUTLINE_STYLES = { none: {border:'none', boxShadow:'none'}, solid: {border:'3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.75)', boxShadow:'none'}, double: {border:'5px double rgba(255,255,255,0.75)', boxShadow:'none'}, dashed: {border:'3px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.55)', boxShadow:'none'}, groove: {border:'4px groove rgba(255,255,255,0.6)', boxShadow:'none'}, glow: {border:'none', boxShadow:'0 0 0 3px rgba(79,142,247,0.9), 0 0 22px rgba(79,142,247,0.35)'}, }; function setOutline(el) { document.querySelectorAll('.outline-opt').forEach(e => e.classList.remove('active')); el.classList.add('active'); const s = OUTLINE_STYLES[el.dataset.o] || OUTLINE_STYLES.none; const card = document.getElementById('id-card'); card.style.border = s.border; card.style.boxShadow = s.boxShadow; } // ============================================================= // SECTION TOGGLE // ============================================================= function toggleSection(id) { document.getElementById(id).classList.toggle('open'); } // ============================================================= // SIZE // ============================================================= function applyPreset(btn, w, h) { document.querySelectorAll('.preset-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('card-w').value = w; document.getElementById('card-h').value = h; updateCardSize(); } function updateCardSize() { const w = Math.max(220, parseInt(document.getElementById('card-w').value) || 320); const h = Math.max(140, parseInt(document.getElementById('card-h').value) || 200); const card = document.getElementById('id-card'); card.style.width = w + 'px'; card.style.height = h + 'px'; const pw = Math.round(w * 0.22), ph = Math.round(pw * 1.25); ['card-photo-img','card-photo-placeholder'].forEach(id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); el.style.width = pw + 'px'; el.style.height = ph + 'px'; }); setTimeout(drawTexture, 10); updateCard(); } // ============================================================= // STYLE BUTTONS // ============================================================= function toggleStyle(id) { document.getElementById(id).classList.toggle('active'); updateCard(); } function isActive(id) { return !!document.getElementById(id)?.classList.contains('active'); } // ============================================================= // COLOR // ============================================================= function syncHex(pickerId, hexId) { document.getElementById(hexId).value = document.getElementById(pickerId).value; } function syncPicker(pickerId, hexId) { const v = document.getElementById(hexId).value; if (/^#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$/.test(v)) document.getElementById(pickerId).value = v; } // ============================================================= // UPLOADS // ============================================================= function handleLogoUpload(e) { const file = e.target.files[0]; if (!file) return; const n = document.getElementById('logo-name'); n.textContent = file.name; n.style.display='block'; const r = new FileReader(); r.onload = ev => { const img = document.getElementById('card-logo-img'); img.src = ev.target.result; img.style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('card-logo-placeholder').style.display = 'none'; }; r.readAsDataURL(file); } function handlePhotoUpload(e) { const file = e.target.files[0]; if (!file) return; const n = document.getElementById('photo-name'); n.textContent = file.name; n.style.display='block'; const r = new FileReader(); r.onload = ev => { const img = document.getElementById('card-photo-img'); img.src = ev.target.result; img.style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('card-photo-placeholder').style.display = 'none'; }; r.readAsDataURL(file); } function clearPhoto() { document.getElementById('card-photo-img').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('card-photo-placeholder').style.display = 'flex'; document.getElementById('photo-name').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('photo-upload').value = ''; } function handleBgUpload(e) { const file = e.target.files[0]; if (!file) return; const n = document.getElementById('bg-name'); n.textContent = file.name; n.style.display='block'; const r = new FileReader(); r.onload = ev => { window._bgData = ev.target.result; updateBg(); }; r.readAsDataURL(file); } // ============================================================= // BACKGROUND // ============================================================= function updateBg() { const type = document.getElementById('bg-type').value; document.getElementById('bg-solid-row').style.display = type==='solid' ? '' : 'none'; document.getElementById('bg-gradient-row').style.display = type==='gradient' ? '' : 'none'; document.getElementById('bg-image-row').style.display = type==='image' ? '' : 'none'; const layer = document.getElementById('card-bg-layer'); const overlay = document.getElementById('card-overlay'); overlay.style.display = 'none'; if (type === 'solid') { layer.style.background = document.getElementById('bg-solid-color').value; } else if (type === 'gradient') { const c1=document.getElementById('grad1').value, c2=document.getElementById('grad2').value, c3=document.getElementById('grad3').value; const dir=document.getElementById('grad-dir').value; layer.style.background = dir==='circle' ? `radial-gradient(circle,${c1},${c2},${c3})` : `linear-gradient(${dir},${c1},${c2},${c3})`; } else if (type==='image' && window._bgData) { layer.style.background = `url(${window._bgData}) center/cover no-repeat`; const op = document.getElementById('bg-overlay').value; overlay.style.cssText = `position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;background:rgba(0,0,0,${op});display:block`; } } // ============================================================= // CARD UPDATE // ============================================================= function g(id) { return document.getElementById(id)?.value || ''; } function applyFont(el, font, size, bold, italic, color) { el.style.fontFamily=font; el.style.fontSize=size+'px'; el.style.fontWeight=bold?'700':'400'; el.style.fontStyle=italic?'italic':'normal'; el.style.color=color; } function updateCard() { const instEl = document.getElementById('card-inst-name'); instEl.textContent = g('inst-name'); applyFont(instEl, g('inst-name-font'), g('inst-name-size')||13, isActive('inst-bold'), isActive('inst-italic'), g('inst-name-color')); const subEl = document.getElementById('card-subtitle'); subEl.textContent = g('subtitle'); applyFont(subEl, g('subtitle-font'), g('subtitle-size')||8, isActive('sub-bold'), isActive('sub-italic'), g('subtitle-color')); const nameEl = document.getElementById('cf-name'); nameEl.textContent = g('student-name'); applyFont(nameEl, g('student-name-font'), g('student-name-size')||11, isActive('sname-bold'), isActive('sname-italic'), g('student-name-color')); const fc=g('fields-color'), fs=parseInt(g('fields-size'))||8, ff=g('fields-font'); const setF = (id, val) => { const el=document.getElementById(id); el.textContent=val; el.style.fontFamily=ff; el.style.fontSize=fs+'px'; el.style.color=fc; }; setF('cf-id', g('student-id')); setF('cf-class', g('student-class')); setF('cf-addr', g('student-address')); setF('cf-issue', g('issue-date')); setF('cf-exp', g('exp-date')); document.querySelectorAll('.field-label').forEach(el => { el.style.color=fc; el.style.fontFamily=ff; }); const sc = g('sig-color'); document.getElementById('cf-sig').textContent = g('sig-name'); document.getElementById('cf-sig').style.color = sc; document.getElementById('cf-sig').style.fontSize = Math.max(fs-1,6)+'px'; document.getElementById('cf-sig-title').textContent = g('sig-title'); document.getElementById('cf-sig-title').style.color = sc; document.getElementById('sig-line').style.borderColor = sc; document.getElementById('cf-inst-mini').textContent = g('inst-name'); document.getElementById('cf-inst-mini').style.color = fc; document.getElementById('id-card').style.borderRadius = (g('card-radius')||12) + 'px'; } // ============================================================= // DOWNLOAD — uses onclone to redraw texture at 3x scale // ============================================================= function downloadCard(format) { const btnId = format==='jpeg' ? 'btn-jpg' : 'btn-png'; const btn = document.getElementById(btnId); const origText = btn.textContent; btn.textContent = '⏳ Generating...'; btn.disabled = true; const card = document.getElementById('id-card'); const cardW = card.offsetWidth, cardH = card.offsetHeight; const SCALE = 3; html2canvas(card, { scale: SCALE, useCORS: true, allowTaint: true, backgroundColor: null, logging: false, onclone: (clonedDoc) => { // Re-draw texture into the cloned canvas at full scale so it's crisp const tc = clonedDoc.getElementById('card-texture-canvas'); if (!tc) return; const tw = cardW * SCALE, th = cardH * SCALE; tc.width = tw; tc.height = th; tc.style.width = cardW + 'px'; tc.style.height = cardH + 'px'; const ctx = tc.getContext('2d'); ctx.scale(SCALE, SCALE); const t = TEXTURES.find(x => x.key === currentTexture); const op = parseFloat(document.getElementById('texture-opacity').value); if (t && t.draw) { ctx.save(); t.draw(ctx, cardW, cardH, op); ctx.restore(); } } }).then(canvas => { const name = (g('student-name')||'student').replace(/\s+/g,'-').toLowerCase(); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = format==='jpeg' ? canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.95) : canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); a.download = `id-card-${name}.${format==='jpeg'?'jpg':'png'}`; a.click(); btn.textContent = origText; btn.disabled = false; }).catch(err => { console.error(err); btn.textContent = '⚠ Error'; btn.disabled = false; }); } // ============================================================= // INIT // ============================================================= window.onload = () => { buildTextureGrid(); updateCardSize(); updateCard(); updateBg(); }; </script> </body> </html> <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8" /> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/> <title>Student ID Card Generator</title> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto:wght@400;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700&family=Montserrat:wght@400;700&family=Lato:wght@400;700&family=Open+Sans:wght@400;700&family=Raleway:wght@400;700&family=Poppins:wght@400;700&family=Merriweather:wght@400;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Dancing+Script:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/> <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js"></script> <style> *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } body { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 50%, #0f3460 100%); min-height: 100vh; color: #e0e0e0; } header { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 18px 30px; text-align: center; } header h1 { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #00d2ff, #7b2ff7); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; letter-spacing: 1px; } header p { color: #aaa; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-top: 4px; } .main-wrapper { display: flex; gap: 24px; padding: 24px; max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; flex-wrap: wrap; } .panel { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; flex: 1 1 420px; max-height: 95vh; overflow-y: auto; } .panel::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; } .panel::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; } .panel::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 3px; } .section-title { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px; color: #7b2ff7; margin: 20px 0 10px; padding-bottom: 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(123,47,247,0.3); } .section-title:first-child { margin-top: 0; } .form-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; flex: 1 1 130px; } .form-group label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #aaa; } .form-group input[type="text"], .form-group input[type="date"], .form-group input[type="number"], .form-group select, .form-group textarea { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 8px; color: #e0e0e0; padding: 7px 10px; font-size: 0.83rem; font-family: inherit; outline: none; transition: border 0.2s; } .form-group input:focus, .form-group select:focus, .form-group textarea:focus { border-color: #7b2ff7; } .form-group textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 56px; } .form-group input[type="color"] { height: 36px; width: 100%; padding: 2px 4px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); cursor: pointer; } .form-group input[type="range"] { width: 100%; accent-color: #7b2ff7; } .form-group input[type="file"] { color: #aaa; font-size: 0.78rem; } .checkbox-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.82rem; color: #ccc; margin-bottom: 8px; } .checkbox-row input[type="checkbox"] { accent-color: #7b2ff7; width: 15px; height: 15px; } .style-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 8px; } .style-row label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #aaa; min-width: 80px; } .style-row select, .style-row input { flex: 1; min-width: 90px; } .btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 10px; border: none; font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7b2ff7, #00d2ff); color: white; } .btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.88; transform: translateY(-1px); } .btn-secondary { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: #e0e0e0; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); } .btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.17); } .btn-success { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #11998e, #38ef7d); color: white; width: 100%; padding: 13px; font-size: 1rem; border-radius: 12px; margin-top: 18px; } .btn-success:hover { opacity: 0.9; transform: translateY(-1px); } .quick-sizes { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 10px; } .size-badge { padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.13); font-size: 0.76rem; cursor: pointer; color: #ccc; transition: all 0.2s; } .size-badge:hover, .size-badge.active { background: rgba(123,47,247,0.3); border-color: #7b2ff7; color: #fff; } .upload-area { border: 2px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #888; } .upload-area:hover { border-color: #7b2ff7; color: #ccc; } .upload-area img { max-height: 60px; max-width: 100%; border-radius: 6px; margin-top: 6px; } .grid-2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; } .option-card { padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); text-align: center; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #aaa; transition: all 0.2s; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); } .option-card:hover, .option-card.active { border-color: #7b2ff7; color: #fff; background: rgba(123,47,247,0.15); } .preview-area { flex: 1 1 420px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 20px; } .preview-label { font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; color: #888; text-align: center; } .card-stage { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 16px; width: 100%; } /* ===== ID CARD ===== */ #idCard { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); transition: box-shadow 0.3s; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; padding: 18px 18px 16px; } .texture-none::after { display: none; } .texture-dots::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.12) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 18px 18px; } .texture-lines::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 0px, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 10px); } .texture-grid::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 20px 20px; } .texture-waves::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 8px, rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 8px, rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 9px); } .card-logo-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; width: 100%; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 4px; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .card-logo-img { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .card-logo-placeholder { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.3); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.6rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); text-align: center; } .card-inst-name { text-align: center; font-weight: 700; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .card-inst-tagline { text-align: center; font-size: 0.72rem; margin-bottom: 6px; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .card-divider { width: 100%; height: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); margin: 5px 0; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .card-id-label { font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; text-align: center; opacity: 0.7; margin-bottom: 8px; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .card-body { display: flex; gap: 14px; width: 100%; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .card-photo-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .card-photo { width: 80px; height: 95px; border-radius: 8px; object-fit: cover; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .card-photo-placeholder { width: 80px; height: 95px; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.25); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.62rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); text-align: center; } .card-info-col { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .card-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px; } .card-field-label { font-size: 0.58rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.8px; opacity: 0.6; } .card-field-value { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; } .card-name-large { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 3px; } /* ===== FIXED FOOTER ROW ===== */ .card-footer { width: 100%; position: relative; z-index: 1; margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 7px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; gap: 6px; } .card-footer-date { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .card-footer-date.center { text-align: center; } .card-footer-date.right { text-align: right; } .card-footer-date-label { display: block; font-size: 0.52rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.8px; opacity: 0.6; margin-bottom: 3px; } .card-footer-date-value { display: block; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; } .card-footer-sig { flex: 1; min-width: 0; text-align: right; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; gap: 2px; } .card-sig-name { font-size: 11px; font-family: 'Dancing Script', cursive; text-align: right; } .card-sig-line { width: 80px; height: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); } .card-sig-label-text { font-size: 0.52rem; opacity: 0.6; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.8px; white-space: nowrap; } /* TABS */ .tabs { display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .tab-btn { padding: 7px 14px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #aaa; font-size: 0.78rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; font-family: inherit; } .tab-btn.active { background: rgba(123,47,247,0.3); border-color: #7b2ff7; color: #fff; } .tab-content { display: none; } .tab-content.active { display: block; } @media (max-width: 900px) { .main-wrapper { flex-direction: column; } .panel { max-height: none; } } </style> </head> <body> <header> <h1>🎓 Student ID Card Generator</h1> <p>Create a fully customized student ID card — ready for GitHub Student Developer Pack approval</p> </header> <div class="main-wrapper"> <!-- ====== LEFT PANEL ====== --> <div class="panel"> <div class="tabs"> <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="showTab('tab-size',this)">📐 Size</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="showTab('tab-institution',this)">🏛️ Institution</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="showTab('tab-student',this)">👤 Student</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="showTab('tab-design',this)">🎨 Design</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="showTab('tab-fonts',this)">🔤 Fonts</button> </div> <!-- TAB: SIZE --> <div id="tab-size" class="tab-content active"> <div class="section-title">Quick Size Presets</div> <div class="quick-sizes"> <span class="size-badge" onclick="setSize(340,200,this)">CR80 Standard</span> <span class="size-badge" onclick="setSize(320,190,this)">US Student</span> <span class="size-badge" onclick="setSize(300,180,this)">EU Format</span> <span class="size-badge" onclick="setSize(360,215,this)">Wide</span> <span class="size-badge" onclick="setSize(280,175,this)">Compact</span> </div> <div class="section-title">Custom Size</div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Width (px)</label> <input type="number" id="cardWidth" value="340" min="200" max="600" oninput="applySize()"/> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Height (px)</label> <input type="number" id="cardHeight" value="215" min="150" max="400" oninput="applySize()"/> </div> </div> </div> <!-- TAB: INSTITUTION --> <div id="tab-institution" class="tab-content"> <div class="section-title">Institution Logo</div> <div class="upload-area" onclick="document.getElementById('logoUpload').click()"> <div id="logoPreviewArea">📷 Click to upload institution logo<br/><small>(PNG, JPG)</small></div> <input type="file" id="logoUpload" accept="image/*" style="display:none" onchange="uploadLogo(event)"/> </div> <div class="section-title">Institution Name</div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group" style="flex:1 1 100%"> <label>Institution Name</label> <input type="text" id="instName" value="State University of Technology" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> </div> <div class="style-row"> <label>Font</label> <select id="instFont" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="Poppins">Poppins</option> <option value="Playfair Display">Playfair Display</option> <option value="Roboto">Roboto</option> <option value="Montserrat">Montserrat</option> <option value="Oswald">Oswald</option> <option value="Raleway">Raleway</option> <option value="Merriweather">Merriweather</option> <option value="Open Sans">Open Sans</option> </select> <input type="number" id="instSize" value="13" min="8" max="28" style="width:60px" oninput="updateCard()"/> <input type="color" id="instColor" value="#ffffff" style="width:44px" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="checkbox-row"> <input type="checkbox" id="instBold" checked onchange="updateCard()"/><label>Bold</label> <input type="checkbox" id="instItalic" onchange="updateCard()"/><label>Italic</label> </div> <div class="section-title">Tagline / Sub-text (Below Institution Name)</div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group" style="flex:1 1 100%"> <label>Tagline / Department</label> <input type="text" id="instTagline" value="Department of Computer Science & Engineering" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> </div> <div class="style-row"> <label>Font</label> <select id="taglineFont" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="Poppins">Poppins</option> <option value="Playfair Display">Playfair Display</option> <option value="Roboto">Roboto</option> <option value="Montserrat">Montserrat</option> <option value="Lato">Lato</option> <option value="Open Sans">Open Sans</option> </select> <input type="number" id="taglineSize" value="9" min="6" max="18" style="width:60px" oninput="updateCard()"/> <input type="color" id="taglineColor" value="#ccddff" style="width:44px" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="checkbox-row"> <input type="checkbox" id="taglineBold" onchange="updateCard()"/><label>Bold</label> <input type="checkbox" id="taglineItalic" checked onchange="updateCard()"/><label>Italic</label> </div> </div> <!-- TAB: STUDENT --> <div id="tab-student" class="tab-content"> <div class="section-title">Student Photo</div> <div class="upload-area" onclick="document.getElementById('photoUpload').click()"> <div id="photoPreviewArea">���� Click to upload student photo<br/><small>(Optional)</small></div> <input type="file" id="photoUpload" accept="image/*" style="display:none" onchange="uploadPhoto(event)"/> </div> <div class="checkbox-row" style="margin-top:8px"> <input type="checkbox" id="showPhoto" checked onchange="updateCard()"/> <label>Show photo on card</label> </div> <div class="section-title">Student Information</div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group" style="flex:1 1 100%"> <label>Full Name</label> <input type="text" id="stuName" value="Alex Johnson" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> </div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Student ID</label> <input type="text" id="stuId" value="STU-2024-00789" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Program / Course</label> <input type="text" id="stuProgram" value="B.Sc. Computer Science" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> </div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Year / Semester</label> <input type="text" id="stuYear" value="3rd Year" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Section / Group</label> <input type="text" id="stuSection" value="Section A" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> </div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group" style="flex:1 1 100%"> <label>Address</label> <textarea id="stuAddress" rows="2" oninput="updateCard()">123 University Ave, Springfield, USA</textarea> </div> </div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Date of Birth</label> <input type="date" id="stuDOB" value="2002-05-15" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Blood Group</label> <input type="text" id="stuBlood" value="O+" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> </div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Issue Date</label> <input type="date" id="issueDate" value="2024-01-01" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Expiry Date</label> <input type="date" id="expireDate" value="2028-12-31" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> </div> <div class="section-title">Signature</div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group" style="flex:1 1 100%"> <label>Authorized Signatory Name</label> <input type="text" id="sigName" value="Dr. Sarah Mitchell" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> </div> <div class="style-row"> <label>Sig Font</label> <select id="sigFont" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="Dancing Script">Dancing Script</option> <option value="Playfair Display">Playfair Display</option> <option value="Raleway">Raleway</option> <option value="Poppins">Poppins</option> </select> <input type="color" id="sigColor" value="#ffffff" style="width:44px" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="section-title">Student Name Style</div> <div class="style-row"> <label>Font</label> <select id="nameFont" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="Poppins">Poppins</option> <option value="Montserrat">Montserrat</option> <option value="Playfair Display">Playfair Display</option> <option value="Oswald">Oswald</option> <option value="Roboto">Roboto</option> </select> <input type="number" id="nameSize" value="13" min="8" max="24" style="width:60px" oninput="updateCard()"/> <input type="color" id="nameColor" value="#ffffff" style="width:44px" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="checkbox-row"> <input type="checkbox" id="nameBold" checked onchange="updateCard()"/><label>Bold</label> <input type="checkbox" id="nameItalic" onchange="updateCard()"/><label>Italic</label> </div> <div class="section-title">Info Fields Style</div> <div class="style-row"> <label>Font</label> <select id="infoFont" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="Poppins">Poppins</option> <option value="Roboto">Roboto</option> <option value="Lato">Lato</option> <option value="Open Sans">Open Sans</option> </select> <input type="number" id="infoSize" value="10" min="7" max="18" style="width:60px" oninput="updateCard()"/> <input type="color" id="infoColor" value="#ddeeff" style="width:44px" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="checkbox-row"> <input type="checkbox" id="infoBold" onchange="updateCard()"/><label>Bold</label> </div> </div> <!-- TAB: DESIGN --> <div id="tab-design" class="tab-content"> <div class="section-title">Background Type</div> <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap"> <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="setBgType('solid')" id="bgSolidBtn">Solid Color</button> <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="setBgType('gradient')" id="bgGradientBtn">Gradient</button> <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="setBgType('image')" id="bgImageBtn">Image</button> </div> <div id="bg-solid-controls"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Background Color</label> <input type="color" id="bgColor" value="#1a237e" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> </div> <div id="bg-gradient-controls" style="display:none"> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Color 1</label> <input type="color" id="gradColor1" value="#1a237e" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Color 2</label> <input type="color" id="gradColor2" value="#4a148c" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Direction (deg)</label> <input type="number" id="gradDeg" value="135" min="0" max="360" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> </div> </div> <div id="bg-image-controls" style="display:none"> <div class="upload-area" onclick="document.getElementById('bgImgUpload').click()"> <div id="bgImgPreviewArea">🖼️ Click to upload background image</div> <input type="file" id="bgImgUpload" accept="image/*" style="display:none" onchange="uploadBgImage(event)"/> </div> <div class="form-group" style="margin-top:8px"> <label>Image Overlay Opacity</label> <input type="range" id="bgOverlay" min="0" max="0.8" step="0.05" value="0.4" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> </div> <div class="section-title">Card Outline / Border</div> <div class="grid-2"> <div class="option-card active" id="outline-none" onclick="setOutline('none')">No Border</div> <div class="option-card" id="outline-solid" onclick="setOutline('solid')">Solid</div> <div class="option-card" id="outline-dashed" onclick="setOutline('dashed')">Dashed</div> <div class="option-card" id="outline-double" onclick="setOutline('double')">Double</div> <div class="option-card" id="outline-glow" onclick="setOutline('glow')">Glow</div> <div class="option-card" id="outline-gradient" onclick="setOutline('gradient')">Gradient</div> </div> <div class="form-row" style="margin-top:10px"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Border Color</label> <input type="color" id="borderColor" value="#7b2ff7" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Border Width (px)</label> <input type="number" id="borderWidth" value="3" min="1" max="10" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Corner Radius (px)</label> <input type="number" id="borderRadius" value="12" min="0" max="40" oninput="updateCard()"/> </div> </div> <div class="section-title">Card Texture Overlay</div> <div class="grid-2"> <div class="option-card active" id="texture-none" onclick="setTexture('none')">None</div> <div class="option-card" id="texture-dots" onclick="setTexture('dots')">Dots</div> <div class="option-card" id="texture-lines" onclick="setTexture('lines')">Lines</div> <div class="option-card" id="texture-grid" onclick="setTexture('grid')">Grid</div> <div class="option-card" id="texture-waves" onclick="setTexture('waves')">Waves</div> </div> <div class="section-title">Field Label Color</div> <div class="style-row"> <label>Color</label> <input type="color" id="labelColor" value="#99bbdd"
