value="90deg">Horizontal →</option><option value="180deg">Vertical ↓</option><option value="circle">Radial</option></select></div> </div> <div id="bgs" style="display:none"><label>Color</label><div class="cr"><input type="color" id="bgsc" value="#1a0533" oninput="sh('bgsc','bgsch');renderBg()"><input type="text" id="bgsch" value="#1a0533" maxlength="7" oninput="sp('bgsc','bgsch');renderBg()"></div></div> <div id="bgi" style="display:none"> <div class="upa"><input type="file" id="bgup" accept="image/*" onchange="onBg(event)"><div class="uico">🖼️</div><p>Upload background image</p><div class="unm" id="bgnm"></div></div> <div style="margin-top:8px"><label>Overlay opacity: <span id="ovval">0.65</span></label> <input type="range" id="ovop" min="0" max="0.95" step="0.05" value="0.65" oninput="document.getElementById('ovval').textContent=parseFloat(this.value).toFixed(2);renderBg()"> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- INSTITUTION --> <div class="sec open" id="s-inst"> <div class="sech" onclick="tog('s-inst')"><span class="sectl">🏫 Institution</span><span class="secar">▼</span></div> <div class="secb"> <div><label>Logo</label> <div class="upa"><input type="file" id="logoup" accept="image/*" onchange="onLogo(event)"><div class="uico">🖼️</div><p>Upload logo</p><div class="unm" id="logonm"></div></div> </div> <div><label>Institution Name</label><input type="text" id="inst" value="Springfield University" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div class="r3"> <div><label>Font</label><select id="instfn" onchange="renderCard()"></select></div> <div><label>Size</label><input type="number" id="instfs" value="13" min="7" max="28" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div><label>Style</label><div class="fsr"><button class="fsb active" id="instb" onclick="ts('instb')"><b>B</b></button><button class="fsb" id="insti" onclick="ts('insti')"><i>I</i></button></div></div> </div> <div><label>Color</label><div class="cr"><input type="color" id="instc" value="#ffffff" oninput="sh('instc','instch');renderCard()"><input type="text" id="instch" value="#ffffff" maxlength="7" oninput="sp('instc','instch');renderCard()"></div></div> <div><label>Subtitle (centered, below name)</label><input type="text" id="sub" value="Faculty of Computer Science" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div class="r3"> <div><label>Font</label><select id="subfn" onchange="renderCard()"></select></div> <div><label>Size</label><input type="number" id="subfs" value="7" min="5" max="16" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div><label>Style</label><div class="fsr"><button class="fsb" id="subb" onclick="ts('subb')"><b>B</b></button><button class="fsb" id="subi" onclick="ts('subi')"><i>I</i></button></div></div> </div> <div><label>Color</label><div class="cr"><input type="color" id="subc" value="#ddeeff" oninput="sh('subc','subch');renderCard()"><input type="text" id="subch" value="#ddeeff" maxlength="7" oninput="sp('subc','subch');renderCard()"></div></div> </div> </div> <!-- STUDENT PHOTO --> <div class="sec open" id="s-photo"> <div class="sech" onclick="tog('s-photo')"><span class="sectl">📷 Student Photo</span><span class="secar">▼</span></div> <div class="secb"> <div> <div class="upa"><input type="file" id="phoup" accept="image/*" onchange="onPhoto(event)"><div class="uico">📷</div><p>Upload student photo (optional)</p><div class="unm" id="phonm"></div></div> <button class="btn btng btnr btnsm" style="margin-top:6px" onclick="clearPhoto()">✕ Remove Photo</button> </div> <div class="r2"> <div><label>Photo Width (px)</label><input type="number" id="phw" value="56" min="30" max="120" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div><label>Photo Height (px)</label><input type="number" id="phh" value="70" min="30" max="150" oninput="renderCard()"></div> </div> <div><label>Photo Border Color</label> <div class="cr"><input type="color" id="phbc" value="#ff6b35" oninput="sh('phbc','phbch');renderCard()"><input type="text" id="phbch" value="#ff6b35" maxlength="7" oninput="sp('phbc','phbch');renderCard()"></div> </div> <div><label>Border Width (px)</label><input type="number" id="phbw" value="2" min="0" max="6" oninput="renderCard()"></div> </div> </div> <!-- STUDENT INFO --> <div class="sec open" id="s-stu"> <div class="sech" onclick="tog('s-stu')"><span class="sectl">🎓 Student Info</span><span class="secar">▼</span></div> <div class="secb"> <div><label>Full Name</label><input type="text" id="sname" value="Jordan Alexandra Rivera" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div class="r3"> <div><label>Font</label><select id="snamefn" onchange="renderCard()"></select></div> <div><label>Size</label><input type="number" id="snamefs" value="10" min="6" max="22" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div><label>Style</label><div class="fsr"><button class="fsb active" id="snameb" onclick="ts('snameb')"><b>B</b></button><button class="fsb" id="snamei" onclick="ts('snamei')"><i>I</i></button></div></div> </div> <div><label>Name Color</label><div class="cr"><input type="color" id="snamec" value="#ffffff" oninput="sh('snamec','snamech');renderCard()"><input type="text" id="snamech" value="#ffffff" maxlength="7" oninput="sp('snamec','snamech');renderCard()"></div></div> <div class="r2"> <div><label>Student ID</label><input type="text" id="sid" value="CS·2024·0042" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div><label>Class / Year</label><input type="text" id="scls" value="4th Year" oninput="renderCard()"></div> </div> <div><label>Address</label><input type="text" id="saddr" value="123 Campus Road, Springfield" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div><label>Blood Group</label><input type="text" id="sblood" value="B+" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div class="r2"> <div><label>Issue Date</label><input type="date" id="iss" value="2024-01-15" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div><label>Expiry Date</label><input type="date" id="exp" value="2025-12-31" oninput="renderCard()"></div> </div> <div><label>Fields Font</label><select id="fffn" onchange="renderCard()"></select></div> <div class="r2"> <div><label>Fields Size</label><input type="number" id="fffs" value="7" min="5" max="14" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div><label>Fields Color</label><div class="cr" style="margin-top:5px"><input type="color" id="ffc" value="#e8f0ff" oninput="sh('ffc','ffch');renderCard()"><input type="text" id="ffch" value="#e8f0ff" maxlength="7" oninput="sp('ffc','ffch');renderCard()"></div></div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- SIGNATURE --> <div class="sec" id="s-sig"> <div class="sech" onclick="tog('s-sig')"><span class="sectl">✒️ Signature</span><span class="secar">▼</span></div> <div class="secb"> <div><label>Signatory Name</label><input type="text" id="signm" value="Dr. Robert Williams" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div><label>Signatory Title</label><input type="text" id="sigttl" value="Principal" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div><label>Color</label><div class="cr"><input type="color" id="sigc" value="#ffffff" oninput="sh('sigc','sigch');renderCard()"><input type="text" id="sigch" value="#ffffff" maxlength="7" oninput="sp('sigc','sigch');renderCard()"></div></div> <div><label>Line Width (px)</label><input type="number" id="sigw" value="65" min="30" max="120" oninput="renderCard()"></div> </div> </div> <!-- DECORATIVE --> <div class="sec" id="s-deco"> <div class="sech" onclick="tog('s-deco')"><span class="sectl">💎 Decorative Style</span><span class="secar">▼</span></div> <div class="secb"> <div><label>Top Accent Bar Height (px)</label><input type="number" id="topbarh" value="5" min="0" max="16" oninput="renderCard()"></div> <div><label>Divider Line Style</label> <select id="divstyle" onchange="renderCard()"> <option value="gradient">Accent Gradient</option> <option value="solid">Solid White</option> <option value="none">None</option> </select> </div> <div><label>Diagonal Stripe</label> <select id="stripe" onchange="renderDeco()"> <option value="on">On</option> <option value="off">Off</option> </select> </div> <div><label>Corner Glow</label> <select id="glow" onchange="renderDeco()"> <option value="corner">Corner</option> <option value="center">Center Radial</option> <option value="none">None</option> </select> </div> <div><label>Card Outline</label> <div class="olgrid"> <div class="olo active" data-o="none" onclick="setOL(this)">None</div> <div class="olo" data-o="solid" onclick="setOL(this)" style="border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.5)">Solid</div> <div class="olo" data-o="accent" onclick="setOL(this)">Accent</div> <div class="olo" data-o="double" onclick="setOL(this)" style="border:4px double rgba(255,255,255,.5)">Double</div> <div class="olo" data-o="glow" onclick="setOL(this)">Glow</div> <div class="olo" data-o="dashed" onclick="setOL(this)" style="border:2px dashed rgba(255,255,255,.4)">Dashed</div> </div> </div> <div><label>Corner Radius (px)</label><input type="number" id="radius" value="12" min="0" max="50" oninput="renderCard()"></div> </div> </div> <!-- TEXTURE --> <div class="sec" id="s-tex"> <div class="sech" onclick="tog('s-tex')"><span class="sectl">✨ Texture</span><span class="secar">▼</span></div> <div class="secb"> <div><label>Pattern <span style="color:var(--ok);font-size:.63rem">✓ renders in download</span></label> <div class="txgrid" id="txgrid"></div> </div> <div><label>Opacity</label><input type="range" id="txop" min="0.05" max="1" step="0.05" value="0.25" oninput="drawTex()"></div> </div> </div> </div><!-- end sidebar --> <!-- ══ PREVIEW ══ --> <div class="prev"> <div class="plbl">Live Preview — Bold &amp; Colorful v2</div> <div id="cardwrap"> <div id="idcard"> <!-- bg layers --> <div class="cbg" id="cbg"></div> <div id="cov"></div> <canvas id="ctex"></canvas> <div id="cdeco"></div> <!-- content --> <div class="ccon"> <!-- top accent bar --> <div id="ctopbar"></div> <!-- header --> <div class="chard" id="chard"> <div class="chlogo"> <img id="clogoi" src="" alt="Logo"> <div id="clogop">LOGO</div> </div> <div class="chtxt"> <div id="cinst"></div> <div id="csub"></div> </div> </div> <!-- divider --> <div id="cdivider"></div> <!-- body --> <div class="cbody"> <!-- photo col --> <div class="cphcol" id="cphcol"> <div class="cphbox" id="cphbox"> <img id="cphi" src="" alt="Photo"> <div id="cphp"><span style="font-size:1rem">👤</span><span>Photo</span></div> </div> </div> <!-- info col --> <div class="cinfocol"> <div class="cidpill"> <div class="cdot" id="cdot"></div> <span>STUDENT IDENTITY CARD</span> </div> <div class="cfields"> <div class="cf"><div class="cfl">Full Name</div><div class="cfv" id="cfname"></div></div> <div class="cf"><div class="cfl">Student ID</div><div class="cfv" id="cfid"></div></div> <div class="cf"><div class="cfl">Class / Year</div><div class="cfv" id="cfcls"></div></div> <div class="cf"><div class="cfl">Address</div><div class="cfv" id="cfaddr"></div></div> <div class="cf"><div class="cfl">Blood Group</div><div class="cfv" id="cfblood"></div></div> <div class="cdatesrow"> <div class="cf"><div class="cfl">Issued</div><div class="cfv" id="cfiss"></div></div> <div class="cf"><div class="cfl">Expires</div><div class="cfv" id="cfexp"></div></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- footer --> <div class="cfoot"> <div class="csig"> <div id="csigline"></div> <div class="csignm" id="csignm"></div> <div class="csigttl" id="csigttl"></div> </div> <div class="cmini"> <div class="cminilbl">Property of</div> <div class="cmininm" id="cmininm"></div> </div> </div> </div><!-- ccon --> </div><!-- idcard --> </div><!-- cardwrap --> <div class="dlbar"> <button class="btn" id="btnpng" onclick="dlCard('png')">⬇ Download PNG</button> <button class="btn btnalt" id="btnjpg" onclick="dlCard('jpeg')">⬇ Download JPG</button> </div> <div style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--mut);text-align:center;max-width:400px;line-height:1.7"> <span class="tag">GitHub Student Pack Ready</span>&nbsp; Use accurate institutional details &amp; clear photo for verification. </div> </div> </div><!-- wrap --> <script> // ═══════════════════ FONTS ═══════════════════ const DFNT=[ ["'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif","Barlow Condensed"],["'Syne',sans-serif","Syne"], ["'Cinzel',serif","Cinzel"],["'Abril Fatface',cursive","Abril Fatface"], ["'Anton',sans-serif","Anton"],["'Bebas Neue',cursive","Bebas Neue"], ["'Righteous',cursive","Righteous"],["'Oswald',sans-serif","Oswald"], ["'Josefin Sans',sans-serif","Josefin Sans"],["'Playfair Display',serif","Playfair Display"], ["'Cormorant Garamond',serif","Cormorant"],["'EB Garamond',serif","EB Garamond"], ["'Montserrat',sans-serif","Montserrat"],["'Raleway',sans-serif","Raleway"], ["'Poppins',sans-serif","Poppins"],["'Titillium Web',sans-serif","Titillium"], ["'Exo 2',sans-serif","Exo 2"],["'Space Mono',monospace","Space Mono"], ]; const BFNT=[ ["'Barlow',sans-serif","Barlow"],["'DM Sans',sans-serif","DM Sans"], ["'Poppins',sans-serif","Poppins"],["'Nunito',sans-serif","Nunito"], ["'Quicksand',sans-serif","Quicksand"],["'Raleway',sans-serif","Raleway"], ["'Montserrat',sans-serif","Montserrat"],["'Ubuntu',sans-serif","Ubuntu"], ["'Josefin Sans',sans-serif","Josefin Sans"],["'Lora',serif","Lora"], ["'Merriweather',serif","Merriweather"],["'Bitter',serif","Bitter"], ["'Dancing Script',cursive","Dancing Script"],["'Satisfy',cursive","Satisfy"], ["'Pacifico',cursive","Pacifico"],["'Space Mono',monospace","Space Mono"], ["'Exo 2',sans-serif","Exo 2"],["'Zilla Slab',serif","Zilla Slab"], ]; function bldSel(id,list,def){ const s=document.getElementById(id); list.forEach(([v,l])=>{const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=v;o.textContent=l;if(v===def)o.selected=true;s.appendChild(o);}); } bldSel('instfn',DFNT,"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif"); bldSel('subfn',BFNT,"'Barlow',sans-serif"); bldSel('snamefn',BFNT,"'Barlow',sans-serif"); bldSel('fffn',BFNT,"'Barlow',sans-serif"); // ═══════════════════ TEXTURES ═══════════════════ const TEXTURES=[ {k:'none', l:'None', d:null}, {k:'dots', l:'Dots', d:(c,w,h,o)=>{c.globalAlpha=o;c.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.9)';for(let x=6;x<w;x+=12)for(let y=6;y<h;y+=12){c.beginPath();c.arc(x,y,1,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();}}}, {k:'lines', l:'Lines', d:(c,w,h,o)=>{c.globalAlpha=o;c.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.85)';c.lineWidth=.6;for(let y=0;y<h+8;y+=8){c.beginPath();c.moveTo(0,y);c.lineTo(w,y);c.stroke();}}}, {k:'grid', l:'Grid', d:(c,w,h,o)=>{c.globalAlpha=o;c.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.8)';c.lineWidth=.5;for(let x=0;x<w+14;x+=14){c.beginPath();c.moveTo(x,0);c.lineTo(x,h);c.stroke();}for(let y=0;y<h+14;y+=14){c.beginPath();c.moveTo(0,y);c.lineTo(w,y);c.stroke();}}}, {k:'diag', l:'Diagonal', d:(c,w,h,o)=>{c.globalAlpha=o;c.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.75)';c.lineWidth=.6;for(let i=-(h+10);i<w+h;i+=10){c.beginPath();c.moveTo(i,0);c.lineTo(i+h,h);c.stroke();}}}, {k:'cross', l:'Cross', d:(c,w,h,o)=>{c.globalAlpha=o;c.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.6)';c.lineWidth=.5;const s=10;for(let i=-(h+s);i<w+h;i+=s){c.beginPath();c.moveTo(i,0);c.lineTo(i+h,h);c.stroke();c.beginPath();c.moveTo(i,h);c.lineTo(i+h,0);c.stroke();}}}, {k:'wave', l:'Wave', d:(c,w,h,o)=>{c.globalAlpha=o;c.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.8)';c.lineWidth=.7;for(let y=10;y<h+14;y+=14){c.beginPath();for(let x=0;x<=w;x+=2)c.lineTo(x,y+Math.sin(x/10)*4);c.stroke();}}}, {k:'hex', l:'Hex', d:(c,w,h,o)=>{c.globalAlpha=o;c.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.55)';c.lineWidth=.6;const s=13,hx=s*Math.sqrt(3);for(let row=0;row*s*1.5<h+s;row++)for(let col=-1;col*hx<w+hx;col++){const x=col*hx+(row%2)*hx/2,y=row*s*1.5;c.beginPath();for(let i=0;i<6;i++){const a=Math.PI/180*(60*i-30);c.lineTo(x+s*Math.cos(a),y+s*Math.sin(a));}c.closePath();c.stroke();}}}, {k:'noise', l:'Noise', d:(c,w,h,o)=>{const id=c.createImageData(w,h);for(let i=0;i<id.data.length;i+=4){const v=Math.random()*255;id.data[i]=id.data[i+1]=id.data[i+2]=v;id.data[i+3]=Math.round(o*80);}c.putImageData(id,0,0);}}, {k:'carbon', l:'Carbon', d:(c,w,h,o)=>{c.globalAlpha=o;for(let x=0;x<w;x+=10)for(let y=0;y<h;y+=10){c.fillStyle=((Math.floor(x/10)+Math.floor(y/10))%2===0)?'rgba(255,255,255,.18)':'rgba(0,0,0,.12)';c.fillRect(x,y,10,10);}}}, {k:'tri', l:'Triangle', d:(c,w,h,o)=>{c.globalAlpha=o;c.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.5)';c.lineWidth=.5;const s=18;for(let row=0;row*s<h+s;row++)for(let col=-1;col*s<w+s;col++){const x=col*s+(row%2)*s/2,y=row*s;c.beginPath();c.moveTo(x,y);c.lineTo(x+s/2,y+s);c.lineTo(x-s/2,y+s);c.closePath();c.stroke();}}}, {k:'brick', l:'Brick', d:(c,w,h,o)=>{c.globalAlpha=o;c.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.45)';c.lineWidth=.6;const bw=20,bh=10;for(let row=0;row*bh<h+bh;row++){const off=(row%2)*bw/2;for(let col=-1;col*bw<w+bw;col++)c.strokeRect(col*bw+off,row*bh,bw,bh);}}}, ]; let curTex='none'; function bldTxGrid(){ const grid=document.getElementById('txgrid'); TEXTURES.forEach(t=>{ const d=document.createElement('div'); d.className='txo'+(t.k==='none'?' active':''); d.dataset.key=t.k; d.onclick=()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.txo').forEach(e=>e.classList.remove('active'));d.classList.add('active');curTex=t.k;drawTex();}; const cv=document.createElement('canvas');cv.width=64;cv.height=40; const ctx=cv.getContext('2d');ctx.fillStyle='#1a1060';ctx.fillRect(0,0,64,40); if(t.d)t.d(ctx,64,40,.65); d.appendChild(cv); const sp=document.createElement('span');sp.textContent=t.l;d.appendChild(sp); grid.appendChild(d); }); } function drawTex(){ const card=document.getElementById('idcard'); const tc=document.getElementById('ctex'); const w=card.offsetWidth,h=card.offsetHeight; tc.width=w;tc.height=h;tc.style.width=w+'px';tc.style.height=h+'px'; const ctx=tc.getContext('2d');ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h); const t=TEXTURES.find(x=>x.k===curTex); const op=parseFloat(document.getElementById('txop').value); if(t&&t.d){ctx.save();t.d(ctx,w,h,op);ctx.restore();} } // ═══════════════════ OUTLINE ═══════════════════ const OLM={ none: {border:'none',boxShadow:'none'}, solid: {border:'3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.75)',boxShadow:'none'}, accent:{border:'',boxShadow:'none'}, // filled dynamically double:{border:'5px double rgba(255,255,255,.75)',boxShadow:'none'}, glow: {border:'none',boxShadow:''}, // filled dynamically dashed:{border:'3px dashed rgba(255,255,255,.5)',boxShadow:'none'}, }; function setOL(el){ document.querySelectorAll('.olo').forEach(e=>e.classList.remove('active')); el.classList.add('active'); const a1=g('ac1'); OLM.accent.border=`2px solid ${a1}`; OLM.glow.boxShadow=`0 0 0 3px ${a1}cc, 0 0 22px ${a1}55`; const s=OLM[el.dataset.o]||OLM.none; const card=document.getElementById('idcard'); card.style.border=s.border; card.style.boxShadow=s.boxShadow; } // ═══════════════════ HELPERS ═══════════════════ function tog(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.toggle('open');} function ts(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.toggle('active');renderCard();} function ia(id){return!!document.getElementById(id)?.classList.contains('active');} function g(id){return document.getElementById(id)?.value||'';} function sh(pid,hid){document.getElementById(hid).value=document.getElementById(pid).value;} function sp(pid,hid){const v=document.getElementById(hid).value;if(/^#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$/.test(v))document.getElementById(pid).value=v;} function af(el,fnt,sz,bold,ital,col){el.style.fontFamily=fnt;el.style.fontSize=sz+'px';el.style.fontWeight=bold?'700':'400';el.style.fontStyle=ital?'italic':'normal';el.style.color=col;} // ═══════════════════ THEME ═══════════════════ function applyTheme(el,a1,a2,a3,bg1,bg2){ document.querySelectorAll('.thsw').forEach(e=>e.classList.remove('active')); el.classList.add('active'); const sv=(id,v)=>{const p=document.getElementById(id);if(p)p.value=v;const h=document.getElementById(id+'h');if(h)h.value=v;}; sv('ac1',a1);sv('ac2',a2);sv('ac3',a3);sv('bg1',bg1);sv('bg2',bg2); document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--acc',a1); document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--acc2',a2); document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--acc3',a3); renderAll(); } // ═══════════════════ RESIZE ═══════════════════ function applyPre(btn,w,h){ document.querySelectorAll('.pbt').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('cw').value=w; document.getElementById('ch').value=h; resizeCard(); } function resizeCard(){ const w=Math.max(220,parseInt(g('cw'))||320),h=Math.max(140,parseInt(g('ch'))||200); const card=document.getElementById('idcard'); card.style.width=w+'px';card.style.height=h+'px'; setTimeout(()=>{drawTex();renderDeco();},10); renderCard(); } // ═══════════════════ UPLOADS ═══════════════════ function onLogo(e){ const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return; const n=document.getElementById('logonm');n.textContent=f.name;n.style.display='block'; const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=ev=>{const i=document.getElementById('clogoi');i.src=ev.target.result;i.style.display='block';document.getElementById('clogop').style.display='none';}; r.readAsDataURL(f); } function onPhoto(e){ const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return; const n=document.getElementById('phonm');n.textContent=f.name;n.style.display='block'; const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=ev=>{const i=document.getElementById('cphi');i.src=ev.target.result;i.style.display='block';document.getElementById('cphp').style.display='none';}; r.readAsDataURL(f); } function clearPhoto(){ const i=document.getElementById('cphi');i.src='';i.style.display='none'; document.getElementById('cphp').style.display='flex'; document.getElementById('phonm').style.display='none'; document.getElementById('phoup').value=''; } function onBg(e){ const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return; const n=document.getElementById('bgnm');n.textContent=f.name;n.style.display='block'; const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=ev=>{window._bgData=ev.target.result;renderBg();}; r.readAsDataURL(f); } // ═══════════════════ BACKGROUND ═══════════════════ function renderBg(){ const type=g('bgtype'); document.getElementById('bgg').style.display =type==='gradient'?'':'none'; document.getElementById('bgs').style.display =type==='solid' ?'':'none'; document.getElementById('bgi').style.display =type==='image' ?'':'none'; const bg=document.getElementById('cbg'); const ov=document.getElementById('cov'); ov.style.background='none'; if(type==='gradient'){ const c1=g('bg1'),c2=g('bg2'),dir=g('bgdir'); bg.style.background=dir==='circle'?`radial-gradient(circle,${c1},${c2})`:`linear-gradient(${dir},${c1},${c2})`; } else if(type==='solid'){ bg.style.background=g('bgsc'); } else if(type==='image'&&window._bgData){ bg.style.background=`url(${window._bgData}) center/cover no-repeat`; const op=parseFloat(g('ovop')); ov.style.background=`rgba(0,0,0,${op})`; } } // ═══════════════════ DECO (SVG) ═══════════════════ function renderDeco(){ const card=document.getElementById('idcard'); const w=card.offsetWidth,h=card.offsetHeight; const a1=g('ac1'),a2=g('ac2'); let parts=[]; if(g('stripe')==='on'){ const midY=h*0.5,sw=w*2.4,sh2=Math.max(10,h*0.055); parts.push(`<defs><linearGradient id="sg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="${a1}" stop-opacity=".85"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="${a2}" stop-opacity=".85"/></linearGradient></defs> <polygon points="-50,${midY} ${sw},${midY-sh2*2.5} ${sw},${midY+sh2*.5} -50,${midY+sh2*3}" fill="url(#sg)" opacity=".65"/>`); } if(g('glow')==='corner'){ parts.push(`<radialGradient id="cg" cx="0" cy="0" r="1" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="${a1}" stop-opacity=".5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="${a1}" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient> <ellipse cx="${w*.88}" cy="${h*.18}" rx="${w*.55}" ry="${h*.45}" fill="url(#cg)"/>`); } else if(g('glow')==='center'){ parts.push(`<radialGradient id="rg" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="${a2}" stop-opacity=".28"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="${a2}" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient> <ellipse cx="${w/2}" cy="${h/2}" rx="${w*.6}" ry="${h*.5}" fill="url(#rg)"/>`); } document.getElementById('cdeco').innerHTML=parts.length ?`<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="${w}" height="${h}" viewBox="0 0 ${w} ${h}" style="position:absolute;inset:0">${parts.join('')}</svg>`:''; } // ═══════════════════ MAIN RENDER ═══════════════════ function renderCard(){ const a1=g('ac1'), a2=g('ac2'), a3=g('ac3'); // top bar const tbh=parseInt(g('topbarh'))||0; const tb=document.getElementById('ctopbar'); tb.style.height=tbh+'px'; tb.style.background=tbh>0?`linear-gradient(90deg,${a1},${a2})`:'none'; // divider const dv=document.getElementById('cdivider'); const dvs=g('divstyle'); if(dvs==='gradient'){dv.style.height='2px';dv.style.background=`linear-gradient(90deg,${a1},${a2},transparent)`;dv.style.border='none';} else if(dvs==='solid'){dv.style.height='1px';dv.style.background='rgba(255,255,255,.2)';dv.style.border='none';} else{dv.style.height='0';dv.style.background='none';} // institution const instEl=document.getElementById('cinst'); instEl.textContent=g('inst'); af(instEl,g('instfn'),g('instfs')||13,ia('instb'),ia('insti'),g('instc')); const subEl=document.getElementById('csub'); subEl.textContent=g('sub'); af(subEl,g('subfn'),g('subfs')||7,ia('subb'),ia('subi'),g('subc')); // photo box const pw=parseInt(g('phw'))||56, ph2=parseInt(g('phh'))||70; const phbox=document.getElementById('cphbox'); phbox.style.width=pw+'px'; phbox.style.height=ph2+'px'; const phbw=parseInt(g('phbw'))||2; phbox.style.border=phbw>0?`${phbw}px solid ${g('phbc')||a1}`:'none'; // student name const snEl=document.getElementById('cfname'); snEl.textContent=g('sname'); af(snEl,g('snamefn'),g('snamefs')||10,ia('snameb'),ia('snamei'),g('snamec')); // fields const fc=g('ffc'),fs=parseInt(g('fffs'))||7,ff=g('fffn'); const sf=(id,val)=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);el.textContent=val;el.style.fontFamily=ff;el.style.fontSize=fs+'px';el.style.color=fc;}; sf('cfid',g('sid')); sf('cfcls',g('scls')); sf('cfaddr',g('saddr')); sf('cfblood',g('sblood')); sf('cfiss',g('iss')); sf('cfexp',g('exp')); document.querySelectorAll('.cfl').forEach(el=>{el.style.color=fc;el.style.fontFamily=ff;}); // expiry accent color document.getElementById('cfexp').style.color=a3||'#06d6a0'; // accent dot document.getElementById('cdot').style.background=a1; // signature const sc=g('sigc'); const sigEl=document.getElementById('csignm');sigEl.textContent=g('signm');sigEl.style.color=sc;sigEl.style.fontSize=Math.max(fs,5)+'px'; const sttlEl=document.getElementById('csigttl');sttlEl.textContent=g('sigttl');sttlEl.style.color=sc; const sl=document.getElementById('csigline');sl.style.borderColor=sc;sl.style.width=(g('sigw')||65)+'px'; document.getElementById('cmininm').textContent=g('inst'); // radius document.getElementById('idcard').style.borderRadius=(g('radius')||12)+'px'; } function renderAll(){renderBg();renderCard();renderDeco();} // ═══════════════════ DOWNLOAD ═══════════════════ function dlCard(fmt){ const bid=fmt==='jpeg'?'btnjpg':'btnpng'; const btn=document.getElementById(bid); const orig=btn.textContent;btn.textContent='⏳ Generating...';btn.disabled=true; const card=document.getElementById('idcard'); const cw=card.offsetWidth,ch=card.offsetHeight; const SC=3; html2canvas(card,{ scale:SC,useCORS:true,allowTaint:true,backgroundColor:null,logging:false, onclone:(doc)=>{ const tc=doc.getElementById('ctex');if(!tc)return; tc.width=cw*SC;tc.height=ch*SC;tc.style.width=cw+'px';tc.style.height=ch+'px'; const ctx=tc.getContext('2d');ctx.scale(SC,SC); const t=TEXTURES.find(x=>x.k===curTex); const op=parseFloat(document.getElementById('txop').value); if(t&&t.d){ctx.save();t.d(ctx,cw,ch,op);ctx.restore();} } }).then(canvas=>{ const nm=(g('sname')||'student').replace(/\s+/g,'-').toLowerCase(); const a=document.createElement('a'); a.href=fmt==='jpeg'?canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg',.95):canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); a.download=`id-card-${nm}.${fmt==='jpeg'?'jpg':'png'}`; a.click(); btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false; }).catch(e=>{console.error(e);btn.textContent='⚠ Error';btn.disabled=false;}); } // ═══════════════════ INIT ═══════════════════ window.onload=()=>{ bldTxGrid(); resizeCard(); renderBg(); renderCard(); setTimeout(renderDeco,50); }; </script> </body> </html> <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title>Modern ID Card Generator</title> <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"> <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;600;700&family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=Clash+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;600;700&family=Raleway:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <!-- html2canvas library --> <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js"></script> <style> * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; } :root { --primary: #00d9ff; --secondary: #ff006e; --accent: #8338ec; --dark-bg: #0f0e17; --card-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); --border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); --text-primary: #ffffff; --text-secondary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); --success: #00ff88; } html, body { width: 100%; height: 100%; } body { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f0e17 0%, #1a1a2e 50%, #16213e 100%); min-height: 100vh; color: var(--text-primary); overflow-x: hidden; position: relative; } body::before { content: ''; position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 50%, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 80%, rgba(255, 0, 110, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%); pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; animation: gradientShift 8s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes gradientShift { 0%, 100% { transform: translate(0, 0); } 50% { transform: translate(30px, 30px); } } .container { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 1600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 30px 20px; } .header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 50px; animation: slideInDown 0.8s ease; } @keyframes slideInDown { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-30px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .header h1 { font-family: 'Clash Display', sans-serif; font-size: 3.5em; font-weight: 700; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, var(--secondary) 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; margin-bottom: 10px; letter-spacing: -1px; } .header p { font-size: 1.1em; color: var(--text-secondary); font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .main-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.3fr; gap: 30px; align-items: start; } .glass-panel { background: var(--card-bg); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 20px; padding: 35px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px 0 rgba(31, 38, 135, 0.37); animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease; transition: all 0.3s ease; max-height: 90vh; overflow-y: auto; } .glass-panel:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); } @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .panel-title { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 1.8em; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 25px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--primary); position: sticky; top: 0; background: var(--card-bg); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); z-index: 10; } .panel-title::before { content: ''; width: 8px; height: 8px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary)); border-radius: 50%; animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; flex-shrink: 0; } @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.3); } } .form-section { margin-bottom: 25px; padding-bottom: 20px; } .form-section:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } .section-label { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9em; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(--primary); margin-bottom: 12px; display: block; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 16px; } label { display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9em; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.3s ease; } label:hover { color: var(--primary); } input[type="text"], input[type="email"], input[type="date"], input[type="number"], input[type="file"], select, textarea { width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); border: 1.5px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9em; color: var(--text-primary); transition: all 0.3s ease; } input[type="text"]:focus, input[type="email"]:focus, input[type="date"]:focus, input[type="number"]:focus, input[type="file"]:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); border-color: var(--primary); outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3); } input[type="color"] { width: 50px; height: 40px; border: 1.5px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; } input[type="range"] { width: 100%; height: 5px; border-radius: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3), rgba(255, 0, 110, 0.3)); outline: none; -webkit-appearance: none; } input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary)); cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.4); } input[type="range"]::-moz-range-thumb { width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary)); cursor: pointer; border: none; } .control-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .control-row input[type="range"] { flex: 1; } .value-display { min-width: 45px; padding: 5px 10px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.15), rgba(255, 0, 110, 0.15)); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.85em; text-align: center; color: var(--primary); } .preset-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px; margin-top: 10px; } .preset-btn { padding: 8px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border: 1.5px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 8px; color: var(--text-secondary); cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.85em; font-weight: 500; transition: all 0.3s ease; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; } .preset-btn:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary); } .preset-btn.active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.25), rgba(255, 0, 110, 0.25)); border-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary); box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2); } .checkbox-group { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin: 12px 0; } .checkbox-group input[type="checkbox"] { width: 18px; height: 18px; cursor: pointer; accent-color: var(--primary); } .checkbox-group label { margin: 0; cursor: pointer; } .preview-container { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 70%, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.05), transparent), radial-gradient(circle at 70% 30%, rgba(255, 0, 110, 0.05), transparent); border-radius: 20px; padding: 35px 20px; min-height: 450px; margin-bottom: 20px; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); overflow: auto; } #cardPreview { position: relative; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7); border-radius: 15px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; font-family: 'Raleway', sans-serif; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%); animation: cardFloat 4s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes cardFloat { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } 50% { transform: translateY(-8px); } } .card-top { padding: 20px 15px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.15) 0%, rgba(255, 0, 110, 0.08) 100%); border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.4); position: relative; overflow: hidden; text-align: center; } .card-logo { width: 70px; height: 70px; margin: 0 auto 10px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); border: 2px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.5); border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; position: relative; z-index: 5; } .card-logo img { max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; object-fit: contain; } .card-logo-placeholder { font-size: 1.8em; opacity: 0.5; } .card-institution { position: relative; z-index: 2; } .card-institution-name { margin: 0; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.2; } .card-tagline { line-height: 1.3; word-break: break-word; } .card-middle { padding: 20px 15px; flex: 1; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 0.8fr 1.2fr; gap: 15px; } .card-middle.no-photo { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0; } .card-photo-area { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; } .card-photo { width: 100px; height: 130px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.15), rgba(255, 0, 110, 0.1)); border: 2px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.45); border-radius: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } .card-photo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .card-photo-placeholder { font-size: 1.5em; opacity: 0.4; } .card-details { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; gap: 10px; } .detail-item { border-left: 3px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.6); padding-left: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .detail-label { font-size: 0.6em; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.8px; opacity: 0.55; margin-bottom: 1px; font-weight: 600; } .detail-value { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9em; line-height: 1.2; word-break: break-word; } .card-bottom { padding: 15px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; text-align: center; } .bottom-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 2px; } .bottom-label { font-size: 0.55em; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.7px; opacity: 0.45; font-weight: 600; } .bottom-value { font-size: 0.8em; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.1; } .action-buttons { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin-top: 15px; } .btn { padding: 12px 18px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 0.9em; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s ease; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px; } .btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, #00b8d4 100%); color: #000; } .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.35); } .btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; } .btn-secondary { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); color: var(--text-primary); border: 1.5px solid var(--border-color); } .btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); border-color: var(--primary); } .success-toast { position: fixed; bottom: 30px; right: 30px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--success) 0%, #00cc66 100%); color: #000; padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 10px; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0, 255, 136, 0.3); display: none; animation: toastSlide 0.3s ease; z-index: 1000; } .success-toast.show { display: block; } @keyframes toastSlide { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } @media (max-width: 1200px) { .main-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .header h1 { font-size: 2.3em; } } @media (max-width: 768px) { #cardPreview { width: 100%; max-width: 380px; } .card-middle { grid-template-columns: 0.7fr 1fr; } .preset-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .glass-panel { padding: 25px; } } .divider { width: 100%; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--border-color), transparent); margin: 18px 0; } .info-text { font-size: 0.8em; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 6px; padding: 6px 10px; background: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.08); border-left: 2px solid var(--primary); border-radius: 4px; } .hidden { display: none !important; } .loading { display: inline-block; width: 12px; height: 12px; border: 2px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); border-top-color: #000; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.6s linear infinite; margin-left: 5px; } @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } </style> </head> <body> <div class="container"> <div class="header"> <h1>✦ ID CARD STUDIO ✦</h1> <p>Design Your Professional Student Identity Card</p> </div> <div class="main-grid"> <!-- Left Panel - Controls --> <div class="glass-panel"> <div class="panel-title">Settings</div> <!-- Card Dimensions --> <div class="form-section"> <span class="section-label">📐 Dimensions</span> <div class="form-group"> <label>Width (px)</label> <div class="control-row"> <input type="range" id="cardWidth" min="300" max="600" value="500" step="10"> <span class="value-display" id="widthValue">500px</span> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Height (px)</label> <div class="control-row"> <input type="range" id="cardHeight" min="250" max="400" value="320" step="10"> <span class="value-display" id="heightValue">320px</span> </div> </div> </div> <div class="divider"></div> <!-- Institution Setup --> <div class="form-section"> <span class="section-label">🏫 Institution</span> <div class="form-group"> <label>Logo Image</label> <input type="file" id="logoUpload" accept="image/*"> <div class="info-text">Upload PNG/JPG</div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Institution Name</label> <input type="text" id="institutionName" placeholder="University Name" value="XYZ University"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Name Font</label> <select id="instNameFont"> <option value="'Syne', sans-serif" selected>Syne</option> <option value="'Clash Display', sans-serif">Clash Display</option> <option value="'Space Grotesk', sans-serif">Space Grotesk</option> <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif">Raleway</option> </select> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Name Size</label> <div class="control-row"> <input type="range" id="instNameSize" min="14" max="26" value="18" step="1"> <span class="value-display" id="instNameSizeValue">18px</span> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Name Color</label> <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px;"> <input type="color" id="instNameColor" value="#00d9ff"> </div> </div> <div class="checkbox-group"> <input type="checkbox" id="instNameBold" checked> <label for="instNameBold">Bold</label> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Tagline</label> <input type="text" id="tagline" placeholder="Enter tagline" value="Official ID Card"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Tagline Size</label> <div class="control-row"> <input type="range" id="taglineSize" min="8" max="13" value="10" step="1"> <span class="value-display" id="taglineSizeValue">10px</span> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Tagline Color</label> <input type="color" id="taglineColor" value="#ffffff"> </div> </div> <div class="divider"></div> <!-- Student Photo --> <div class="form-section"> <span class="section-label">📸 Photo</span> <div class="form-group"> <label>Upload Photo</label> <input type="file" id="photoUpload" accept="image/*"> </div> <div class="checkbox-group"> <input type="checkbox" id="showPhoto" checked> <label for="showPhoto">Show Photo</label> </div> </div> <div class="divider"></div> <!-- Background --> <div class="form-section"> <span class="section-label">🎨 Background</span> <div class="form-group"> <label>Type</label> <select id="bgType"> <option value="gradient" selected>Gradient</option> <option value="solid">Solid</option> <option value="image">Image</option> </select> </div> <div id="gradientPresets" class="form-group"> <label>Gradient</label> <div class="preset-grid"> <button type="button" class="preset-btn active" data-gradient="linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%)">Dark</button> <button type="button" class="preset-btn" data-gradient="linear-gradient(135deg, #0f3460 0%, #16213e 100%)">Ocean</button> <button type="button" class="preset-btn" data-gradient="linear-gradient(135deg, #2d1b3d 0%, #1a0e2e 100%)">Purple</button> <button type="button" class="preset-btn" data-gradient="linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3a3a 0%, #0d2828 100%)">Teal</button> <button type="button" class="preset-btn" data-gradient="linear-gradient(135deg, #3d1429 0%, #1a0a2e 100%)">Magenta</button> <button type="button" class="preset-btn" data-gradient="linear-gradient(135deg, #1a2332 0%, #0f2229 100%)">Midnight</button> </div> </div> <div id="solidBgColor" class="form-group hidden"> <label>Color</label> <input type="color" id="bgColor" value="#1a1a2e"> </div> <div id="imageBgInput" class="form-group hidden"> <label>Image</label> <input type="file" id="bgImageUpload" accept="image/*"> </div> </div> <div class="divider"></div> <!-- Design --> <div class="form-section"> <span class="section-label">🎭 Design</span> <div class="form-group"> <label>Border</label> <div class="preset-grid"> <button type="button" class="preset-btn active" data-border="none">None</button> <button type="button" class="preset-btn" data-border="solid">Solid</button> <button type="button" class="preset-btn" data-border="dotted">Dotted</button> <button type="button" class="preset-btn" data-border="dashed">Dashed</button> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Border Color</label> <input type="color" id="borderColor" value="#00d9ff"> </div> </div> </div> <!-- Right Panel --> <div> <!-- Student Info --> <div class="glass-panel" style="margin-bottom: 30px;"> <div class="panel-title">Details</div> <div class="form-section"> <span class="section-label">👤 Student</span> <div class="form-group"> <label>Full Name</label> <input type="text" id="studentName" placeholder="Student Name" value="John Doe"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Name Font</label> <select id="nameFont"> <option value="'Space Grotesk', sans-serif" selected>Space Grotesk</option> <option value="'Syne', sans-serif">Syne</option> <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif">Raleway</option> </select> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Name Size</label> <div class="control-row"> <input type="range" id="nameSize" min="12" max="20" value="15" step="1"> <span class="value-display" id="nameSizeValue">15px</span> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Name Color</label> <input type="color" id="nameColor" value="#ffffff"> </div> <div class="checkbox-group"> <input type="checkbox" id="nameBold" checked> <label for="nameBold">Bold</label> </div> </div> <div class="form-section"> <span class="section-label">🆔 Info</span> <div class="form-group"> <label>Student ID</label> <input type="text" id="studentId" placeholder="ID" value="STU-2024-001"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Department</label> <input type="text" id="department" placeholder="Department" value="Computer Science"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Address</label> <textarea id="address" placeholder="Address" rows="2">123 Main Street, New York</textarea> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Address Size</label> <div class="control-row"> <input type="range" id="addressSize" min="8" max="11" value="9" step="1"> <span class="value-display" id="addressSizeValue">9px</span> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Address Color</label> <input type="color" id="addressColor" value="#cccccc"> </div> </div> <div class="form-section"> <span class="section-label">✍️ Signature</span> <div class="form-group"> <label>Signature Name</label> <input type="text" id="signature" placeholder="Signature" value="John Doe"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Size</label> <div class="control-row"> <input type="range" id="signatureSize" min="9" max="14" value="11" step="1"> <span class="value-display" id="signatureSizeValue">11px</span> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Color</label> <input type="color" id="signatureColor" value="#ffffff"> </div> </div> <div class="form-section"> <span class="section-label">📅 Dates</span> <div class="form-group"> <label>Issue Date</label> <input type="date" id="issueDate"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Expiry Date</label> <input type="date" id="expiryDate"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Date Color</label> <input type="color" id="dateColor" value="#999999"> </div> </div> </div> <!-- Preview --> <div class="glass-panel"> <div class="panel-title">Preview</div> <div class="preview-container"> <div id="cardPreview"></div> </div> <div class="action-buttons"> <button class="btn btn-primary" id="downloadBtn" onclick="downloadCard()">⬇️ Download JPG</button> <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="resetForm()">🔄 Reset</button> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="success-toast" id="toast">✓ Downloaded!</div> <script> function formatDate(dateStr) { if (!dateStr) return 'DD/MM/YYYY'; const date = new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00'); const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0'); const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0'); const year = date.getFullYear(); return `${day}/${month}/${year}`; } function renderCard() { const cardPreview = document.getElementById('cardPreview'); const width = parseInt(document.getElementById('cardWidth').value) || 500; const height = parseInt(document.getElementById('cardHeight').value) || 320; const showPhoto = document.getElementById('showPhoto').checked; cardPreview.style.width = width + 'px'; cardPreview.style.height = height + 'px'; // Get values const institutionName = document.getElementById('institutionName').value || 'Institution Name'; const tagline = document.getElementById('tagline').value || 'Official ID Card'; const studentName = document.getElementById('studentName').value || 'Student Name'; const studentId = document.getElementById('studentId').value || 'ID'; const department = document.getElementById('department').value || 'Department'; const address = document.getElementById('address').value || 'Address'; const signature = document.getElementById('signature').value || 'Signature'; // Styles const instNameFont = document.getElementById('instNameFont').value; const instNameSize = parseInt(document.getElementById('instNameSize').value); const instNameColor = document.getElementById('instNameColor').value; const instNameBold = document.getElementById('instNameBold').checked ? 'bold' : 'normal'; const taglineSize = parseInt(document.getElementById('taglineSize').value); const taglineColor = document.getElementById('taglineColor').value; const nameFont = document.getElementById('nameFont').value; const nameSize = parseInt(document.getElementById('nameSize').value); const nameColor = document.getElementById('nameColor').value; const nameBold = document.getElementById('nameBold').checked ? 'bold' : 'normal'; const addressSize = parseInt(document.getElementById('addressSize').value); const addressColor = document.getElementById('addressColor').value; const signatureSize = parseInt(document.getElementById('signatureSize').value); const signatureColor = document.getElementById('signatureColor').value; const dateColor = document.getElementById('dateColor').value; const issueDate = formatDate(document.getElementById('issueDate').value); const expiryDate = formatDate(document.getElementById('expiryDate').value); cardPreview.innerHTML = ` <div class="card-top"> <div class="card-logo"> ${document.getElementById('logoUpload').files.length > 0 ? '<img id="logo" src="" alt="Logo">' : '<div class="card-logo-placeholder">🏫</div>'} </div> <div class="card-institution"> <div class="card-institution-name" style="font-family: ${instNameFont}; font-size: ${instNameSize}px; color: ${instNameColor}; font-weight: ${instNameBold};"> ${institutionName} </div> <div class="card-tagline" style="font-size: ${taglineSize}px; color: ${taglineColor};"> ${tagline} </div> </div> </div> <div class="card-middle ${showPhoto ? '' : 'no-photo'}"> ${showPhoto ? ` <div class="card-photo-area"> <div class="card-photo"> ${document.getElementById('photoUpload').files.length > 0 ? '<img id="photo" src="" alt="Photo">' : '<div class="card-photo-placeholder">📷</div>'} </div> </div> ` : ''} <div class="card-details"> <div class="detail-item"> <div class="detail-label">Name</div> <div class="detail-value" style="font-family: ${nameFont}; font-size: ${nameSize}px; color: ${nameColor}; font-weight: ${nameBold};"> ${studentName} </div> </div> <div class="detail-item"> <div class="detail-label">ID</div> <div class="detail-value" style="font-size: 13px;"> ${studentId} </div> </div> <div class="detail-item"> <div class="detail-label">Dept</div> <div class="detail-value" style="font-size: 12px;"> ${department} </div> </div> <div class="detail-item"> <div class="detail-label">Address</div> <div class="detail-value" style="font-size: ${addressSize}px; color: ${addressColor};"> ${address} </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="card-bottom"> <div class="bottom-item"> <div class="bottom-label">Issued</div> <div class="bottom-value" style="color: ${dateColor}; font-size: 11px;">${issueDate}</div> </div> <div class="bottom-item"> <div class="bottom-label">Expires</div> <div class="bottom-value" style="color: ${dateColor}; font-size: 11px;">${expiryDate}</div> </div> <div class="bottom-item"> <div class="bottom-label">Signature</div> <div class="bottom-value" style="font-size: ${signatureSize}px; color: ${signatureColor};"> ${signature} </div> </div> </div> `; // Load images if (document.getElementById('logoUpload').files.length > 0) { const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = (e) => { const img = document.getElementById('logo'); if (img) img.src = e.target.result; }; reader.readAsDataURL(document.getElementById('logoUpload').files[0]); } if (document.getElementById('photoUpload').files.length > 0 && showPhoto) { const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = (e) => { const img = document.getElementById('photo'); if (img) img.src = e.target.result; }; reader.readAsDataURL(document.getElementById('photoUpload').files[0]); } updateBackground(); updateBorder(); } function updateBackground() { const bgType = document.getElementById('bgType').value; const cardPreview = document.getElementById('cardPreview'); if (bgType === 'solid') { cardPreview.style.background = document.getElementById('bgColor').value; } else if (bgType === 'gradient') { const active = document.querySelector('[data-gradient].active'); cardPreview.style.background = active ? active.dataset.gradient : 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%)'; } else if (bgType === 'image') { if (document.getElementById('bgImageUpload').files.length > 0) { const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = (e) => { cardPreview.style.backgroundImage = `url(${e.target.result})`; cardPreview.style.backgroundSize = 'cover'; }; reader.readAsDataURL(document.getElementById('bgImageUpload').files[0]); } } } function updateBorder() { const borderStyle = document.querySelector('[data-border].active'); const cardPreview = document.getElementById('cardPreview'); if (borderStyle && borderStyle.dataset.border !== 'none') { cardPreview.style.border = `3px ${borderStyle.dataset.border} ${document.getElementById('borderColor').value}`; } else { cardPreview.style.border = '1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)'; } } async function downloadCard() { const downloadBtn = document.getElementById('downloadBtn'); downloadBtn.disabled = true; downloadBtn.textContent = '⏳ Processing...'; try { const cardElement = document.getElementById('cardPreview'); // Use html2canvas to convert the card to canvas const canvas = await html2canvas(cardElement, { scale: 2, backgroundColor: null, logging: false, useCORS: true, allowTaint: true }); // Create a new canvas for JPG (JPG doesn't support transparency) const jpgCanvas = document.createElement('canvas'); jpgCanvas.width = canvas.width; jpgCanvas.height = canvas.height; const ctx = jpgCanvas.getContext('2d'); // Fill white background first ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, jpgCanvas.width, jpgCanvas.height); // Draw the card on top ctx.drawImage(canvas, 0, 0); // Convert to JPG and download jpgCanvas.toBlob((blob) => { const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = url; link.download = `student-id-card-${Date.now()}.jpg`; document.body.appendChild(link); link.click(); document.body.removeChild(link); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); // Show success message const toast = document.getElementById('toast'); toast.textContent = '✓ Downloaded as JPG!'; toast.classList.add('show'); setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('show'), 3000); downloadBtn.disabled = false; downloadBtn.textContent = '⬇️ Download JPG'; }, 'image/jpeg', 0.95); } catch (error) { console.error('Download error:', error); const toast = document.getElementById('toast'); toast.textContent = '✗ Download failed. Try again.'; toast.classList.add('show'); setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('show'), 3000); downloadBtn.disabled = false; downloadBtn.textContent = '⬇️ Download JPG'; } } function resetForm() { document.getElementById('institutionName').value = ''; document.getElementById('tagline').value = ''; document.getElementById('studentName').value = ''; document.getElementById('studentId').value = ''; document.getElementById('department').value = ''; document.getElementById('address').value = ''; document.getElementById('signature').value = ''; const today = new Date(); document.getElementById('issueDate').valueAsDate = today; const nextYear = new Date(today); nextYear.setFullYear(nextYear.getFullYear() + 4); document.getElementById('expiryDate').valueAsDate = nextYear; renderCard(); } // Event Listeners ['cardWidth', 'cardHeight'].forEach(id => { document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('input', function() { const displayId = id === 'cardWidth' ? 'widthValue' : 'heightValue'; document.getElementById(displayId).textContent = this.value + 'px'; renderCard(); }); }); ['instNameSize', 'taglineSize', 'nameSize', 'addressSize', 'signatureSize'].forEach(id => { document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('input', function() { const displayId = id + 'Value'; document.getElementById(displayId).textContent = this.value + 'px'; renderCard(); }); }); ['institutionName', 'tagline', 'studentName', 'studentId', 'department', 'address', 'signature'].forEach(id => { document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('input', renderCard); }); ['instNameFont', 'nameFont', 'bgType'].forEach(id => { document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('change', function() { if (this.id === 'bgType') { document.getElementById('gradientPresets').classList.toggle('hidden', this.value !== 'gradient'); document.getElementById('solidBgColor').classList.toggle('hidden', this.value !== 'solid'); document.getElementById('imageBgInput').classList.toggle('hidden', this.value !== 'image'); } renderCard(); }); }); ['instNameColor', 'taglineColor', 'nameColor', 'addressColor', 'signatureColor', 'dateColor', 'bgColor'].forEach(id => { document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('change', renderCard); }); document.getElementById('borderColor').addEventListener('change', updateBorder); ['instNameBold', 'nameBold', 'showPhoto'].forEach(id => { document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('change', renderCard); }); ['logoUpload', 'photoUpload', 'bgImageUpload'].forEach(id => { document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('change', renderCard); }); document.querySelectorAll('[data-gradient]').forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', function() { document.querySelectorAll('[data-gradient]').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); this.classList.add('active'); renderCard(); }); }); document.querySelectorAll('[data-border]').forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', function() { document.querySelectorAll('[data-border]').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); this.classList.add('active'); updateBorder(); }); }); ['issueDate', 'expiryDate'].forEach(id => { document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('change', renderCard); }); // Initialize window.addEventListener('load', () => { const today = new Date(); document.getElementById('issueDate').valueAsDate = today; const nextYear = new Date(today); nextYear.setFullYear(nextYear.getFullYear() + 4); document.getElementById('expiryDate').valueAsDate = nextYear; renderCard(); }); </script> </body> </html> <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title>EduCard Studio — Student ID Generator</title> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Crimson+Pro:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,400&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Cinzel:wght@400;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;1,400&family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@300;400;600;700&family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=Syne:wght@400;700;800&family=Raleway:wght@300;400;600;700&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=Josefin+Sans:wght@300;400;600&family=Oswald:wght@300;400;600&family=Libre+Baskerville:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Orbitron:wght@400;700&family=Righteous&family=Dancing+Script:wght@600;700&family=Nunito:wght@300;400;700&family=Poppins:wght@300;400;600;700&family=Monoton" rel="stylesheet"> <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js"></script> <style> :root{ --ink:#080910;--surface:#10121e;--panel:#13162b; --lift:#1b1f38;--rim:#252a4a; --gold:#c9a84c;--gold2:#f0d080; --cyan:#00e5ff;--rose:#ff4d6d;--sage:#5effa0; --text:#dde3f5;--muted:#6878a8; } *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;} html,body{height:100%;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;background:var(--ink);color:var(--text);overflow-x:hidden;} body{display:flex;flex-direction:column;} /* TOPBAR */ .topbar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:0 28px;height:60px;background:var(--panel);border-bottom:1px solid var(--rim);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:200;flex-shrink:0;} .tb-gem{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--gold2));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(201,168,76,.4);} .tb-name{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:1.55rem;letter-spacing:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),var(--gold2),var(--gold));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;} .tb-badge{margin-left:auto;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 12px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1.2px;opacity:.8;} /* LAYOUT */ .workspace{display:flex;flex:1;min-height:0;} /* SIDEBAR */ .sidebar{width:370px;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--panel);border-right:1px solid var(--rim);overflow-y:auto;height:calc(100vh - 60px);} .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px;} .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--rim);border-radius:3px;} /* accordion */ .acc{border-bottom:1px solid var(--rim);} .acc-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:13px 18px;cursor:pointer;background:var(--lift);transition:background .2s;user-select:none;} .acc-head:hover{background:#1e2340;} .acc-ico{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;flex-shrink:0;} .acc-title{font-size:.74rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.8px;text-transform:uppercase;} .acc-arr{margin-left:auto;color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;transition:transform .3s;} .acc-body{padding:15px 18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px;} .acc-body.shut{display:none;} /* fields */ label{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.9px;text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:4px;} input[type=text],input[type=date],input[type=number],select,textarea{width:100%;background:#080910;border:1px solid var(--rim);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 11px;font-size:.82rem;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;} input:focus,select:focus,textarea:focus{border-color:var(--gold);} input[type=color]{width:100%;height:34px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--rim);background:#080910;cursor:pointer;padding:2px;} input[type=range]{width:100%;accent-color:var(--gold);} .g2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:9px;} .field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;} .upload-slot{border:2px dashed var(--rim);border-radius:9px;padding:12px 10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;font-size:.74rem;color:var(--muted);} .upload-slot:hover{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,.04);} .upload-slot .ui{font-size:19px;margin-bottom:3px;} .presets{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;} .pre-btn{background:#080910;border:1px solid var(--rim);border-radius:6px;color:var(--muted);padding:5px 9px;font-size:.7rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;letter-spacing:.5px;} .pre-btn:hover,.pre-btn.on{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,.07);} .tab-row{display:flex;gap:3px;background:#080910;border-radius:8px;padding:3px;} .tab-btn{flex:1;padding:6px;background:transparent;border:none;border-radius:6px;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:.7rem;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.6px;transition:all .2s;} .tab-btn.on{background:var(--gold);color:#000;} .sty-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:7px;} .sty-opt{border:2px solid var(--rim);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 4px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;font-size:.63rem;color:var(--muted);transition:all .2s;} .sty-opt:hover,.sty-opt.on{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);} .sty-opt .si{font-size:16px;margin-bottom:2px;} .fgrp{background:rgba(0,0,0,.22);border-radius:9px;padding:11px;border:1px solid var(--rim);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;} .fgrp-ttl{font-size:.67rem;color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.2px;text-transform:uppercase;} .fsrow{display:flex;gap:5px;} .fsbtn{flex:1;padding:6px;background:#080910;border:1px solid var(--rim);border-radius:7px;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;text-align:center;transition:all .2s;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;} .fsbtn:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);} .fsbtn.on{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,.1);} small{font-size:.64rem;color:var(--muted);display:block;margin-top:2px;} .tgl-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;cursor:pointer;} .tgl-row input{width:auto;cursor:pointer;} .gr-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;} /* MAIN PREVIEW */ .main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:var(--ink);background-image:radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 30%,rgba(0,229,255,.05) 0%,transparent 55%),radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 70%,rgba(201,168,76,.06) 0%,transparent 55%);padding:40px 20px;gap:26px;min-height:0;overflow-y:auto;} .main-lbl{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;} /* ══════════════════ THE CARD ══════════════════ */ #idCard{position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:box-shadow .4s;flex-shrink:0;} /* holographic sheen */ #idCard::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:30;background:linear-gradient(115deg,transparent 25%,rgba(255,255,255,.07) 48%,rgba(255,255,255,.04) 52%,transparent 75%);background-size:300% 100%;animation:sheen 5s ease-in-out infinite;pointer-events:none;} @keyframes sheen{0%{background-position:200% 0}65%{background-position:-200% 0}100%{background-position:-200% 0}} /* content above everything */ .c-content{position:relative;z-index:10;width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;} /* left stripe */ .c-stripe{position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:7px;z-index:15;border-radius:inherit 0 0 inherit;} /* rainbow bottom bar */ .c-bar{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;z-index:25;animation:barSlide 4s linear infinite;} @keyframes barSlide{to{background-position:200% 0}} /* SVG decor */ #cDecor{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:5;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;} #cDecor svg{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;} /* HEADER */ .c-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:11px 14px 7px 16px;} .c-logo-ring{width:50px;height:50px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden;position:relative;} .c-logo-ring::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-2px;border-radius:50%;background:conic-gradient(var(--gold),var(--gold2),rgba(255,255,255,.1),var(--gold));z-index:-1;animation:spin 7s linear infinite;} @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}} .c-logo-ring img,.logo-ph{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;} .logo-ph{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;opacity:.38;} .c-head-txt{flex:1;min-width:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;} #cInst{text-align:center;line-height:1.15;letter-spacing:.4px;} #cSub{text-align:center;opacity:.82;letter-spacing:.3px;margin-top:1px;} .c-pill{background:rgba(0,0,0,.38);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);border-radius:20px;padding:3px 9px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.52rem;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);flex-shrink:0;white-space:nowrap;} /* divider */ .c-rule{height:1px;margin:0 12px 0 16px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),rgba(255,255,255,.12),transparent);} /* BODY */ .c-body{flex:1;display:flex;gap:0;padding:8px 12px 6px 16px;min-height:0;} .c-photo-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;margin-right:11px;} .c-photo-frame{border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;flex-shrink:0;} .c-photo-frame::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(201,168,76,.12) 0%,transparent 55%);pointer-events:none;} .photo-ph{font-size:26px;opacity:.22;} .c-photo-frame img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;} /* info */ .c-info{flex:1;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3px 8px;align-content:start;} .ci{display:flex;flex-direction:column;} .ci-lbl{font-size:.54rem;opacity:.58;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;font-weight:700;line-height:1;} .ci-val{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;line-height:1.2;margin-top:1px;} .ci-full{grid-column:1/-1;} /* FOOTER */ .c-foot{padding:5px 12px 9px 16px;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;} .c-dates{display:flex;gap:14px;} .c-date{display:flex;flex-direction:column;} .c-dlbl{font-size:.5rem;opacity:.58;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;} .c-dval{font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;} .c-sig{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;} .c-sigline{width:68px;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.28);margin-bottom:3px;} .c-sigrlbl{font-size:.49rem;opacity:.58;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;} .c-signame{font-size:.63rem;font-weight:700;} /* outline classes */ .out-none{} .out-solid{border:3px solid;} .out-glow{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(201,168,76,.8),0 0 28px rgba(201,168,76,.4)!important;} .out-dashed{border:3px dashed;} .out-double{outline:3px solid;outline-offset:3px;} /* DOWNLOAD */ .dl-row{display:flex;gap:10px;} .btn{padding:11px 26px;border-radius:9px;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:.82rem;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;transition:all .2s;} .btn-g{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--gold2));color:#000;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(201,168,76,.32);} .btn-g:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 26px rgba(201,168,76,.48);} .btn-gh{background:var(--lift);color:var(--text);border:1px solid var(--rim);} .btn-gh:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);} .note{font-size:.63rem;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;max-width:400px;line-height:1.65;} .note b{color:var(--gold);} </style> </head> <body> <div class="topbar"> <div class="tb-gem">🎓</div> <div class="tb-name">EduCard Studio</div> <div class="tb-badge">✦ GitHub Student Pack Verified</div> </div> <div class="workspace"> <!-- SIDEBAR --> <div class="sidebar"> <!-- CARD SIZE --> <div class="acc"> <div class="acc-head" onclick="tog(this)"> <div class="acc-ico" style="background:rgba(0,229,255,.12);color:#00e5ff;">📐</div> <span class="acc-title">Card Size</span><span class="acc-arr">▼</span> </div> <div class="acc-body"> <div><label>Quick Presets</label> <div class="presets"> <button class="pre-btn on" onclick="setSize(340,200,this)">CR80</button> <button class="pre-btn" onclick="setSize(360,210,this)">Standard+</button> <button class="pre-btn" onclick="setSize(300,180,this)">Mini</button> <button class="pre-btn" onclick="setSize(400,240,this)">Large</button> <button class="pre-btn" onclick="setSize(420,260,this)">XL</button> </div> </div> <div class="g2"> <div class="field"><label>Width (px)</label><input type="number" id="cW" value="340" min="200" max="600" onchange="syncSize()"></div> <div class="field"><label>Height (px)</label><input type="number" id="cH" value="200" min="130" max="400" onchange="syncSize()"></div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- INSTITUTION --> <div class="acc"> <div class="acc-head" onclick="tog(this)"> <div class="acc-ico" style="background:rgba(201,168,76,.12);color:#c9a84c;">🏛️</div> <span class="acc-title">Institution</span><span class="acc-arr">▼</span> </div> <div class="acc-body"> <div> <label>Logo</label> <div class="upload-slot" onclick="document.getElementById('logoFile').click()"><div class="ui">🖼️</div><div id="logoTxt">Click to upload logo</div></div> <input type="file" id="logoFile" accept="image/*" style="display:none" onchange="loadImg(event,'cLogoImg','logoTxt','logoPlh')"> </div> <div class="field"><label>Institution Name</label><input type="text" id="institution" value="Dhaka University" oninput="render()"></div> <div class="field"><label>Tagline / Faculty (centered, below name)</label><input type="text" id="subtitle" value="Faculty of Science & Technology" oninput="render()"></div> </div> </div> <!-- STUDENT INFO --> <div class="acc"> <div class="acc-head" onclick="tog(this)"> <div class="acc-ico" style="background:rgba(94,255,160,.12);color:#5effa0;">👤</div> <span class="acc-title">Student Info</span><span class="acc-arr">▼</span> </div> <div class="acc-body"> <div> <label>Student Photo (optional)</label> <div class="upload-slot" onclick="document.getElementById('photoFile').click()"><div class="ui">📷</div><div id="photoTxt">Click to upload photo</div></div> <input type="file" id="photoFile" accept="image/*" style="display:none" onchange="loadImg(event,'cPhotoImg','photoTxt','photoPlh')"> <label class="tgl-row" style="margin-top:8px;"><input type="checkbox" id="showPhoto" checked onchange="render()"> Show Photo on Card</label> </div> <div class="g2"> <div class="field"><label>Full Name</label><input type="text" id="sName" value="Md. Arif Rahman" oninput="render()"></div> <div class="field"><label>Student ID</label><input type="text" id="sId" value="2024-CS-0142" oninput="render()"></div> </div> <div class="g2"> <div class="field"><label>Department</label><input type="text" id="sDept" value="Computer Science" oninput="render()"></div> <div class="field"><label>Session / Batch</label><input type="text" id="sSess" value="2024–25" oninput="render()"></div> </div> <div class="g2"> <div class="field"><label>Blood Group</label> <select id="sBlood" onchange="render()"><option>A+</option><option>A−</option><option>B+</option><option>B−</option><option>AB+</option><option>AB−</option><option>O+</option><option>O−</option></select> </div> <div class="field"><label>Date of Birth</label><input type="date" id="sDob" value="2002-06-15" onchange="render()"></div> <div class="field"><label>Gender</label> <select id="sGender" onchange="render()"><option>Male</option><option>Female</option><option>Other</option></select> </div> </div> <div class="field"><label>Address</label><textarea id="sAddr" rows="2" style="resize:none;" oninput="render()">House 12, Road 5, Dhanmondi, Dhaka-1205</textarea></div> <div class="g2"> <div class="field"><label>Issue Date</label><input type="date" id="sIssue" value="2024-01-15" onchange="render()"></div> <div class="field"><label>Expiry Date</label><input type="date" id="sExp" value="2027-12-31" onchange="render()"></div> </div> <div class="field"><label>Authorized Signature (Name)</label><input type="text" id="sSig" value="Prof. Dr. A. Rahman" oninput="render()"><small>Appears below the signature line</small></div> </div> </div> <!-- BACKGROUND --> <div class="acc"> <div class="acc-head" onclick="tog(this)"> <div class="acc-ico" style="background:rgba(255,77,109,.12);color:#ff4d6d;">🎨</div> <span class="acc-title">Background</span><span class="acc-arr">▼</span> </div> <div class="acc-body"> <div><label>Type</label> <div class="tab-row"> <button class="tab-btn on" onclick="setBg('solid',this)">Solid</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="setBg('gradient',this)">Gradient</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="setBg('image',this)">Image</button> </div> </div> <div id="bgSolid"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="bgCol" value="#0b1a3d" onchange="render()"></div> <div id="bgGrad" style="display:none;"> <div class="gr-row"> <div class="field"><label>Color 1</label><input type="color" id="gC1" value="#0b1a3d" onchange="render()"></div> <div class="field"><label>Color 2</label><input type="color" id="gC2" value="#1a0b3d" onchange="render()"></div> </div> <div class="field" style="margin-top:6px;"><label>Direction</label> <select id="gDir" onchange="render()"> <option value="135deg">↘ Diagonal</option> <option value="90deg">↓ Vertical</option> <option value="0deg">→ Horizontal</option> <option value="45deg">↗ Anti-Diagonal</option> <option value="180deg">↑ Vertical Up</option> </select> </div> </div> <div id="bgImg" style="display:none;"> <div class="upload-slot" onclick="document.getElementById('bgFile').click()"><div class="ui">🖼️</div><div id="bgTxt">Click to upload background image</div></div> <input type="file" id="bgFile" accept="image/*" style="display:none" onchange="loadBg(event)"> </div> </div> </div> <!-- ACCENT & OUTLINE --> <div class="acc"> <div class="acc-head" onclick="tog(this)"> <div class="acc-ico" style="background:rgba(201,168,76,.12);color:#c9a84c;">✦</div> <span class="acc-title">Accent Stripe & Outline</span><span class="acc-arr">▼</span> </div> <div class="acc-body"> <div class="g2"> <div class="field"><label>Stripe Color 1</label><input type="color" id="stripe1" value="#c9a84c" onchange="render()"></div> <div class="field"><label>Stripe Color 2</label><input type="color" id="stripe2" value="#f0d080" onchange="render()"></div> </div> <div class="field"><label>Outline Style</label> <div class="sty-grid"> <div class="sty-opt on" onclick="setOutline('out-none',this)"><div class="si">◻</div>None</div> <div class="sty-opt" onclick="setOutline('out-solid',this)"><div class="si">🔲</div>Solid</div> <div class="sty-opt" onclick="setOutline('out-glow',this)"><div class="si">✨</div>Glow</div> <div class="sty-opt" onclick="setOutline('out-dashed',this)"><div class="si">📋</div>Dashed</div> <div class="sty-opt" onclick="setOutline('out-double',this)"><div class="si">⬛</div>Double</div> </div> </div> <div class="field"><label>Outline Color</label><input type="color" id="outlineCol" value="#c9a84c" onchange="render()"></div> <div class="field"><label>Corner Radius (px)</label> <input type="range" id="corners" min="0" max="30" value="14"
