font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-muted); letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px; } input[type="text"], input[type="date"], select, textarea { width: 100%; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.83rem; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; outline: none; } input[type="text"]:focus, input[type="date"]:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus { border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(108,99,255,0.2); } select option { background: var(--bg); } textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 60px; } input[type="number"] { width: 100%; background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.83rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; } input[type="number"]:focus { border-color: var(--accent); } input[type="color"] { width: 40px; height: 34px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; background: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 2px; } input[type="range"] { width: 100%; accent-color: var(--accent); } .row2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; } .row3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; } /* Buttons */ .btn { padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; transition: all 0.2s; } .btn-accent { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), #8a84ff); color: #fff; } .btn-accent:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(108,99,255,0.4); } .btn-outline { background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-muted); } .btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); } .btn-danger { background: rgba(255,101,132,0.15); color: var(--accent2); border: 1px solid rgba(255,101,132,0.3); } .btn-success { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #43e97b, #38f9d7); color: #0d0d14; width: 100%; padding: 14px; font-size: 0.9rem; } .btn-success:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(67,233,123,0.3); } /* Upload Area */ .upload-area { border: 2px dashed var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 20px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; position: relative; } .upload-area:hover { border-color: var(--accent); background: rgba(108,99,255,0.05); } .upload-area input[type="file"] { position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0; cursor: pointer; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .upload-area .up-icon { font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 6px; } .upload-area p { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); } /* Font style toggles */ .style-toggles { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .style-btn { padding: 5px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: var(--text-muted); cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.78rem; transition: all 0.2s; font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif; } .style-btn.active { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border-color: var(--accent); } /* Size presets */ .size-presets { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 10px; } .preset-btn { padding: 5px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: var(--text-muted); cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.72rem; transition: all 0.2s; font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif; } .preset-btn:hover, .preset-btn.active { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); } /* Color + input row */ .color-input-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; } .color-input-row input[type="text"] { flex: 1; } /* Gradient row */ .grad-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; } /* Tabs */ .tabs { display: flex; gap: 4px; background: var(--bg); border-radius: 8px; padding: 4px; } .tab { flex: 1; padding: 7px; border: none; background: transparent; color: var(--text-muted); cursor: pointer; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Josefin Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px; transition: all 0.2s; } .tab.active { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; } /* Texture grid */ .texture-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px; } .texture-opt { aspect-ratio: 1.6; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .texture-opt:hover, .texture-opt.selected { border-color: var(--accent); } .texture-opt span { position: absolute; bottom: 4px; left: 0; right: 0; text-align: center; font-size: 0.65rem; color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 1px 3px #000; } /* Outline styles */ .outline-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px; } .outline-opt { aspect-ratio: 1.5; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid var(--border); cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--text-muted); transition: all 0.2s; text-align: center; } .outline-opt:hover, .outline-opt.selected { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); } /* Preview area */ .preview-area { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start; padding: 40px 30px; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, rgba(108,99,255,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%), var(--bg); gap: 30px; overflow-y: auto; } .preview-label { font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-muted); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .preview-label::before, .preview-label::after { content: ''; flex: 1; height: 1px; background: var(--border); } /* ID Card */ #id-card-wrapper { position: relative; filter: drop-shadow(0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)); } #id-card { position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .card-inner { position: relative; z-index: 2; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; padding: 20px 18px 16px; gap: 0; } .card-bg-layer { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1; } /* Card elements */ .card-logo-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 4px; width: 100%; } .card-logo { width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size: 10px; overflow: hidden; } .card-logo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .card-inst-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-align: center; margin-top: 5px; line-height: 1.2; } .card-sub-text { text-align: center; font-size: 9px; margin-top: 2px; opacity: 0.85; } .card-divider { width: 90%; height: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); margin: 6px 0; } .card-id-label { font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; opacity: 0.7; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 4px; } .card-photo-wrap { width: 70px; height: 84px; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); font-size: 9px; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 6px; } .card-photo-wrap img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .card-info-table { width: 100%; font-size: 9px; } .card-info-table tr td { padding: 1.5px 0; } .card-info-table .info-label { opacity: 0.65; width: 45%; font-size: 8px; } .card-info-table .info-colon { opacity: 0.5; width: 6%; } .card-info-table .info-val { font-weight: 600; } .card-bottom { width: 100%; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; margin-top: auto; padding-top: 6px; } .card-sig-wrap { text-align: center; } .card-sig-line { width: 70px; height: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin: 0 auto 3px; } .card-sig-label { font-size: 7px; opacity: 0.65; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .card-dates { text-align: right; font-size: 7.5px; opacity: 0.75; } .card-dates span { display: block; } /* Card outline styles */ .outline-none { } .outline-simple { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.3) inset; } .outline-double { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.5) inset, 0 0 0 5px rgba(255,255,255,0.15) inset; } .outline-dashed { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.4) inset; outline: 2px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.3); outline-offset: -6px; } .outline-thick { box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(255,255,255,0.25) inset; } .outline-glow { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.5) inset, 0 0 20px rgba(108,99,255,0.5); } /* Download area */ .dl-area { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; max-width: 400px; } .dl-note { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; } /* Checkbox */ .check-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .check-row input[type="checkbox"] { accent-color: var(--accent); width: 15px; height: 15px; cursor: pointer; } .check-row label { margin: 0; text-transform: none; font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text); cursor: pointer; } /* Small field group */ .field-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } /* Font style row */ .font-ctrl-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 60px auto 26px; gap: 8px; align-items: end; } /* tag badge */ .badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; } .badge-gold { background: rgba(245,200,66,0.15); color: var(--gold); border: 1px solid rgba(245,200,66,0.3); } hr.sec-hr { border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); margin: 4px 0; } .subsec-label { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--accent); letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 2px; } .info-box { background: rgba(108,99,255,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(108,99,255,0.2); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.5; } .preview-top-bar { width: 100%; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; max-width: 600px; } </style> </head> <body> <header> <div class="logo">🎓</div> <div> <h1>Student ID Card Generator</h1> <p>Professional · Customizable · GitHub Student Ready</p> </div> </header> <div class="app"> <!-- SIDEBAR --> <div class="sidebar"> <!-- 1. Card Size --> <div class="section open" id="sec-size"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-size')"> <span class="sec-title"><span class="sec-icon">📐</span> Card Size</span> <span class="section-arrow">▼</span> </div> <div class="section-body"> <div> <label>Quick Presets</label> <div class="size-presets"> <button class="preset-btn active" onclick="applyPreset(85.6,54,'CR80 Standard')">CR80<br><small>85.6×54mm</small></button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(91,57,'GitHub Student')">GitHub<br><small>91×57mm</small></button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(100,70,'Large ID')">Large<br><small>100×70mm</small></button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(74,105,'A7')">A7<br><small>74×105mm</small></button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(105,148,'A6')">A6<br><small>105×148mm</small></button> </div> </div> <div class="row2"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Width (px)</label> <input type="number" id="card-w" value="340" min="200" max="700" onchange="updateCardSize()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Height (px)</label> <input type="number" id="card-h" value="215" min="150" max="700" onchange="updateCardSize()"> </div> </div> <div class="row2"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Border Radius (px)</label> <input type="number" id="card-radius" value="14" min="0" max="60" onchange="updateCardStyle()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Card Padding (px)</label> <input type="number" id="card-pad" value="20" min="8" max="50" onchange="updateCardStyle()"> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- 2. Institution Info --> <div class="section open" id="sec-inst"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-inst')"> <span class="sec-title"><span class="sec-icon">🏛️</span> Institution</span> <span class="section-arrow">▼</span> </div> <div class="section-body"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Logo Upload</label> <div class="upload-area" id="logo-drop"> <input type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="handleLogoUpload(this)"> <div class="up-icon">🖼️</div> <p>Click or drag to upload logo</p> <p style="font-size:0.65rem;margin-top:4px;">PNG, JPG, SVG — transparent preferred</p> </div> <button class="btn btn-danger" style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.72rem;padding:6px" onclick="clearLogo()">✕ Remove Logo</button> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Logo Size (px)</label> <input type="range" id="logo-size" min="30" max="90" value="56" oninput="updateLogoSize(this.value)"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Institution Name</label> <input type="text" id="inst-name" value="Springfield University" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="subsec-label">Institution Name Style</div> <div class="font-ctrl-row"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Font</label> <select id="inst-font" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="'Cinzel', serif">Cinzel</option> <option value="'Playfair Display', serif">Playfair Display</option> <option value="'Cormorant Garamond', serif" selected>Cormorant Garamond</option> <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Montserrat</option> <option value="'Josefin Sans', sans-serif">Josefin Sans</option> <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif">Raleway</option> <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif">Oswald</option> <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Bebas Neue</option> <option value="'Anton', sans-serif">Anton</option> <option value="'Abril Fatface', cursive">Abril Fatface</option> <option value="'Dancing Script', cursive">Dancing Script</option> <option value="'Pacifico', cursive">Pacifico</option> <option value="'Space Mono', monospace">Space Mono</option> <option value="'Merriweather', serif">Merriweather</option> <option value="'Libre Baskerville', serif">Libre Baskerville</option> <option value="'EB Garamond', serif">EB Garamond</option> <option value="'Nunito', sans-serif">Nunito</option> <option value="'Lato', sans-serif">Lato</option> </select> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Size</label> <input type="number" id="inst-size" value="14" min="8" max="32" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Color</label> <input type="color" id="inst-color" value="#ffffff" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;"> <label>Bold</label> <button class="style-btn active" id="inst-bold-btn" onclick="toggleBold('inst')">B</button> </div> </div> <hr class="sec-hr"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Sub-text (below institution name)</label> <input type="text" id="sub-text" value="Department of Computer Science" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="font-ctrl-row"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Font</label> <select id="sub-font" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="'Josefin Sans', sans-serif" selected>Josefin Sans</option> <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif">Raleway</option> <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Montserrat</option> <option value="'Lato', sans-serif">Lato</option> <option value="'Cinzel', serif">Cinzel</option> <option value="'Cormorant Garamond', serif">Cormorant</option> <option value="'Dancing Script', cursive">Dancing Script</option> <option value="'Space Mono', monospace">Space Mono</option> <option value="'Nunito', sans-serif">Nunito</option> </select> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Size</label> <input type="number" id="sub-size" value="9" min="6" max="20" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Color</label> <input type="color" id="sub-color" value="#e0e0e0" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Bold</label> <button class="style-btn" id="sub-bold-btn" onclick="toggleBold('sub')">B</button> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- 3. Student Info --> <div class="section open" id="sec-student"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-student')"> <span class="sec-title"><span class="sec-icon">👤</span> Student Info</span> <span class="section-arrow">▼</span> </div> <div class="section-body"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Student Photo (Optional)</label> <div class="upload-area"> <input type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="handlePhotoUpload(this)"> <div class="up-icon">📷</div> <p>Upload student photo</p> </div> <div class="check-row" style="margin-top:6px;"> <input type="checkbox" id="show-photo" checked onchange="updateCard()"> <label for="show-photo">Show photo placeholder if none uploaded</label> </div> <button class="btn btn-danger" style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.72rem;padding:6px" onclick="clearPhoto()">✕ Remove Photo</button> </div> <div class="row2"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Photo Width (px)</label> <input type="number" id="photo-w" value="70" min="40" max="120" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Photo Height (px)</label> <input type="number" id="photo-h" value="84" min="50" max="150" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <hr class="sec-hr"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Full Name</label> <input type="text" id="stu-name" value="Alexander James Cooper" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="font-ctrl-row"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Font</label> <select id="name-font" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif" selected>Raleway</option> <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Montserrat</option> <option value="'Josefin Sans', sans-serif">Josefin Sans</option> <option value="'Playfair Display', serif">Playfair Display</option> <option value="'Cinzel', serif">Cinzel</option> <option value="'Dancing Script', cursive">Dancing Script</option> <option value="'Cormorant Garamond', serif">Cormorant</option> <option value="'Nunito', sans-serif">Nunito</option> <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif">Oswald</option> <option value="'Lato', sans-serif">Lato</option> </select> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Size</label> <input type="number" id="name-size" value="11" min="7" max="24" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Color</label> <input type="color" id="name-color" value="#ffffff" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Bold</label> <button class="style-btn active" id="name-bold-btn" onclick="toggleBold('name')">B</button> </div> </div> <div class="row2"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Student ID</label> <input type="text" id="stu-id" value="CS-2024-001" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Student Type</label> <select id="stu-type" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="STUDENT ID">STUDENT ID</option> <option value="UNIVERSITY ID">UNIVERSITY ID</option> <option value="COLLEGE ID">COLLEGE ID</option> <option value="SCHOOL ID">SCHOOL ID</option> </select> </div> </div> <div class="font-ctrl-row"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Info Font</label> <select id="info-font" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="'Josefin Sans', sans-serif" selected>Josefin Sans</option> <option value="'Raleway', sans-serif">Raleway</option> <option value="'Space Mono', monospace">Space Mono</option> <option value="'Nunito', sans-serif">Nunito</option> <option value="'Lato', sans-serif">Lato</option> <option value="'Montserrat', sans-serif">Montserrat</option> </select> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Size</label> <input type="number" id="info-size" value="9" min="6" max="16" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Color</label> <input type="color" id="info-color" value="#e8e8f0" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Bold</label> <button class="style-btn" id="info-bold-btn" onclick="toggleBold('info')">B</button> </div> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Program / Course</label> <input type="text" id="stu-program" value="B.Sc. Computer Science" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Year / Semester / Batch</label> <input type="text" id="stu-year" value="3rd Year, 6th Semester" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Date of Birth</label> <input type="text" id="stu-dob" value="Jan 15, 2002" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Address</label> <textarea id="stu-addr" oninput="updateCard()" rows="2">42 Elm Street, Springfield, IL 62701</textarea> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Blood Group</label> <select id="stu-blood" onchange="updateCard()"> <option>A+</option><option>A-</option> <option>B+</option><option>B-</option> <option>AB+</option><option>AB-</option> <option>O+</option><option>O-</option> <option value="">Not specified</option> </select> </div> </div> </div> <!-- 4. Signature & Dates --> <div class="section open" id="sec-sig"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-sig')"> <span class="sec-title"><span class="sec-icon">✍️</span> Signature & Validity</span> <span class="section-arrow">▼</span> </div> <div class="section-body"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Authorized Signature Name</label> <input type="text" id="sig-name" value="Dr. Eleanor Smith" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Signature Title</label> <input type="text" id="sig-title" value="Principal / Registrar" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="row2"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Issue Date</label> <input type="date" id="issue-date" value="2024-09-01" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Expiry Date</label> <input type="date" id="expiry-date" value="2027-08-31" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <div class="font-ctrl-row"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Dates Font</label> <select id="date-font" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="'Space Mono', monospace" selected>Space Mono</option> <option value="'Josefin Sans', sans-serif">Josefin Sans</option> <option value="'Lato', sans-serif">Lato</option> </select> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Size</label> <input type="number" id="date-size" value="8" min="6" max="14" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Color</label> <input type="color" id="date-color" value="#cccccc" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- 5. Background --> <div class="section" id="sec-bg"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-bg')"> <span class="sec-title"><span class="sec-icon">🎨</span> Card Background</span> <span class="section-arrow">▼</span> </div> <div class="section-body"> <div class="tabs"> <button class="tab active" onclick="switchBgTab('solid',this)">Solid</button> <button class="tab" onclick="switchBgTab('gradient',this)">Gradient</button> <button class="tab" onclick="switchBgTab('image',this)">Image</button> </div> <div id="bg-solid"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Background Color</label> <div class="color-input-row"> <input type="color" id="bg-solid-color" value="#1a237e" onchange="updateBg()"> <input type="text" id="bg-solid-hex" value="#1a237e" oninput="syncColor('bg-solid')"> </div> </div> <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:6px;"> <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:#1a237e;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid transparent;" onclick="setBgColor('#1a237e')" title="Navy"></div> <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:#0d47a1;cursor:pointer;" onclick="setBgColor('#0d47a1')" title="Blue"></div> <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:#1b5e20;cursor:pointer;" onclick="setBgColor('#1b5e20')" title="Green"></div> <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:#b71c1c;cursor:pointer;" onclick="setBgColor('#b71c1c')" title="Red"></div> <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:#4a148c;cursor:pointer;" onclick="setBgColor('#4a148c')" title="Purple"></div> <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:#212121;cursor:pointer;" onclick="setBgColor('#212121')" title="Dark"></div> <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:#37474f;cursor:pointer;" onclick="setBgColor('#37474f')" title="Slate"></div> <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:#e65100;cursor:pointer;" onclick="setBgColor('#e65100')" title="Orange"></div> <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:#004d40;cursor:pointer;" onclick="setBgColor('#004d40')" title="Teal"></div> <div style="width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:#263238;cursor:pointer;" onclick="setBgColor('#263238')" title="Blue-grey"></div> </div> </div> <div id="bg-gradient" style="display:none;"> <div class="row2"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Color 1</label> <input type="color" id="grad-c1" value="#1a237e" onchange="updateBg()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Color 2</label> <input type="color" id="grad-c2" value="#7b1fa2" onchange="updateBg()"> </div> </div> <div class="row3"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Color 3 (opt)</label> <input type="color" id="grad-c3" value="#0d47a1" onchange="updateBg()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Angle</label> <input type="number" id="grad-angle" value="135" min="0" max="360" onchange="updateBg()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Use 3rd</label> <input type="checkbox" id="grad-use3" onchange="updateBg()" style="margin-top:8px;accent-color:var(--accent);"> </div> </div> <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:6px;"> <div style="width:50px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a237e,#7b1fa2);cursor:pointer;" onclick="setGrad('#1a237e','#7b1fa2','#0d47a1',false,135)"></div> <div style="width:50px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#004d40,#1565c0);cursor:pointer;" onclick="setGrad('#004d40','#1565c0','#000',false,135)"></div> <div style="width:50px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#b71c1c,#880e4f);cursor:pointer;" onclick="setGrad('#b71c1c','#880e4f','#000',false,135)"></div> <div style="width:50px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#212121,#455a64);cursor:pointer;" onclick="setGrad('#212121','#455a64','#000',false,135)"></div> <div style="width:50px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f57f17,#e65100);cursor:pointer;" onclick="setGrad('#f57f17','#e65100','#000',false,135)"></div> <div style="width:50px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a237e,#0d47a1,#1565c0);cursor:pointer;" onclick="setGrad('#1a237e','#0d47a1','#1565c0',true,135)"></div> </div> </div> <div id="bg-image" style="display:none;"> <div class="upload-area"> <input type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="handleBgUpload(this)"> <div class="up-icon">🖼️</div> <p>Upload background image</p> </div> <div class="field-group" style="margin-top:8px;"> <label>Image Fit</label> <select id="bg-fit" onchange="updateBg()"> <option value="cover">Cover (fill)</option> <option value="contain">Contain (fit)</option> <option value="100% 100%">Stretch</option> </select> </div> <div class="field-group" style="margin-top:8px;"> <label>Overlay Opacity (0–100%)</label> <input type="range" id="bg-overlay" min="0" max="100" value="30" oninput="updateBg()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Overlay Color</label> <input type="color" id="bg-overlay-color" value="#000000" onchange="updateBg()"> </div> <button class="btn btn-danger" style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.72rem;padding:6px" onclick="clearBgImage()">✕ Remove Image</button> </div> </div> </div> <!-- 6. Outline & Texture --> <div class="section" id="sec-outline"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-outline')"> <span class="sec-title"><span class="sec-icon">🖼️</span> Outline & Texture</span> <span class="section-arrow">▼</span> </div> <div class="section-body"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Card Outline Style</label> <div class="outline-grid"> <div class="outline-opt selected" onclick="setOutline('outline-none',this)">None</div> <div class="outline-opt" onclick="setOutline('outline-simple',this)">Simple</div> <div class="outline-opt" onclick="setOutline('outline-double',this)">Double</div> <div class="outline-opt" onclick="setOutline('outline-dashed',this)">Dashed</div> <div class="outline-opt" onclick="setOutline('outline-thick',this)">Thick</div> <div class="outline-opt" onclick="setOutline('outline-glow',this)">Glow</div> </div> </div> <hr class="sec-hr"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Texture Overlay</label> <div class="texture-grid"> <div class="texture-opt selected" onclick="setTexture('none',this)" style="background:#1e1e2e;"><span>None</span></div> <div class="texture-opt" onclick="setTexture('grain',this)" style="background:url('data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%2264%22 height=%2264%22><filter id=%22n%22><feTurbulence type=%22fractalNoise%22 baseFrequency=%220.9%22 numOctaves=%224%22 stitchTiles=%22stitch%22/><feColorMatrix type=%22saturate%22 values=%220%22/></filter><rect width=%2264%22 height=%2264%22 filter=%22url(%23n)%22 opacity=%220.15%22/></svg>') #2a2a3e;"><span>Grain</span></div> <div class="texture-opt" onclick="setTexture('grid',this)" style="background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 0px, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 24px), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 0px, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 24px), #1a237e;"><span>Grid</span></div> <div class="texture-opt" onclick="setTexture('dots',this)" style="background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,255,255,0.12) 1px,transparent 1px) 0 0/16px 16px #1a237e;"><span>Dots</span></div> <div class="texture-opt" onclick="setTexture('diagonal',this)" style="background:repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 0,rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 1px,transparent 0,transparent 50%) 0/8px 8px #1a237e;"><span>Lines</span></div> <div class="texture-opt" onclick="setTexture('wave',this)" style="background: repeating-radial-gradient(circle at 0 0, transparent 0, #1a237e 8px), repeating-linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.07),rgba(255,255,255,0.07));"><span>Waves</span></div> </div> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Texture Opacity (%)</label> <input type="range" id="texture-opacity" min="5" max="80" value="20" oninput="updateTexture()"> </div> </div> </div> <!-- 7. Label Colors --> <div class="section" id="sec-labels"> <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('sec-labels')"> <span class="sec-title"><span class="sec-icon">🏷️</span> Label & Divider Colors</span> <span class="section-arrow">▼</span> </div> <div class="section-body"> <div class="row2"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Divider Color</label> <input type="color" id="divider-color" value="#ffffff" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Divider Opacity</label> <input type="range" id="divider-opacity" min="5" max="100" value="25" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <div class="row2"> <div class="field-group"> <label>Label Color</label> <input type="color" id="label-color" value="#cccccc" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Card Title Color</label> <input type="color" id="id-label-color" value="#f5c842" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <div class="font-ctrl-row"> <div class="field-group"> <label>ID Label Font</label> <select id="id-label-font" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="'Space Mono', monospace" selected>Space Mono</option> <option value="'Josefin Sans', sans-serif">Josefin Sans</option> <option value="'Bebas Neue', sans-serif">Bebas Neue</option> <option value="'Oswald', sans-serif">Oswald</option> <option value="'Cinzel', serif">Cinzel</option> </select> </div> <div class="field-group"> <label>Size</label> <input type="number" id="id-label-size" value="8" min="6" max="16" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- Download --> <div style="padding: 4px 0;"> <button class="btn btn-success" onclick="downloadCard()">⬇ Download ID Card (PNG)</button> <p style="text-align:center;font-size:0.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:8px;">High-resolution PNG export</p> </div> <div class="info-box"> <strong style="color:var(--accent)">🎓 GitHub Student Pack Ready</strong><br> This ID card follows official student identity document standards: includes full name, institution, student ID, program, issue & expiry dates, address, and authorized signature — all required for GitHub Student Developer Pack verification. </div> </div> <!-- PREVIEW --> <div class="preview-area"> <div class="preview-top-bar"> <div class="preview-label" style="flex:1;">Live Preview</div> <span class="badge badge-gold">Real-time</span> </div> <div id="id-card-wrapper"> <div id="id-card" class="outline-none"> <!-- Background layer --> <div class="card-bg-layer" id="card-bg-layer"></div> <!-- Texture layer --> <div id="texture-layer" style="position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:2;opacity:0.2;pointer-events:none;"></div> <!-- Content --> <div class="card-inner" id="card-inner"> <!-- Logo & Institution --> <div class="card-logo-wrap"> <div class="card-logo" id="card-logo-el"> <span style="font-size:22px;">🏛️</span> </div> <div class="card-inst-name" id="card-inst-name-el">Springfield University</div> <div class="card-sub-text" id="card-sub-text-el">Department of Computer Science</div> </div> <div class="card-divider" id="card-divider-el"></div> <div class="card-id-label" id="card-id-label-el">— STUDENT ID CARD —</div> <!-- Photo + Info row --> <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;width:100%;align-items:flex-start;"> <div class="card-photo-wrap" id="card-photo-el"> <div style="text-align:center;"> <div style="font-size:18px;">👤</div> <div style="font-size:7px;margin-top:2px;">Photo</div> </div> </div> <div style="flex:1;"> <div id="card-stu-name-el" style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:4px;line-height:1.2;">Alexander James Cooper</div> <table class="card-info-table" id="card-info-table"> <tbody id="card-info-body"></tbody> </table> </div> </div> <div class="card-divider" id="card-divider2-el" style="margin-top:6px;"></div> <!-- Bottom: sig + dates --> <div class="card-bottom"> <div class="card-sig-wrap"> <div style="height:18px;"></div> <div class="card-sig-line"></div> <div class="card-sig-label" id="card-sig-name-el">Dr. Eleanor Smith</div> <div class="card-sig-label" id="card-sig-title-el" style="opacity:0.5;">Principal / Registrar</div> </div> <div class="card-dates" id="card-dates-el"> <span>Issue: 2024-09-01</span> <span>Expiry: 2027-08-31</span> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="dl-area"> <p class="dl-note">✦ Card dimensions reflect actual pixel size ✦<br>Download exports exactly what you see</p> </div> </div> </div> <script> // State const state = { bgMode: 'solid', bgImage: null, texture: 'none', outline: 'outline-none', bold: { inst: true, sub: false, name: true, info: false }, logoImage: null, photoImage: null, }; // Toggle section accordion function toggleSection(id) { const el = document.getElementById(id); el.classList.toggle('open'); } // Card size function updateCardSize() { const w = parseInt(document.getElementById('card-w').value) || 340; const h = parseInt(document.getElementById('card-h').value) || 215; const card = document.getElementById('id-card'); card.style.width = w + 'px'; card.style.height = h + 'px'; updateCard(); } function applyPreset(wmm, hmm, name) { // Convert mm to approximate px (96dpi) scaled for screen const scale = 3.5; const w = Math.round(wmm * scale); const h = Math.round(hmm * scale); document.getElementById('card-w').value = w; document.getElementById('card-h').value = h; document.querySelectorAll('.preset-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); event.target.closest('.preset-btn').classList.add('active'); updateCardSize(); } function updateCardStyle() { const r = document.getElementById('card-radius').value; const p = document.getElementById('card-pad').value; document.getElementById('id-card').style.borderRadius = r + 'px'; document.getElementById('card-inner').style.padding = p + 'px'; } // Logo function handleLogoUpload(input) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = e => { state.logoImage = e.target.result; const el = document.getElementById('card-logo-el'); el.innerHTML = `<img src="${e.target.result}" alt="logo">`; updateCard(); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function clearLogo() { state.logoImage = null; document.getElementById('card-logo-el').innerHTML = '<span style="font-size:22px;">🏛️</span>'; } function updateLogoSize(v) { const el = document.getElementById('card-logo-el'); el.style.width = v + 'px'; el.style.height = v + 'px'; } // Photo function handlePhotoUpload(input) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = e => { state.photoImage = e.target.result; const el = document.getElementById('card-photo-el'); el.innerHTML = `<img src="${e.target.result}" alt="student">`; updateCard(); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function clearPhoto() { state.photoImage = null; document.getElementById('card-photo-el').innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:18px;">👤</div><div style="font-size:7px;margin-top:2px;">Photo</div></div>'; } // Bold toggles function toggleBold(field) { state.bold[field] = !state.bold[field]; const btn = document.getElementById(field + '-bold-btn'); btn.classList.toggle('active', state.bold[field]); updateCard(); } // Background function switchBgTab(mode, tabEl) { state.bgMode = mode; document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active')); tabEl.classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('bg-solid').style.display = mode === 'solid' ? '' : 'none'; document.getElementById('bg-gradient').style.display = mode === 'gradient' ? '' : 'none'; document.getElementById('bg-image').style.display = mode === 'image' ? '' : 'none'; updateBg(); } function setBgColor(hex) { document.getElementById('bg-solid-color').value = hex; document.getElementById('bg-solid-hex').value = hex; updateBg(); } function syncColor(prefix) { const hex = document.getElementById(prefix + '-hex').value; if (/^#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$/.test(hex)) { document.getElementById(prefix + '-color').value = hex; updateBg(); } } function setGrad(c1,c2,c3,use3,angle) { document.getElementById('grad-c1').value = c1; document.getElementById('grad-c2').value = c2; document.getElementById('grad-c3').value = c3; document.getElementById('grad-use3').checked = use3; document.getElementById('grad-angle').value = angle; updateBg(); } function handleBgUpload(input) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = e => { state.bgImage = e.target.result; updateBg(); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function clearBgImage() { state.bgImage = null; updateBg(); } function updateBg() { const layer = document.getElementById('card-bg-layer'); if (state.bgMode === 'solid') { const c = document.getElementById('bg-solid-color').value; layer.style.background = c; layer.style.backgroundImage = 'none'; } else if (state.bgMode === 'gradient') { const c1 = document.getElementById('grad-c1').value; const c2 = document.getElementById('grad-c2').value; const c3 = document.getElementById('grad-c3').value; const use3 = document.getElementById('grad-use3').checked; const angle = document.getElementById('grad-angle').value; layer.style.background = use3 ? `linear-gradient(${angle}deg, ${c1}, ${c2}, ${c3})` : `linear-gradient(${angle}deg, ${c1}, ${c2})`; layer.style.backgroundImage = ''; } else if (state.bgMode === 'image') { if (state.bgImage) { const fit = document.getElementById('bg-fit').value; const opacity = document.getElementById('bg-overlay').value / 100; const oc = document.getElementById('bg-overlay-color').value; layer.style.backgroundImage = `url(${state.bgImage})`; layer.style.backgroundSize = fit === 'cover' || fit === 'contain' ? fit : '100% 100%'; layer.style.backgroundPosition = 'center'; layer.style.backgroundRepeat = 'no-repeat'; // Overlay layer.style.setProperty('--ov', `rgba(${hexToRgb(oc)},${opacity})`); layer.innerHTML = `<div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(${hexToRgb(oc)},${opacity});"></div>`; } } } function hexToRgb(hex) { const r = parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16); const g = parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16); const b = parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16); return `${r},${g},${b}`; } // Texture const textures = { none: '', grain: `url("data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='200' height='200'><filter id='n'><feTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.75' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/><feColorMatrix type='saturate' values='0'/></filter><rect width='200' height='200' filter='url(%23n)'/></svg>")`, grid: `repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,1) 0px,rgba(255,255,255,1) 1px,transparent 1px,transparent 20px),repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,1) 0px,rgba(255,255,255,1) 1px,transparent 1px,transparent 20px)`, dots: `radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,255,255,1) 1px,transparent 1px) 0 0/16px 16px`, diagonal: `repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,rgba(255,255,255,1) 0,rgba(255,255,255,1) 1px,transparent 0,transparent 50%) 0/8px 8px`, wave: `repeating-radial-gradient(circle at 0 0,transparent 0,rgba(255,255,255,0.3) 8px),repeating-linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,1),rgba(255,255,255,1))`, }; function setTexture(t, el) { state.texture = t; document.querySelectorAll('.texture-opt').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('selected')); el.classList.add('selected'); updateTexture(); } function updateTexture() { const layer = document.getElementById('texture-layer'); const op = document.getElementById('texture-opacity').value / 100; if (state.texture === 'none') { layer.style.backgroundImage = 'none'; layer.style.opacity = 0; } else { layer.style.backgroundImage = textures[state.texture]; layer.style.opacity = op; layer.style.backgroundSize = state.texture === 'dots' ? '16px 16px' : ''; } } // Outline function setOutline(cls, el) { const card = document.getElementById('id-card'); card.classList.remove('outline-none','outline-simple','outline-double','outline-dashed','outline-thick','outline-glow'); card.classList.add(cls); state.outline = cls; document.querySelectorAll('.outline-opt').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('selected')); el.classList.add('selected'); } // Main card update function updateCard() { const instName = document.getElementById('inst-name').value; const subText = document.getElementById('sub-text').value; const stuName = document.getElementById('stu-name').value; const stuId = document.getElementById('stu-id').value; const stuType = document.getElementById('stu-type').value; const program = document.getElementById('stu-program').value; const year = document.getElementById('stu-year').value; const dob = document.getElementById('stu-dob').value; const addr = document.getElementById('stu-addr').value; const blood = document.getElementById('stu-blood').value; const sigName = document.getElementById('sig-name').value; const sigTitle = document.getElementById('sig-title').value; const issueDate = document.getElementById('issue-date').value; const expiryDate = document.getElementById('expiry-date').value; // Fonts & styles const instFont = document.getElementById('inst-font').value; const instSize = document.getElementById('inst-size').value; const instColor = document.getElementById('inst-color').value; const instBold = state.bold.inst ? '700' : '400'; const subFont = document.getElementById('sub-font').value; const subSize = document.getElementById('sub-size').value; const subColor = document.getElementById('sub-color').value; const subBold = state.bold.sub ? '700' : '400'; const nameFont = document.getElementById('name-font').value; const nameSize = document.getElementById('name-size').value; const nameColor = document.getElementById('name-color').value; const nameBold = state.bold.name ? '700' : '400'; const infoFont = document.getElementById('info-font').value; const infoSize = document.getElementById('info-size').value; const infoColor = document.getElementById('info-color').value; const infoBold = state.bold.info ? '700' : '400'; const dateFont = document.getElementById('date-font').value; const dateSize = document.getElementById('date-size').value; const dateColor = document.getElementById('date-color').value; const dividerColor = document.getElementById('divider-color').value; const dividerOpacity = document.getElementById('divider-opacity').value / 100; const labelColor = document.getElementById('label-color').value; const idLabelColor = document.getElementById('id-label-color').value; const idLabelFont = document.getElementById('id-label-font').value; const idLabelSize = document.getElementById('id-label-size').value; const photoW = document.getElementById('photo-w').value; const photoH = document.getElementById('photo-h').value; const showPhoto = document.getElementById('show-photo').checked; // Apply to card const instEl = document.getElementById('card-inst-name-el'); instEl.textContent = instName; instEl.style.fontFamily = instFont; instEl.style.fontSize = instSize + 'px'; instEl.style.color = instColor; instEl.style.fontWeight = instBold; const subEl = document.getElementById('card-sub-text-el'); subEl.textContent = subText; subEl.style.fontFamily = subFont; subEl.style.fontSize = subSize + 'px'; subEl.style.color = subColor; subEl.style.fontWeight = subBold; const nameEl = document.getElementById('card-stu-name-el'); nameEl.textContent = stuName; nameEl.style.fontFamily = nameFont; nameEl.style.fontSize = nameSize + 'px'; nameEl.style.color = nameColor; nameEl.style.fontWeight = nameBold; // ID label const idLabelEl = document.getElementById('card-id-label-el'); idLabelEl.textContent = `— ${stuType} —`; idLabelEl.style.fontFamily = idLabelFont; idLabelEl.style.fontSize = idLabelSize + 'px'; idLabelEl.style.color = idLabelColor; // Dividers const divStyle = `1px solid rgba(${hexToRgb(dividerColor)},${dividerOpacity})`; document.getElementById('card-divider-el').style.borderTop = divStyle; document.getElementById('card-divider-el').style.height = '0'; document.getElementById('card-divider-el').style.background = 'none'; document.getElementById('card-divider-el').style.border = 'none'; document.getElementById('card-divider-el').style.borderTop = divStyle; document.getElementById('card-divider2-el').style.borderTop = divStyle; document.getElementById('card-divider2-el').style.height = '0'; document.getElementById('card-divider2-el').style.background = 'none'; document.getElementById('card-divider2-el').style.border = 'none'; document.getElementById('card-divider2-el').style.borderTop = divStyle; // Photo const photoEl = document.getElementById('card-photo-el'); photoEl.style.width = photoW + 'px'; photoEl.style.height = photoH + 'px'; if (!showPhoto && !state.photoImage) { photoEl.style.display = 'none'; } else { photoEl.style.display = 'flex'; } // Info table const rows = []; if (stuId) rows.push(['ID No.', stuId]); if (program) rows.push(['Program', program]); if (year) rows.push(['Year/Sem', year]); if (dob) rows.push(['D.O.B', dob]); if (blood) rows.push(['Blood', blood]); if (addr) rows.push(['Address', addr.replace(/\n/g,' ')]); const tbody = document.getElementById('card-info-body'); tbody.innerHTML = rows.map(([l,v]) => ` <tr> <td class="info-label" style="font-family:${infoFont};font-size:${Math.max(parseInt(infoSize)-1,6)}px;color:${labelColor};font-weight:${infoBold};">${l}</td> <td class="info-colon" style="color:${labelColor};font-size:${infoSize}px;">:</td> <td class="info-val" style="font-family:${infoFont};font-size:${infoSize}px;color:${infoColor};font-weight:${infoBold};">${v}</td> </tr> `).join(''); // Signature & dates document.getElementById('card-sig-name-el').textContent = sigName; document.getElementById('card-sig-name-el').style.fontFamily = infoFont; document.getElementById('card-sig-name-el').style.color = infoColor; document.getElementById('card-sig-name-el').style.fontSize = (parseInt(infoSize)-1) + 'px'; document.getElementById('card-sig-title-el').textContent = sigTitle; document.getElementById('card-sig-title-el').style.fontFamily = infoFont; document.getElementById('card-sig-title-el').style.color = labelColor; document.getElementById('card-sig-title-el').style.fontSize = (parseInt(infoSize)-2) + 'px'; const datesEl = document.getElementById('card-dates-el'); datesEl.style.fontFamily = dateFont; datesEl.style.fontSize = dateSize + 'px'; datesEl.style.color = dateColor; datesEl.innerHTML = `<span>Issue: ${issueDate}</span><span>Expiry: ${expiryDate}</span>`; // Card style updateCardStyle(); } // Download async function downloadCard() { const card = document.getElementById('id-card'); const btn = document.querySelector('.btn-success'); btn.textContent = '⏳ Generating...'; btn.disabled = true; try { const canvas = await html2canvas(card, { scale: 3, useCORS: true, allowTaint: true, backgroundColor: null, logging: false, }); const link = document.createElement('a'); link.download = 'student-id-card.png'; link.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); link.click(); } catch(e) { alert('Download failed. Try again.'); } btn.textContent = '⬇ Download ID Card (PNG)'; btn.disabled = false; } // Init window.onload = () => { updateCardSize(); updateBg(); updateCard(); updateTexture(); }; </script> </body> </html> <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title>Student ID Card Generator</title> <style> @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Open+Sans:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Lato:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Montserrat:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Poppins:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Raleway:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Merriweather:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Nunito:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Ubuntu:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Quicksand:wght@400;700&family=Cabin:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Bitter:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Libre+Baskerville:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&display=swap'); *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box} body{font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f0c29,#302b63,#24243e);min-height:100vh;color:#e0e0e0} .app-header{text-align:center;padding:30px 20px 10px} .app-header h1{font-size:2.2rem;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00d2ff,#3a7bd5,#f953c6);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px} .app-header p{color:#aaa;margin-top:5px;font-size:.95rem} .main-container{display:flex;gap:30px;max-width:1500px;margin:20px auto;padding:0 20px 40px;align-items:flex-start} /* CONTROL PANEL - FIXED: removed max-height transition, use simple toggle */ .control-panel{flex:1;max-width:520px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:16px;padding:24px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;backdrop-filter:blur(10px)} .control-panel::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px} .control-panel::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:3px} .section{margin-bottom:22px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);padding-bottom:18px} .section:last-child{border-bottom:none} .section-title{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#7ec8e3;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;cursor:pointer;user-select:none} .section-title .toggle-arrow{margin-left:auto;transition:transform .3s;font-size:.8rem} .section-title .toggle-arrow.collapsed{transform:rotate(-90deg)} /* FIX: Section content uses display toggle instead of max-height */ .section-content{} .section-content.collapsed{display:none} .form-group{margin-bottom:12px} .form-group label{display:block;font-size:.8rem;color:#bbb;margin-bottom:4px;font-weight:500} .form-group input[type="text"],.form-group input[type="date"],.form-group input[type="number"],.form-group select,.form-group textarea{width:100%;padding:9px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);color:#e0e0e0;font-size:.85rem;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;transition:border-color .2s} .form-group input:focus,.form-group select:focus,.form-group textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:#3a7bd5} .form-group input[type="color"]{width:40px;height:34px;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;background:transparent} .form-group input[type="file"]{font-size:.78rem;color:#bbb} .inline-group{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-end} .inline-group .form-group{flex:1} .font-style-row{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end} .font-style-row .form-group{flex:1;min-width:60px} .preset-sizes{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px} .preset-btn{padding:6px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:20px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);color:#ccc;font-size:.75rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif} .preset-btn:hover,.preset-btn.active{background:rgba(58,123,213,.3);border-color:#3a7bd5;color:#fff} .checkbox-group{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px} .checkbox-group input[type="checkbox"]{accent-color:#3a7bd5;width:16px;height:16px} .checkbox-group label{margin-bottom:0;font-size:.82rem;color:#ccc} .texture-options{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px} .texture-option{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden} .texture-option:hover,.texture-option.active{border-color:#3a7bd5;transform:scale(1.05)} .texture-option.active::after{content:'✓';position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);font-size:1.2rem;color:#fff;background:rgba(58,123,213,.7);width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center} .bg-type-selector{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px} .bg-type-btn{flex:1;padding:7px 10px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:#bbb;font-size:.78rem;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;transition:all .2s;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif} .bg-type-btn:hover,.bg-type-btn.active{background:rgba(58,123,213,.25);border-color:#3a7bd5;color:#fff} .bg-options{display:none} .bg-options.active{display:block} .gradient-row{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center} .preview-panel{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;position:sticky;top:20px} .preview-label{font-size:.9rem;color:#888;margin-bottom:15px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px} .card-wrapper{position:relative;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;margin-bottom:25px} /* ID CARD */ .id-card{position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#fff;color:#222;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5)} .card-bg-layer{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0} .card-texture-layer{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:1;pointer-events:none} .card-outline-layer{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:5;pointer-events:none} .card-content{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:100%;padding:5%} .card-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:4px} .card-logo-container{width:50px;height:50px;min-width:50px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;background:rgba(0,0,0,.05);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1)} .card-logo-container img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover} .card-logo-placeholder{font-size:.5rem;color:#999;text-align:center} .card-inst-info{flex:1;text-align:center} .card-inst-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#1a237e;line-height:1.2} .card-subtitle{font-size:10px;color:#555;margin-top:2px} .card-divider{width:100%;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1a237e,#3a7bd5,#1a237e);border-radius:2px;margin:8px 0} .card-title-bar{text-align:center;padding:4px 0;margin-bottom:8px} .card-title-text{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1a237e,#283593);display:inline-block;padding:3px 20px;border-radius:3px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase} .card-body{display:flex;gap:12px;flex:1} .card-photo-section{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px} .card-photo{width:90px;height:105px;border:2px solid #1a237e;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;background:#f0f0f0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center} .card-photo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover} .card-photo-placeholder{font-size:2rem;color:#ccc} .card-details{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px} .card-detail-row{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:4px;line-height:1.4} .card-detail-label{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#1a237e;white-space:nowrap;min-width:75px} .card-detail-value{font-size:10px;color:#333;font-weight:500} .card-footer{margin-top:auto;padding-top:6px} .card-dates-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px} .card-date-item{text-align:center} .card-date-label{font-size:7px;color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px} .card-date-value{font-size:9px;color:#222;font-weight:600} .card-bottom-divider{width:100%;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#1a237e,transparent);margin:5px 0} .card-signature-section{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;align-items:flex-end;gap:10px} .card-address-section{flex:1} .card-address-label{font-size:7px;color:#666;text-transform:uppercase} .card-address-value{font-size:8px;color:#333;line-height:1.3} .card-signature-box{text-align:center;min-width:80px} .card-signature-line{border-top:1px solid #333;margin-bottom:2px;padding-top:2px} .card-signature-name{font-size:9px;color:#222;font-style:italic;font-weight:600} .card-signature-title{font-size:7px;color:#666} .card-deco-circle-tl{position:absolute;top:-20px;left:-20px;width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(26,35,126,.08);z-index:1} .card-deco-circle-br{position:absolute;bottom:-30px;right:-30px;width:100px;height:100px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(58,123,213,.06);z-index:1} .card-deco-stripe{position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:6px;height:100%;z-index:3} .card-deco-stripe-left{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:6px;height:100%;z-index:3} .card-deco-corner-tr{position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:0;height:0;border-left:40px solid transparent;border-top:40px solid rgba(26,35,126,.12);z-index:1} .download-section{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center} .download-btn{padding:12px 35px;border:none;border-radius:30px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px} .download-btn.primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3a7bd5,#00d2ff);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(58,123,213,.4)} .download-btn.primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 25px rgba(58,123,213,.6)} .download-btn.secondary{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:#ccc;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15)} .download-btn.secondary:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);color:#fff} .download-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none!important} .bold-toggle,.italic-toggle{padding:5px 10px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);color:#bbb;cursor:pointer;font-size:.85rem;transition:all .2s;min-width:36px;text-align:center} .bold-toggle{font-weight:700} .italic-toggle{font-style:italic} .bold-toggle.active,.italic-toggle.active{background:rgba(58,123,213,.3);border-color:#3a7bd5;color:#fff} /* FIX: Style options panel - NO max-height restriction, clean open/close */ .style-panel{ background:rgba(255,255,255,.04); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius:8px; margin-top:6px; overflow:hidden; } .style-panel-toggle{ display:block;width:100%;padding:8px 12px; background:none;border:none;color:#999; font-size:.78rem;cursor:pointer;text-align:left; font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;transition:color .2s; } .style-panel-toggle:hover{color:#ccc} .style-panel-toggle.open{color:#7ec8e3} .style-panel-body{ padding:0 12px 10px; display:none; } .style-panel-body.open{ display:block; } .outline-preview-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px} .outline-option{aspect-ratio:1.6;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#fff} .outline-option:hover,.outline-option.active{border-color:#3a7bd5;transform:scale(1.05)} .outline-option.active::after{content:'✓';position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);color:#3a7bd5;font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem} .notice-box{background:rgba(58,123,213,.1);border:1px solid rgba(58,123,213,.3);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:15px;font-size:.78rem;color:#a0c4ff;line-height:1.5} .notice-box strong{color:#7ec8e3} @media(max-width:1024px){.main-container{flex-direction:column;align-items:center}.control-panel{max-width:100%;max-height:none}.preview-panel{position:static}} </style> </head> <body> <div class="app-header"> <h1>🎓 Student ID Card Generator</h1> <p>Design a professional student identity card — customizable, downloadable, and unique</p> </div> <div class="main-container"> <div class="control-panel"> <div class="notice-box"> <strong>💡 Tip:</strong> This generator creates ID cards suitable for <strong>GitHub Student Developer Pack</strong> verification. Include your full name, institution name, issue & expiry dates, and a clear photo. </div> <!-- Card Size --> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">📐 Card Size <span class="toggle-arrow">▼</span></div> <div class="section-content"> <div class="preset-sizes"> <button class="preset-btn active" onclick="setPresetSize(340,215,this)">Standard</button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="setPresetSize(400,250,this)">Large</button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="setPresetSize(320,200,this)">Compact</button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="setPresetSize(380,540,this)">Vertical</button> </div> <div class="inline-group"> <div class="form-group"><label>Width (px)</label><input type="number" id="cardWidth" value="340" min="250" max="600" oninput="updateCardSize()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Height (px)</label><input type="number" id="cardHeight" value="215" min="200" max="700" oninput="updateCardSize()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Radius (px)</label><input type="number" id="cardRadius" value="12" min="0" max="30" oninput="updateCardSize()"></div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- Institution --> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">🏛️ Institution Information <span class="toggle-arrow">▼</span></div> <div class="section-content"> <div class="form-group"><label>Institution Logo</label><input type="file" id="logoFile" accept="image/*" onchange="handleFile(event,'logo')"></div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Institution Name</label> <input type="text" id="instName" value="University of Technology" oninput="updatePreview()"> <div class="style-panel"> <button class="style-panel-toggle" onclick="toggleStylePanel(this)">🎨 Style Options ▸</button> <div class="style-panel-body"> <div class="font-style-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Font</label><select class="fontsel" data-target="instName" onchange="updatePreview()"></select></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Size</label><input type="number" id="instNameSize" value="14" min="8" max="28" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="instNameColor" value="#1a237e" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>B</label><button class="bold-toggle active" data-field="instName" onclick="togStyle(this,'bold')">B</button></div> <div class="form-group"><label>I</label><button class="italic-toggle" data-field="instName" onclick="togStyle(this,'italic')">I</button></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Subtitle (centered below name)</label> <input type="text" id="subtitleText" value="STUDENT IDENTITY CARD" oninput="updatePreview()"> <div class="style-panel"> <button class="style-panel-toggle" onclick="toggleStylePanel(this)">🎨 Style Options ▸</button> <div class="style-panel-body"> <div class="font-style-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Font</label><select class="fontsel" data-target="subtitle" onchange="updatePreview()"></select></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Size</label><input type="number" id="subtitleSize" value="10" min="6" max="22" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="subtitleColor" value="#555555" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>B</label><button class="bold-toggle active" data-field="subtitle" onclick="togStyle(this,'bold')">B</button></div> <div class="form-group"><label>I</label><button class="italic-toggle" data-field="subtitle" onclick="togStyle(this,'italic')">I</button></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- Student --> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">👤 Student Information <span class="toggle-arrow">▼</span></div> <div class="section-content"> <div class="form-group"><label>Student Photo</label><input type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="handleFile(event,'photo')"></div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="showPhoto" checked onchange="updatePreview()"><label>Show student photo</label></div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Full Name</label> <input type="text" id="studentName" value="John Smith" oninput="updatePreview()"> <div class="style-panel"> <button class="style-panel-toggle" onclick="toggleStylePanel(this)">🎨 Style Options ▸</button> <div class="style-panel-body"> <div class="font-style-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Font</label><select class="fontsel" data-target="studentName" onchange="updatePreview()"></select></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Size</label><input type="number" id="studentNameSize" value="11" min="7" max="20" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="studentNameColor" value="#333333" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>B</label><button class="bold-toggle active" data-field="studentName" onclick="togStyle(this,'bold')">B</button></div> <div class="form-group"><label>I</label><button class="italic-toggle" data-field="studentName" onclick="togStyle(this,'italic')">I</button></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Student ID Number</label> <input type="text" id="studentId" value="2024-CSE-001" oninput="updatePreview()"> <div class="style-panel"> <button class="style-panel-toggle" onclick="toggleStylePanel(this)">🎨 Style Options ▸</button> <div class="style-panel-body"> <div class="font-style-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Font</label><select class="fontsel" data-target="studentId" onchange="updatePreview()"></select></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Size</label><input type="number" id="studentIdSize" value="10" min="7" max="18" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="studentIdColor" value="#333333" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>B</label><button class="bold-toggle" data-field="studentId" onclick="togStyle(this,'bold')">B</button></div> <div class="form-group"><label>I</label><button class="italic-toggle" data-field="studentId" onclick="togStyle(this,'italic')">I</button></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"><label>Department / Program</label><input type="text" id="department" value="Computer Science & Engineering" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Session / Batch</label><input type="text" id="session" value="2024-2025" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Blood Group</label> <select id="bloodGroup" onchange="updatePreview()"><option value="">--</option><option value="A+">A+</option><option value="A-">A-</option><option value="B+" selected>B+</option><option value="B-">B-</option><option value="AB+">AB+</option><option value="AB-">AB-</option><option value="O+">O+</option><option value="O-">O-</option></select> </div> <div class="form-group"><label>Date of Birth</label><input type="date" id="dob" value="2002-05-15" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Address</label><textarea id="address" rows="2" oninput="updatePreview()">123 Main Street, Dhaka</textarea></div> </div> </div> <!-- Dates & Signature --> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">📅 Dates & Signature <span class="toggle-arrow">▼</span></div> <div class="section-content"> <div class="inline-group"> <div class="form-group"><label>Issue Date</label><input type="date" id="issueDate" value="2024-09-01" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Expiry Date</label><input type="date" id="expiryDate" value="2028-08-31" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> </div> <div class="form-group"><label>Signatory Name</label><input type="text" id="signatureName" value="Prof. A. Rahman" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Signatory Title</label><input type="text" id="signatureTitle" value="Registrar" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> </div> </div> <!-- Label Styling --> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">🏷️ Label & Value Styling <span class="toggle-arrow">▼</span></div> <div class="section-content"> <div class="font-style-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Label Font</label><select class="fontsel" data-target="label" onchange="updatePreview()"></select></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Size</label><input type="number" id="labelSize" value="9" min="6" max="16" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="labelColor" value="#1a237e" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> </div> <div class="font-style-row" style="margin-top:8px"> <div class="form-group"><label>Value Font</label><select class="fontsel" data-target="value" onchange="updatePreview()"></select></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Size</label><input type="number" id="valueSize" value="10" min="6" max="16" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="valueColor" value="#333333" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- Background --> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">🎨 Background <span class="toggle-arrow">▼</span></div> <div class="section-content"> <div class="bg-type-selector"> <button class="bg-type-btn active" onclick="setBgType('solid',this)">Solid</button> <button class="bg-type-btn" onclick="setBgType('gradient',this)">Gradient</button> <button class="bg-type-btn" onclick="setBgType('image',this)">Image</button> </div> <div id="bgSolid" class="bg-options active"><div class="form-group"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="bgColor" value="#ffffff" oninput="updatePreview()"></div></div> <div id="bgGradient" class="bg-options"><div class="gradient-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Color 1</label><input type="color" id="gradColor1" value="#ffffff" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Color 2</label><input type="color" id="gradColor2" value="#e3f2fd" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Angle</label><input type="number" id="gradAngle" value="135" min="0" max="360" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> </div></div> <div id="bgImage" class="bg-options"> <div class="form-group"><label>Upload Image</label><input type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="handleFile(event,'bg')"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Opacity (%)</label><input type="number" id="bgImageOpacity" value="30" min="5" max="100" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- Texture --> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">🧩 Texture Overlay <span class="toggle-arrow">▼</span></div> <div class="section-content"> <div class="texture-options" id="textureGrid"></div> <div class="inline-group" style="margin-top:10px"> <div class="form-group"><label>Texture Opacity (%)</label><input type="number" id="textureOpacity" value="12" min="1" max="50" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- Outline --> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">🖼️ Border Design <span class="toggle-arrow">▼</span></div> <div class="section-content"> <div class="outline-preview-grid"> <div class="outline-option active" onclick="setOutline('none',this)"><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100%;font-size:.55rem;color:#999">None</div></div> <div class="outline-option" onclick="setOutline('simple',this)" style="border:3px solid #1a237e"></div> <div class="outline-option" onclick="setOutline('double',this)" style="border:3px double #1a237e"></div> <div class="outline-option" onclick="setOutline('dashed',this)" style="border:2px dashed #1a237e"></div> <div class="outline-option" onclick="setOutline('gradient-border',this)" style="box-shadow:0 0 0 3px #1a237e"></div> <div class="outline-option" onclick="setOutline('shadow',this)" style="box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"></div> <div class="outline-option" onclick="setOutline('thick-left',this)" style="border-left:5px solid #1a237e"></div> <div class="outline-option" onclick="setOutline('thick-top',this)" style="border-top:5px solid #1a237e"></div> </div> <div class="inline-group" style="margin-top:12px"> <div class="form-group"><label>Border Color</label><input type="color" id="borderColor" value="#1a237e" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Accent Color</label><input type="color" id="accentColor" value="#3a7bd5" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- Deco --> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">✨ Decorative Elements <span class="toggle-arrow">▼</span></div> <div class="section-content"> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="showDecoCircles" checked onchange="updatePreview()"><label>Corner circles</label></div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="showDecoStripes" checked onchange="updatePreview()"><label>Side accent stripes</label></div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="showDecoCorner" onchange="updatePreview()"><label>Corner triangle</label></div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="showDividers" checked onchange="updatePreview()"><label>Divider lines</label></div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="showTitleBar" checked onchange="updatePreview()"><label>Title bar badge</label></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Deco Color 1</label><input type="color" id="decoColor1" value="#1a237e" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Deco Color 2</label><input type="color" id="decoColor2" value="#3a7bd5" oninput="updatePreview()"></div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- PREVIEW --> <div class="preview-panel"> <div class="preview-label">Live Preview</div> <div class="card-wrapper"> <div class="id-card" id="idCard"> <div class="card-bg-layer" id="cardBgLayer"></div> <div class="card-texture-layer" id="cardTextureLayer"></div> <div class="card-outline-layer" id="cardOutlineLayer"></div> <div class="card-deco-circle-tl" id="decoCircleTl"></div> <div class="card-deco-circle-br" id="decoCircleBr"></div> <div class="card-deco-stripe" id="decoStripeRight"></div> <div class="card-deco-stripe-left" id="decoStripeLeft"></div> <div class="card-deco-corner-tr" id="decoCornerTr" style="display:none"></div> <div class="card-content"> <div class="card-header"> <div class="card-logo-container" id="logoContainer"><span class="card-logo-placeholder">LOGO</span></div> <div class="card-inst-info"> <div class="card-inst-name" id="cardInstName">University of Technology</div> <div class="card-subtitle" id="cardSubtitle">STUDENT IDENTITY CARD</div> </div> </div> <div class="card-divider" id="cardDivider1"></div> <div class="card-title-bar" id="cardTitleBar"><span class="card-title-text" id="cardTitleText">ID CARD</span></div> <div class="card-body"> <div class="card-photo-section" id="photoSection"> <div class="card-photo" id="cardPhoto"><span class="card-photo-placeholder">👤</span></div> <div class="card-detail-row" style="justify-content:center"><span class="card-detail-label" style="min-width:auto">Blood:</span><span class="card-detail-value" id="valBlood">B+</span></div> </div> <div class="card-details"> <div class="card-detail-row"><span class="card-detail-label">Name:</span><span class="card-detail-value" id="valName">John Smith</span></div> <div class="card-detail-row"><span class="card-detail-label">ID No:</span><span class="card-detail-value" id="valId">2024-CSE-001</span></div> <div class="card-detail-row"><span class="card-detail-label">Department:</span><span class="card-detail-value" id="valDept">Computer Science & Engineering</span></div> <div class="card-detail-row"><span class="card-detail-label">Session:</span><span class="card-detail-value" id="valSession">2024-2025</span></div> <div class="card-detail-row"><span class="card-detail-label">DOB:</span><span class="card-detail-value" id="valDob">15 May 2002</span></div> </div> </div> <div class="card-footer"> <div class="card-dates-row"> <div class="card-date-item"><div class="card-date-label">Issue Date</div><div class="card-date-value" id="valIssue">01 Sep 2024</div></div> <div class="card-date-item"><div class="card-date-label">Expiry Date</div><div class="card-date-value" id="valExpiry">31 Aug 2028</div></div> </div> <div class="card-bottom-divider" id="cardDivider2"></div> <div class="card-signature-section"> <div class="card-address-section"> <div class="card-address-label" id="lblAddr">Address</div> <div class="card-address-value" id="valAddr">123 Main Street, Dhaka</div> </div> <div class="card-signature-box"> <div class="card-signature-line"></div> <div class="card-signature-name" id="valSignature">Prof. A. Rahman</div> <div class="card-signature-title" id="valSigTitle">Registrar</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="download-section"> <button class="download-btn primary" id="dlPng" onclick="downloadCard('png')">📥 Download PNG</button> <button class="download-btn secondary" id="dlJpg" onclick="downloadCard('jpeg')">📥 Download JPEG</button> </div> </div> </div> <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js"></script> <script> // ========== CONFIG ========== var FONTS = ['Poppins','Roboto','Open Sans','Lato','Montserrat','Oswald','Raleway','Merriweather','Playfair Display','Nunito','Ubuntu','Quicksand','Cabin','Bitter','Libre Baskerville','Arial','Georgia','Times New Roman','Verdana','Courier
