New']; var FONT_DEFAULTS = {instName:'Montserrat',subtitle:'Poppins',studentName:'Poppins',studentId:'Roboto',label:'Poppins',value:'Poppins'}; // ========== TEXTURES (16) ========== var TEXTURES = [ {id:'none',label:'None',svg:'',pw:0,ph:0}, {id:'dots',label:'Dots',svg:'<circle cx="4" cy="4" r="1.2" fill="#000"/>',pw:8,ph:8}, {id:'lines-h',label:'H-Lines',svg:'<line x1="0" y1="4" x2="10" y2="4" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.8"/>',pw:10,ph:6}, {id:'lines-v',label:'V-Lines',svg:'<line x1="4" y1="0" x2="4" y2="10" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.8"/>',pw:6,ph:10}, {id:'diagonal-r',label:'Diag /',svg:'<line x1="0" y1="8" x2="8" y2="0" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.7"/>',pw:8,ph:8}, {id:'diagonal-l',label:'Diag \\\\',svg:'<line x1="0" y1="0" x2="8" y2="8" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.7"/>',pw:8,ph:8}, {id:'crosshatch',label:'Cross',svg:'<line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="8" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="0" y1="0" x2="8" y2="0" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.5"/>',pw:8,ph:8}, {id:'grid',label:'Grid',svg:'<line x1="0" y1="0" x2="12" y2="0" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="12" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.5"/>',pw:12,ph:12}, {id:'diamond',label:'Diamond',svg:'<polygon points="6,0 12,6 6,12 0,6" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.6"/>',pw:12,ph:12}, {id:'zigzag',label:'Zigzag',svg:'<polyline points="0,8 4,2 8,8 12,2 16,8" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.7"/>',pw:16,ph:10}, {id:'waves',label:'Waves',svg:'<path d="M0,5 Q4,0 8,5 Q12,10 16,5" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.7"/>',pw:16,ph:10}, {id:'circles',label:'Circles',svg:'<circle cx="6" cy="6" r="4" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.5"/>',pw:12,ph:12}, {id:'hexagon',label:'Hexagon',svg:'<polygon points="5,0 10,3 10,9 5,12 0,9 0,3" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.5"/>',pw:10,ph:12}, {id:'stars',label:'Stars',svg:'<polygon points="5,0 6.5,3.5 10,3.5 7.2,5.8 8.2,9.5 5,7.2 1.8,9.5 2.8,5.8 0,3.5 3.5,3.5" fill="#000"/>',pw:12,ph:12}, {id:'noise',label:'Noise',svg:'<circle cx="1" cy="1" r="0.6" fill="#000"/><circle cx="3.5" cy="3" r="0.4" fill="#000"/>',pw:5,ph:5}, {id:'bricks',label:'Bricks',svg:'<rect x="0" y="0" width="16" height="6" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="8" y1="6" x2="8" y2="12" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.5"/><rect x="0" y="6" width="16" height="6" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="0.5"/>',pw:16,ph:12} ]; // ========== STATE ========== var S = { bgType:'solid', texture:'none', outline:'none', files:{logo:null,photo:null,bg:null}, bold:{instName:true,subtitle:true,studentName:true,studentId:false}, italic:{instName:false,subtitle:false,studentName:false,studentId:false}, fontSel:{} }; // ========== INIT FONTS ========== document.querySelectorAll('.fontsel').forEach(function(sel){ var t = sel.dataset.target; FONTS.forEach(function(f){ var o = document.createElement('option'); o.value=f; o.textContent=f; o.style.fontFamily=f; if(f===(FONT_DEFAULTS[t]||'Poppins')) o.selected=true; sel.appendChild(o); }); S.fontSel[t] = sel; }); // ========== BUILD TEXTURE GRID ========== (function(){ var grid = document.getElementById('textureGrid'); TEXTURES.forEach(function(tex,i){ var div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'texture-option'+(i===0?' active':''); div.title = tex.label; div.onclick = function(){ setTexture(tex.id, div); }; if(tex.id==='none'){ div.innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100%;font-size:.55rem;color:#999;background:#fff">None</div>'; } else { div.innerHTML = '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100%" height="100%" style="background:#fff"><defs><pattern id="prev-'+tex.id+'" x="0" y="0" width="'+tex.pw+'" height="'+tex.ph+'" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">'+tex.svg+'</pattern></defs><rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#prev-'+tex.id+')"/></svg>'; } grid.appendChild(div); }); })(); // ========== STYLE PANEL TOGGLE (replaces <details>) ========== function toggleStylePanel(btn){ var body = btn.nextElementSibling; var isOpen = body.classList.contains('open'); if(isOpen){ body.classList.remove('open'); btn.classList.remove('open'); btn.textContent = '🎨 Style Options ▸'; } else { body.classList.add('open'); btn.classList.add('open'); btn.textContent = '🎨 Style Options ▾'; } } // ========== SECTION TOGGLE (simple display toggle) ========== function toggleSection(el){ var c = el.nextElementSibling; var a = el.querySelector('.toggle-arrow'); if(c.classList.contains('collapsed')){ c.classList.remove('collapsed'); a.classList.remove('collapsed'); } else { c.classList.add('collapsed'); a.classList.add('collapsed'); } } // ========== HELPERS ========== function setPresetSize(w,h,btn){ document.getElementById('cardWidth').value=w; document.getElementById('cardHeight').value=h; document.querySelectorAll('.preset-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active');}); btn.classList.add('active'); updateCardSize(); } function updateCardSize(){ var c=document.getElementById('idCard'); c.style.width=document.getElementById('cardWidth').value+'px'; c.style.height=document.getElementById('cardHeight').value+'px'; c.style.borderRadius=document.getElementById('cardRadius').value+'px'; updatePreview(); } function setBgType(t,btn){ S.bgType=t; document.querySelectorAll('.bg-type-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active');}); btn.classList.add('active'); document.querySelectorAll('.bg-options').forEach(function(e){e.classList.remove('active');}); document.getElementById(t==='solid'?'bgSolid':t==='gradient'?'bgGradient':'bgImage').classList.add('active'); updatePreview(); } function setTexture(id,el){ S.texture=id; document.querySelectorAll('.texture-option').forEach(function(e){e.classList.remove('active');}); el.classList.add('active'); updatePreview(); } function setOutline(o,el){ S.outline=o; document.querySelectorAll('.outline-option').forEach(function(e){e.classList.remove('active');}); el.classList.add('active'); updatePreview(); } function togStyle(btn,type){ var f=btn.dataset.field; if(type==='bold'){S.bold[f]=!S.bold[f];} else{S.italic[f]=!S.italic[f];} btn.classList.toggle('active'); updatePreview(); } function handleFile(e,type){ var file=e.target.files[0]; if(!file)return; var r=new FileReader(); r.onload=function(ev){S.files[type]=ev.target.result;updatePreview();}; r.readAsDataURL(file); } function fmtDate(s){ if(!s)return''; var d=new Date(s+'T00:00:00'); var m=['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec']; return String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')+' '+m[d.getMonth()]+' '+d.getFullYear(); } function getFont(target){return S.fontSel[target]?S.fontSel[target].value:'Poppins';} // ========== TEXTURE PNG GENERATOR ========== function textureToPng(texId, w, h, callback){ if(texId==='none'){callback(null);return;} var tex = null; for(var i=0;i<TEXTURES.length;i++){if(TEXTURES[i].id===texId){tex=TEXTURES[i];break;}} if(!tex||!tex.svg){callback(null);return;} var svg='<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="'+w+'" height="'+h+'"><defs><pattern id="p" x="0" y="0" width="'+tex.pw+'" height="'+tex.ph+'" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">'+tex.svg+'</pattern></defs><rect width="'+w+'" height="'+h+'" fill="url(#p)"/></svg>'; var blob = new Blob([svg],{type:'image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8'}); var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); var img = new Image(); img.onload=function(){ var cv=document.createElement('canvas'); cv.width=w;cv.height=h; var ctx=cv.getContext('2d'); ctx.drawImage(img,0,0,w,h); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); callback(cv.toDataURL('image/png')); }; img.onerror=function(){URL.revokeObjectURL(url);callback(null);}; img.src=url; } // ========== MAIN UPDATE ========== function updatePreview(){ var card=document.getElementById('idCard'); var borderColor=document.getElementById('borderColor').value; var accentColor=document.getElementById('accentColor').value; var dc1=document.getElementById('decoColor1').value; var dc2=document.getElementById('decoColor2').value; var w=parseInt(document.getElementById('cardWidth').value)||340; var h=parseInt(document.getElementById('cardHeight').value)||215; // Background var bg=document.getElementById('cardBgLayer'); if(S.bgType==='solid'){bg.style.background=document.getElementById('bgColor').value;bg.style.opacity=1;} else if(S.bgType==='gradient'){bg.style.background='linear-gradient('+document.getElementById('gradAngle').value+'deg,'+document.getElementById('gradColor1').value+','+document.getElementById('gradColor2').value+')';bg.style.opacity=1;} else{if(S.files.bg){bg.style.background='url('+S.files.bg+') center/cover no-repeat';bg.style.opacity=document.getElementById('bgImageOpacity').value/100;}else{bg.style.background='#fff';bg.style.opacity=1;}} // Texture - use inline PNG img for html2canvas var texLayer=document.getElementById('cardTextureLayer'); var texOp=(parseInt(document.getElementById('textureOpacity').value)||12)/100; if(S.texture==='none'){ texLayer.innerHTML='';texLayer.style.opacity=0; } else { textureToPng(S.texture, w, h, function(pngUrl){ if(pngUrl){ texLayer.innerHTML='<img src="'+pngUrl+'" style="display:block;width:100%;height:100%;">'; texLayer.style.opacity=texOp; } }); } // Outline card.style.border='none'; card.style.boxShadow='0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5)'; switch(S.outline){ case'simple':card.style.border='3px solid '+borderColor;break; case'double':card.style.border='4px double '+borderColor;break; case'dashed':card.style.border='2px dashed '+borderColor;break; case'gradient-border':card.style.boxShadow='0 0 0 3px '+borderColor+',0 0 0 5px '+accentColor+',0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5)';break; case'shadow':card.style.boxShadow='0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.35),0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,.05)';break; case'thick-left':card.style.borderLeft='6px solid '+borderColor;break; case'thick-top':card.style.borderTop='6px solid '+borderColor;break; } // Deco var sTl=document.getElementById('decoCircleTl'),sBr=document.getElementById('decoCircleBr'); sTl.style.display=document.getElementById('showDecoCircles').checked?'block':'none'; sBr.style.display=document.getElementById('showDecoCircles').checked?'block':'none'; sTl.style.background=dc1+'14';sBr.style.background=dc2+'10'; var ss=document.getElementById('showDecoStripes').checked; document.getElementById('decoStripeRight').style.display=ss?'block':'none'; document.getElementById('decoStripeLeft').style.display=ss?'block':'none'; document.getElementById('decoStripeRight').style.background='linear-gradient(180deg,'+dc1+','+dc2+')'; document.getElementById('decoStripeLeft').style.background='linear-gradient(180deg,'+dc2+','+dc1+')'; document.getElementById('decoCornerTr').style.display=document.getElementById('showDecoCorner').checked?'block':'none'; document.getElementById('decoCornerTr').style.borderTopColor=dc1+'20'; var sd=document.getElementById('showDividers').checked; document.getElementById('cardDivider1').style.display=sd?'block':'none'; document.getElementById('cardDivider2').style.display=sd?'block':'none'; document.getElementById('cardDivider1').style.background='linear-gradient(90deg,'+dc1+','+dc2+','+dc1+')'; document.getElementById('cardDivider2').style.background='linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,'+dc1+',transparent)'; document.getElementById('cardTitleBar').style.display=document.getElementById('showTitleBar').checked?'block':'none'; document.getElementById('cardTitleText').style.background='linear-gradient(90deg,'+dc1+','+dc1+'dd)'; // Logo var lc=document.getElementById('logoContainer'); lc.innerHTML=S.files.logo?'<img src="'+S.files.logo+'" alt="Logo">':'<span class="card-logo-placeholder">LOGO</span>'; lc.style.borderColor=borderColor+'33'; // Institution Name var iEl=document.getElementById('cardInstName'); iEl.textContent=document.getElementById('instName').value||'Institution Name'; iEl.style.fontFamily=getFont('instName'); iEl.style.fontSize=document.getElementById('instNameSize').value+'px'; iEl.style.color=document.getElementById('instNameColor').value; iEl.style.fontWeight=S.bold.instName?'700':'400'; iEl.style.fontStyle=S.italic.instName?'italic':'normal'; // Subtitle var sEl=document.getElementById('cardSubtitle'); sEl.textContent=document.getElementById('subtitleText').value||''; sEl.style.fontFamily=getFont('subtitle'); sEl.style.fontSize=document.getElementById('subtitleSize').value+'px'; sEl.style.color=document.getElementById('subtitleColor').value; sEl.style.fontWeight=S.bold.subtitle?'700':'400'; sEl.style.fontStyle=S.italic.subtitle?'italic':'normal'; // Photo document.getElementById('photoSection').style.display=document.getElementById('showPhoto').checked?'flex':'none'; var pc=document.getElementById('cardPhoto'); pc.innerHTML=S.files.photo?'<img src="'+S.files.photo+'" alt="Photo">':'<span class="card-photo-placeholder">👤</span>'; pc.style.borderColor=borderColor; // Name var nEl=document.getElementById('valName'); nEl.textContent=document.getElementById('studentName').value||'Name'; nEl.style.fontFamily=getFont('studentName'); nEl.style.fontSize=document.getElementById('studentNameSize').value+'px'; nEl.style.color=document.getElementById('studentNameColor').value; nEl.style.fontWeight=S.bold.studentName?'700':'400'; nEl.style.fontStyle=S.italic.studentName?'italic':'normal'; // ID var idEl=document.getElementById('valId'); idEl.textContent=document.getElementById('studentId').value||'ID'; idEl.style.fontFamily=getFont('studentId'); idEl.style.fontSize=document.getElementById('studentIdSize').value+'px'; idEl.style.color=document.getElementById('studentIdColor').value; idEl.style.fontWeight=S.bold.studentId?'700':'400'; idEl.style.fontStyle=S.italic.studentId?'italic':'normal'; // Others document.getElementById('valDept').textContent=document.getElementById('department').value||''; document.getElementById('valSession').textContent=document.getElementById('session').value||''; document.getElementById('valBlood').textContent=document.getElementById('bloodGroup').value||''; document.getElementById('valDob').textContent=fmtDate(document.getElementById('dob').value); // Label/Value global var lf=getFont('label'),ls=document.getElementById('labelSize').value+'px',lc2=document.getElementById('labelColor').value; var vf=getFont('value'),vs=document.getElementById('valueSize').value+'px',vc=document.getElementById('valueColor').value; document.querySelectorAll('.card-detail-label').forEach(function(e){e.style.fontFamily=lf;e.style.fontSize=ls;e.style.color=lc2;}); document.querySelectorAll('.card-detail-value').forEach(function(e){ if(e.id==='valName'||e.id==='valId')return; e.style.fontFamily=vf;e.style.fontSize=vs;e.style.color=vc; }); // Dates document.getElementById('valIssue').textContent=fmtDate(document.getElementById('issueDate').value); document.getElementById('valExpiry').textContent=fmtDate(document.getElementById('expiryDate').value); document.querySelectorAll('.card-date-label').forEach(function(e){e.style.color=lc2+'99';}); document.querySelectorAll('.card-date-value').forEach(function(e){e.style.fontFamily=vf;e.style.color=vc;}); // Address & Signature document.getElementById('valAddr').textContent=document.getElementById('address').value||''; document.getElementById('valAddr').style.fontFamily=vf;document.getElementById('valAddr').style.color=vc; document.getElementById('lblAddr').style.color=lc2+'99'; document.getElementById('valSignature').textContent=document.getElementById('signatureName').value||''; document.getElementById('valSigTitle').textContent=document.getElementById('signatureTitle').value||''; } // ========== DOWNLOAD ========== function downloadCard(format){ var btnP=document.getElementById('dlPng'),btnJ=document.getElementById('dlJpg'); btnP.disabled=true;btnJ.disabled=true; btnP.textContent='⏳ Preparing...';btnJ.textContent='⏳ Preparing...'; var card=document.getElementById('idCard'); var cardW=parseInt(document.getElementById('cardWidth').value)||340; var cardH=parseInt(document.getElementById('cardHeight').value)||215; var scale=3; var texOp=(parseInt(document.getElementById('textureOpacity').value)||12)/100; // Step 1: Ensure texture is PNG var step1 = function(cb){ if(S.texture==='none'){cb();return;} textureToPng(S.texture, cardW, cardH, function(pngUrl){ if(pngUrl){ var tl=document.getElementById('cardTextureLayer'); tl.innerHTML='<img src="'+pngUrl+'" style="display:block;width:100%;height:100%;">'; tl.style.opacity=texOp; } setTimeout(cb, 250); }); }; step1(function(){ html2canvas(card, { scale:scale, useCORS:true, allowTaint:true, backgroundColor:null, logging:false, imageTimeout:10000 }).then(function(canvas){ // Step 2: Manually overlay texture at high-res for safety if(S.texture==='none'){return canvas;} return new Promise(function(resolve){ textureToPng(S.texture, cardW*scale, cardH*scale, function(hiUrl){ if(hiUrl){ var img=new Image(); img.onload=function(){ var ctx=canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.globalAlpha=texOp; ctx.drawImage(img,0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height); ctx.globalAlpha=1; resolve(canvas); }; img.onerror=function(){resolve(canvas);}; img.src=hiUrl; } else {resolve(canvas);} }); }); }).then(function(canvas){ var link=document.createElement('a'); if(format==='png'){link.download='student-id-card.png';link.href=canvas.toDataURL('image/png');} else{link.download='student-id-card.jpeg';link.href=canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg',0.95);} link.click(); updatePreview(); }).catch(function(err){ console.error('Download error:',err); alert('Download failed: '+err.message); }).finally(function(){ btnP.disabled=false;btnJ.disabled=false; btnP.innerHTML='📥 Download PNG';btnJ.innerHTML='📥 Download JPEG'; }); }); } // ========== INIT ========== updateCardSize(); </script> </body> </html> <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"/> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0"/> <title>Student ID Card Generator</title> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto:wght@400;700&family=Montserrat:wght@400;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700&family=Lato:wght@400;700&family=Raleway:wght@400;700&family=Poppins:wght@400;700&family=Open+Sans:wght@400;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Dancing+Script:wght@400;700&family=Merriweather:wght@400;700&family=Cinzel:wght@400;700&family=Exo+2:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/> <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js"></script> <style> *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0} body{font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f0c29,#302b63,#24243e);min-height:100vh;color:#fff;padding:20px} h1.main-title{text-align:center;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:30px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f093fb,#f5576c,#fda085);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;text-transform:uppercase} .container{display:flex;gap:24px;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap} .panel{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:18px;padding:20px;width:390px;min-width:320px;flex-shrink:0;max-height:93vh;overflow-y:auto} .panel::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px} .panel::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent} .panel::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(167,139,250,0.4);border-radius:4px} .panel h2{font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:14px;color:#f5c542;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);padding-bottom:8px} .section{margin-bottom:16px} .section h3{font-size:0.78rem;color:#a78bfa;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:8px;font-weight:600} label{display:block;font-size:0.8rem;color:#cbd5e1;margin-bottom:3px} input[type=text],input[type=date],input[type=number],select,textarea{width:100%;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:#fff;font-size:0.82rem;outline:none;margin-bottom:8px;transition:border 0.2s;font-family:inherit} input[type=text]:focus,input[type=date]:focus,input[type=number]:focus,select:focus{border-color:#a78bfa} select option{background:#302b63;color:#fff} input[type=color]{width:36px;height:36px;border:none;border-radius:6px;background:transparent;cursor:pointer;padding:2px;vertical-align:middle} input[type=range]{width:100%;accent-color:#a78bfa;margin-bottom:4px} .row{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap} .row label{margin-bottom:0} .row input,.row select{margin-bottom:0} .checkbox-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px} .checkbox-row input[type=checkbox]{width:16px;height:16px;accent-color:#a78bfa} .checkbox-row label{font-size:0.82rem;color:#cbd5e1;margin:0} .btn{padding:8px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:none;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;font-family:inherit} .btn-purple{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#a78bfa);color:#fff} .btn-purple:hover{opacity:0.85;transform:translateY(-1px)} .btn-download{display:block;width:100%;padding:14px;border-radius:14px;border:none;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f093fb 0%,#f5576c 50%,#fda085 100%);color:#fff;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:18px;transition:all 0.2s;font-family:inherit} .btn-download:hover{opacity:0.9;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(245,87,108,0.4)} .field-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:8px} .field-row label{min-width:50px;font-size:0.78rem;margin:0} .field-row input[type=text],.field-row select{margin-bottom:0;flex:1;min-width:80px} .field-row input[type=number]{margin-bottom:0;width:54px;flex:none} .field-row input[type=color]{flex:none} .size-presets{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px} .size-preset-btn{padding:5px 10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);color:#e2e8f0;font-size:0.72rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;font-family:inherit;text-align:center;line-height:1.4} .size-preset-btn:hover,.size-preset-btn.active{background:#7c3aed;border-color:#a78bfa} .texture-grid{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:8px 0} .tex-btn{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid transparent;transition:all 0.15s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center} .tex-btn:hover,.tex-btn.active{border-color:#f5c542;transform:scale(1.1);box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(245,197,66,0.4)} .tex-label{font-size:0.55rem;color:#fff;text-align:center;font-weight:600;text-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);pointer-events:none;position:absolute;bottom:3px;left:0;right:0} .outline-btns{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:8px} .outline-btn{padding:5px 11px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);color:#e2e8f0;font-size:0.75rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;font-family:inherit} .outline-btn:hover,.outline-btn.active{background:#7c3aed;border-color:#a78bfa} .tabs{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:14px} .tab-btn{padding:6px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:#cbd5e1;font-size:0.75rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;font-family:inherit} .tab-btn.active{background:#7c3aed;border-color:#a78bfa;color:#fff} .tab-pane{display:none} .tab-pane.active{display:block} small{font-size:0.72rem;color:#94a3b8} /* Premium Color Grid */ .premium-grid{display:flex;gap:7px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:8px 0} .prem-btn{width:52px;height:36px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid transparent;transition:all 0.18s;position:relative} .prem-btn:hover,.prem-btn.active{border-color:#f5c542;transform:scale(1.08);box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)} .prem-btn span{position:absolute;bottom:2px;left:0;right:0;font-size:0.45rem;color:#fff;text-align:center;text-shadow:0 1px 3px #000;font-weight:700;pointer-events:none} .preview-area{flex:1;min-width:300px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:18px} .preview-label{font-size:0.8rem;color:#94a3b8;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase} #card-wrapper{display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;padding:20px} #id-card{position:relative;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6),0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.08);transition:width 0.3s,height 0.3s} @media(max-width:900px){.container{flex-direction:column;align-items:center}.panel{width:100%;max-width:520px}} </style> </head> <body> <h1 class="main-title">🎓 Student ID Card Generator</h1> <div class="container"> <!-- ══════════ LEFT PANEL ══════════ --> <div class="panel"> <h2>⚙️ Customize</h2> <div class="tabs"> <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="switchTab('tab-size',this)">Size</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('tab-inst',this)">Institution</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('tab-student',this)">Student</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('tab-bg',this)">Background</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('tab-style',this)">Style</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('tab-fonts',this)">Fonts</button> </div> <!-- TAB SIZE --> <div id="tab-size" class="tab-pane active"> <div class="section"> <h3>Card Size Presets</h3> <div class="size-presets"> <button class="size-preset-btn active" onclick="applyPreset(this,320,200)">CR80<br><small>320×200</small></button> <button class="size-preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(this,340,215)">A8<br><small>340×215</small></button> <button class="size-preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(this,360,225)">Slim<br><small>360×225</small></button> <button class="size-preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(this,390,245)">Medium<br><small>390×245</small></button> <button class="size-preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(this,430,270)">Large<br><small>430×270</small></button> <button class="size-preset-btn" onclick="applyPreset(this,470,295)">XL<br><small>470×295</small></button> </div> <div class="row"> <label>W (px)</label> <input type="number" id="card-width" value="320" min="200" max="620" style="width:70px;margin:0" oninput="updateCard()"> <label>H (px)</label> <input type="number" id="card-height" value="200" min="150" max="500" style="width:70px;margin:0" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> </div> </div> <!-- TAB INSTITUTION --> <div id="tab-inst" class="tab-pane"> <div class="section"> <h3>Institution Logo</h3> <input type="file" id="logo-upload" accept="image/*" onchange="loadLogo(this)" style="display:none"> <button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="document.getElementById('logo-upload').click()">📁 Upload Logo</button> <button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="removeLogo()" style="margin-left:6px">✕ Remove</button> </div> <div class="section"> <h3>Institution Name</h3> <input type="text" id="inst-name" value="Springfield University" oninput="updateCard()"> <div class="field-row"> <label>Font</label> <select id="inst-font" onchange="updateCard()"><option value="'Poppins',sans-serif" selected>Poppins</option><option value="'Montserrat',sans-serif">Montserrat</option><option value="'Roboto',sans-serif">Roboto</option><option value="'Raleway',sans-serif">Raleway</option><option value="'Oswald',sans-serif">Oswald</option><option value="'Cinzel',serif">Cinzel</option><option value="'Exo 2',sans-serif">Exo 2</option><option value="'Playfair Display',serif">Playfair Display</option><option value="'Merriweather',serif">Merriweather</option><option value="'Open Sans',sans-serif">Open Sans</option><option value="'Lato',sans-serif">Lato</option></select> <input type="number" id="inst-size" value="13" min="8" max="30" style="width:54px;margin:0" oninput="updateCard()"> <input type="color" id="inst-color" value="#ffffff" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="checkbox-row"> <input type="checkbox" id="inst-bold" checked onchange="updateCard()"><label for="inst-bold">Bold</label> <input type="checkbox" id="inst-italic" onchange="updateCard()" style="margin-left:12px"><label for="inst-italic">Italic</label> </div> </div> <div class="section"> <h3>Sub-text (centered below name)</h3> <input type="text" id="inst-sub" value="Est. 2001 | Accredited Institution" oninput="updateCard()"> <div class="field-row"> <label>Font</label> <select id="sub-font" onchange="updateCard()"><option value="'Poppins',sans-serif" selected>Poppins</option><option value="'Montserrat',sans-serif">Montserrat</option><option value="'Lato',sans-serif">Lato</option><option value="'Raleway',sans-serif">Raleway</option><option value="'Roboto',sans-serif">Roboto</option></select> <input type="number" id="sub-size" value="8" min="6" max="18" style="width:54px;margin:0" oninput="updateCard()"> <input type="color" id="sub-color" value="#e0d4ff" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="checkbox-row"> <input type="checkbox" id="sub-bold" onchange="updateCard()"><label for="sub-bold">Bold</label> <input type="checkbox" id="sub-italic" checked onchange="updateCard()" style="margin-left:12px"><label for="sub-italic">Italic</label> </div> </div> </div> <!-- TAB STUDENT --> <div id="tab-student" class="tab-pane"> <div class="section"> <h3>Student Photo</h3> <div class="checkbox-row"><input type="checkbox" id="show-photo" checked onchange="updateCard()"><label for="show-photo">Show Photo</label></div> <input type="file" id="photo-upload" accept="image/*" onchange="loadPhoto(this)" style="display:none"> <button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="document.getElementById('photo-upload').click()">📷 Upload Photo</button> <button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="removePhoto()" style="margin-left:6px">✕ Remove</button> </div> <div class="section"> <h3>Student Details</h3> <label>Full Name</label> <input type="text" id="std-name" value="John Michael Doe" oninput="updateCard()"> <div class="field-row"> <label>Font</label> <select id="std-name-font" onchange="updateCard()"><option value="'Poppins',sans-serif" selected>Poppins</option><option value="'Montserrat',sans-serif">Montserrat</option><option value="'Raleway',sans-serif">Raleway</option><option value="'Dancing Script',cursive">Dancing Script</option><option value="'Lato',sans-serif">Lato</option></select> <input type="number" id="std-name-size" value="11" min="7" max="22" style="width:54px;margin:0" oninput="updateCard()"> <input type="color" id="std-name-color" value="#ffffff" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="checkbox-row"><input type="checkbox" id="std-name-bold" checked onchange="updateCard()"><label for="std-name-bold">Bold</label></div> <label>Student ID</label> <input type="text" id="std-id" value="STU-2024-00123" oninput="updateCard()"> <label>Department</label> <input type="text" id="std-dept" value="Department of Computer Science" oninput="updateCard()"> <label>Programme</label> <input type="text" id="std-prog" value="B.Sc. (Hons) in Computer Science" oninput="updateCard()"> <label>Year / Semester</label> <input type="text" id="std-year" value="3rd Year, Semester - I" oninput="updateCard()"> <label>Address</label> <input type="text" id="std-address" value="123 Campus Road, Springfield" oninput="updateCard()"> <div class="field-row" style="margin-top:4px"> <label>Info Font</label> <select id="info-font" onchange="updateCard()"><option value="'Poppins',sans-serif" selected>Poppins</option><option value="'Roboto',sans-serif">Roboto</option><option value="'Open Sans',sans-serif">Open Sans</option><option value="'Lato',sans-serif">Lato</option><option value="'Merriweather',serif">Merriweather</option></select> <input type="number" id="info-size" value="8" min="6" max="14" style="width:54px;margin:0" oninput="updateCard()"> <input type="color" id="info-color" value="#e2e8f0" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <label>Issue Date</label> <input type="date" id="issue-date" value="2024-01-10" oninput="updateCard()"> <label>Expiry Date</label> <input type="date" id="expire-date" value="2028-12-31" oninput="updateCard()"> <div class="field-row"> <label>Date Font</label> <select id="date-font" onchange="updateCard()"><option value="'Poppins',sans-serif" selected>Poppins</option><option value="'Roboto',sans-serif">Roboto</option><option value="'Lato',sans-serif">Lato</option></select> <input type="number" id="date-size" value="8" min="6" max="14" style="width:54px;margin:0" oninput="updateCard()"> <input type="color" id="date-color" value="#ffffff" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <div class="section"> <h3>Authorized Signature</h3> <input type="text" id="sig-name" value="Dr. Emily Watson" oninput="updateCard()"> <div class="field-row"> <label>Font</label> <select id="sig-font" onchange="updateCard()"><option value="'Dancing Script',cursive" selected>Dancing Script</option><option value="'Poppins',sans-serif">Poppins</option><option value="'Raleway',sans-serif">Raleway</option><option value="'Cinzel',serif">Cinzel</option></select> <input type="number" id="sig-size" value="10" min="7" max="18" style="width:54px;margin:0" oninput="updateCard()"> <input type="color" id="sig-color" value="#ffffff" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> </div> </div> <!-- TAB BACKGROUND --> <div id="tab-bg" class="tab-pane"> <div class="section"> <h3>Background Type</h3> <div class="outline-btns"> <button class="outline-btn active" id="bg-solid-btn" onclick="setBgType('solid')">Solid</button> <button class="outline-btn" id="bg-gradient-btn" onclick="setBgType('gradient')">Gradient</button> <button class="outline-btn" id="bg-image-btn" onclick="setBgType('image')">Image</button> </div> </div> <div id="bg-solid-opts" class="section"> <h3>Solid Color</h3> <div class="row"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="bg-solid-color" value="#4c1d95" oninput="updateCard()"></div> </div> <div id="bg-gradient-opts" class="section" style="display:none"> <h3>Gradient Colors</h3> <div class="row"> <label>C1</label><input type="color" id="bg-grad-1" value="#4c1d95" oninput="updateCard()"> <label>C2</label><input type="color" id="bg-grad-2" value="#1e3a8a" oninput="updateCard()"> <label>C3</label><input type="color" id="bg-grad-3" value="#0f172a" oninput="updateCard()"> <input type="checkbox" id="bg-use-3" onchange="updateCard()" style="width:16px;height:16px;accent-color:#a78bfa"><label style="margin:0;font-size:0.75rem">Use C3</label> </div> <label style="margin-top:6px">Direction</label> <select id="bg-grad-dir" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="135deg">Diagonal ↘</option> <option value="to right">Horizontal →</option> <option value="to bottom">Vertical ↓</option> <option value="to top right">Top-Right ↗</option> <option value="225deg">Diagonal ↙</option> <option value="to top">Vertical ↑</option> </select> </div> <div id="bg-image-opts" class="section" style="display:none"> <h3>Background Image</h3> <input type="file" id="bg-img-upload" accept="image/*" onchange="loadBgImage(this)" style="display:none"> <button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="document.getElementById('bg-img-upload').click()">📁 Upload Image</button> <button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="removeBgImage()" style="margin-left:6px">✕ Remove</button> <label style="margin-top:8px">Overlay Opacity</label> <input type="range" id="bg-overlay" min="0" max="0.9" step="0.05" value="0.45" oninput="updateCard()"> <div class="row"><label>Overlay Color</label><input type="color" id="bg-overlay-color" value="#1e0050" oninput="updateCard()"></div> </div> <!-- PREMIUM GRADIENTS --> <div class="section"> <h3>✨ Premium Color Combinations</h3> <small>Click to instantly apply a premium gradient:</small> <div class="premium-grid" id="premium-grid"></div> </div> </div> <!-- TAB STYLE --> <div id="tab-style" class="tab-pane"> <div class="section"> <h3>Card Border / Outline</h3> <div class="outline-btns"> <button class="outline-btn active" id="outline-none-btn" onclick="setOutline('none')">None</button> <button class="outline-btn" id="outline-solid-btn" onclick="setOutline('solid')">Solid</button> <button class="outline-btn" id="outline-dashed-btn" onclick="setOutline('dashed')">Dashed</button> <button class="outline-btn" id="outline-double-btn" onclick="setOutline('double')">Double</button> <button class="outline-btn" id="outline-groove-btn" onclick="setOutline('groove')">Groove</button> <button class="outline-btn" id="outline-ridge-btn" onclick="setOutline('ridge')">Ridge</button> </div> <div class="row"> <label>Width</label> <input type="number" id="outline-width" value="0" min="0" max="12" style="width:54px;margin:0" oninput="updateCard()"> <label>Color</label> <input type="color" id="outline-color" value="#a78bfa" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <label style="margin-top:8px">Border Radius</label> <input type="range" id="card-radius" min="0" max="36" value="14" oninput="updateCard()"> <div style="text-align:right;font-size:0.75rem;color:#94a3b8" id="radius-val">14px</div> </div> <div class="section"> <h3>🎨 Texture / Pattern Overlay</h3> <small>Works perfectly in preview AND download:</small> <div class="texture-grid" id="texture-grid"></div> <label style="margin-top:6px">Texture Opacity</label> <input type="range" id="tex-opacity" min="0.05" max="1" step="0.05" value="0.55" oninput="updateTexture()"> <div style="text-align:right;font-size:0.75rem;color:#94a3b8" id="tex-opacity-val">55%</div> </div> <div class="section"> <h3>Decorative Shapes</h3> <div class="checkbox-row"><input type="checkbox" id="deco-circles" checked onchange="updateCard()"><label for="deco-circles">Corner Circles</label></div> <div class="checkbox-row"><input type="checkbox" id="deco-strip" checked onchange="updateCard()"><label for="deco-strip">Top Color Strip</label></div> <div class="checkbox-row"><input type="checkbox" id="deco-triangle" onchange="updateCard()"><label for="deco-triangle">Corner Triangle</label></div> <div class="checkbox-row"><input type="checkbox" id="deco-lines" onchange="updateCard()"><label for="deco-lines">Diagonal Lines</label></div> <div class="checkbox-row"><input type="checkbox" id="deco-hexagon" onchange="updateCard()"><label for="deco-hexagon">Hexagon Deco</label></div> <div class="row" style="margin-top:4px"><label>Shape Color</label><input type="color" id="deco-color" value="#7c3aed" oninput="updateCard()"></div> </div> </div> <!-- TAB FONTS --> <div id="tab-fonts" class="tab-pane"> <div class="section"> <h3>Label Text</h3> <div class="field-row"> <label>Color</label><input type="color" id="label-color" value="#c4b5fd" oninput="updateCard()"> <label>Size</label><input type="number" id="label-size" value="7" min="5" max="12" style="width:54px;margin:0" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <div class="section"> <h3>Divider Line Color</h3> <div class="row"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="divider-color" value="#a78bfa" oninput="updateCard()"></div> </div> <div class="section"> <h3>Badge (Identity Card)</h3> <div class="field-row"> <label>Text</label><input type="color" id="badge-color" value="#ffffff" oninput="updateCard()"> <label>Bg</label><input type="color" id="badge-bg" value="#6d28d9" oninput="updateCard()"> <label>Size</label><input type="number" id="badge-size" value="8" min="6" max="16" style="width:54px;margin:0" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <div class="section"> <h3>Info Value Color</h3> <div class="row"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="info-val-color" value="#e2e8f0" oninput="updateCard()"></div> </div> </div> </div> <!-- ══════════ PREVIEW ══════════ --> <div class="preview-area"> <div class="preview-label">Live Preview</div> <div id="card-wrapper"> <div id="id-card"></div> </div> <button class="btn-download" onclick="downloadCard()">⬇ Download ID Card (PNG)</button> <small style="color:#64748b;margin-top:-10px">High-resolution PNG · Textures fully visible in download</small> </div> </div> <script> // ══════ STATE ══════ let logoSrc=null, photoSrc=null, bgImageSrc=null; let currentBgType='solid', currentOutline='none', currentTexture='none'; // ══════ PREMIUM COLOR COMBOS ══════ const premiumCombos=[ {name:'Royal Night', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1a2e,#16213e,#0f3460)', c1:'#1a1a2e',c2:'#0f3460',c3:'#16213e',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Deep Ocean', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#0f2027,#203a43,#2c5364)', c1:'#0f2027',c2:'#203a43',c3:'#2c5364',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Purple Haze', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#4a00e0,#8e2de2)', c1:'#4a00e0',c2:'#8e2de2',c3:'#000', u3:false,dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Crimson Dark', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#0d0d0d,#7b0000,#3a0000)', c1:'#0d0d0d',c2:'#7b0000',c3:'#3a0000',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Forest Dusk', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#0b1e12,#1a4731,#0d2e1a)', c1:'#0b1e12',c2:'#1a4731',c3:'#0d2e1a',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Midnight Blue', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#000428,#004e92)', c1:'#000428',c2:'#004e92',c3:'#000', u3:false,dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Gold Rush', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0a00,#3d1c00,#7b4200)', c1:'#1a0a00',c2:'#3d1c00',c3:'#7b4200',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Slate Pro', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#1c1c2e,#2d2d44,#1a1a30)', c1:'#1c1c2e',c2:'#2d2d44',c3:'#1a1a30',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Aurora', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#0b3d2e,#1a6b5a,#0e2d40)', c1:'#0b3d2e',c2:'#1a6b5a',c3:'#0e2d40',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Nebula', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#2d004b,#660099,#1a0033)', c1:'#2d004b',c2:'#660099',c3:'#1a0033',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Steel Blue', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#1b2735,#090a0f)', c1:'#1b2735',c2:'#090a0f',c3:'#000', u3:false,dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Volcanic', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0000,#4a0000,#700000)', c1:'#1a0000',c2:'#4a0000',c3:'#700000',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Teal Abyss', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#001f2b,#004d5e,#001520)', c1:'#001f2b',c2:'#004d5e',c3:'#001520',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Sand Dune', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1200,#3d2d00,#5c4400)', c1:'#1a1200',c2:'#3d2d00',c3:'#5c4400',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Indigo Deep', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#0d0221,#1a0545,#2b0a6e)', c1:'#0d0221',c2:'#1a0545',c3:'#2b0a6e',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Arctic', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#0a192f,#112240,#1d3557)', c1:'#0a192f',c2:'#112240',c3:'#1d3557',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Rose Noir', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0010,#4a0028,#200015)', c1:'#1a0010',c2:'#4a0028',c3:'#200015',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Graphite', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1a1a,#2d2d2d,#111)', c1:'#1a1a1a',c2:'#2d2d2d',c3:'#111', u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Sapphire', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#001b48,#02457a,#018abe)', c1:'#001b48',c2:'#02457a',c3:'#018abe',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, {name:'Emerald Dark', g:'linear-gradient(135deg,#002b1a,#00573b,#003d28)', c1:'#002b1a',c2:'#00573b',c3:'#003d28',u3:true, dir:'135deg'}, ]; function buildPremiumGrid(){ const grid=document.getElementById('premium-grid'); grid.innerHTML=''; premiumCombos.forEach((c,i)=>{ const d=document.createElement('div'); d.className='prem-btn'; d.style.background=c.g; d.title=c.name; d.innerHTML=`<span>${c.name}</span>`; d.onclick=()=>applyPremium(c,d); grid.appendChild(d); }); } function applyPremium(c,el){ document.querySelectorAll('.prem-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); el.classList.add('active'); setBgType('gradient'); document.getElementById('bg-grad-1').value=c.c1; document.getElementById('bg-grad-2').value=c.c2; document.getElementById('bg-grad-3').value=c.c3; document.getElementById('bg-use-3').checked=c.u3; document.getElementById('bg-grad-dir').value=c.dir; updateCard(); } // ══════ TEXTURE SYSTEM — Canvas-based (works in html2canvas download) ══════ const TEXTURES=[ {id:'none', name:'None'}, {id:'dots', name:'Dots'}, {id:'lines', name:'Lines 45°'}, {id:'hlines', name:'H-Lines'}, {id:'vlines', name:'V-Lines'}, {id:'grid', name:'Grid'}, {id:'diamond',name:'Diamond'}, {id:'hex', name:'Hexagon'}, {id:'wave', name:'Wave'}, {id:'cross', name:'Cross'}, {id:'zigzag', name:'ZigZag'}, {id:'checker',name:'Checker'}, ]; let texCanvas=null; // cached canvas for current texture function drawTexture(texId, w, h, opacity){ const c=document.createElement('canvas'); c.width=w; c.height=h; const ctx=c.getContext('2d'); ctx.globalAlpha=opacity; ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.55)'; ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.55)'; ctx.lineWidth=1; switch(texId){ case 'none': break; case 'dots':{ const sp=12; for(let x=0;x<w+sp;x+=sp) for(let y=0;y<h+sp;y+=sp){ ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,1.5,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill(); }break;} case 'lines':{ const sp=10; for(let i=-h;i<w+h;i+=sp){ ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(i,0);ctx.lineTo(i+h,h);ctx.stroke(); }break;} case 'hlines':{ for(let y=8;y<h;y+=10){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(w,y);ctx.stroke();}break;} case 'vlines':{ for(let x=8;x<w;x+=10){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,0);ctx.lineTo(x,h);ctx.stroke();}break;} case 'grid':{ for(let y=10;y<h;y+=12){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(w,y);ctx.stroke();} for(let x=10;x<w;x+=12){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,0);ctx.lineTo(x,h);ctx.stroke();}break;} case 'diamond':{ const sp=16; for(let row=0;row<Math.ceil(h/sp)+1;row++){ for(let col=0;col<Math.ceil(w/sp)+1;col++){ const cx=col*sp+(row%2)*sp/2, cy=row*sp; ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(cx,cy-6);ctx.lineTo(cx+6,cy);ctx.lineTo(cx,cy+6);ctx.lineTo(cx-6,cy);ctx.closePath();ctx.stroke(); } }break;} case 'hex':{ const r=12, h3=r*Math.sqrt(3); for(let row=0;row<Math.ceil(h/(h3))+2;row++){ for(let col=0;col<Math.ceil(w/(r*3))+2;col++){ const cx=col*r*3+(row%2)*r*1.5, cy=row*h3; ctx.beginPath(); for(let a=0;a<6;a++){const ang=Math.PI/180*(60*a-30);ctx.lineTo(cx+r*Math.cos(ang),cy+r*Math.sin(ang));} ctx.closePath();ctx.stroke(); } }break;} case 'wave':{ for(let y=10;y<h;y+=14){ ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y); for(let x=0;x<w;x+=4) ctx.lineTo(x,y+Math.sin(x/8)*4); ctx.stroke(); }break;} case 'cross':{ const sp=16,s=4; for(let y=0;y<h+sp;y+=sp) for(let x=0;x<w+sp;x+=sp){ ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x-s,y);ctx.lineTo(x+s,y);ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,y-s);ctx.lineTo(x,y+s);ctx.stroke(); }break;} case 'zigzag':{ const amp=6,per=16; for(let y=8;y<h;y+=per){ ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y); for(let x=0;x<w;x+=per/2){ ctx.lineTo(x+per/4,y-amp);ctx.lineTo(x+per/2,y); }ctx.stroke(); }break;} case 'checker':{ const cs=10; for(let row=0;row<Math.ceil(h/cs)+1;row++) for(let col=0;col<Math.ceil(w/cs)+1;col++){ if((row+col)%2===0){ctx.fillRect(col*cs,row*cs,cs,cs);} }break;} } return c; } function getTexDataURL(texId,w,h,opacity){ if(texId==='none') return null; const c=drawTexture(texId,w,h,opacity); return c.toDataURL('image/png'); } function buildTextureGrid(){ const grid=document.getElementById('texture-grid'); grid.innerHTML=''; TEXTURES.forEach(t=>{ const btn=document.createElement('div'); btn.className='tex-btn'+(t.id===currentTexture?' active':''); btn.id='tex-'+t.id; btn.title=t.name; if(t.id==='none'){ btn.style.background='#374151'; btn.style.border='2px solid '+(t.id===currentTexture?'#f5c542':'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)'); } else { // draw mini preview const preview=drawTexture(t.id,46,46,0.6); btn.style.backgroundImage=`url(${preview.toDataURL()})`; btn.style.backgroundColor='#1e1b4b'; btn.style.backgroundSize='cover'; } btn.innerHTML=`<span class="tex-label">${t.name}</span>`; btn.onclick=()=>{ currentTexture=t.id; document.querySelectorAll('.tex-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); updateCard(); }; grid.appendChild(btn); }); } function updateTexture(){ const val=document.getElementById('tex-opacity').value; document.getElementById('tex-opacity-val').textContent=Math.round(val*100)+'%'; updateCard(); } // ══════ HELPERS ══════ function v(id){return document.getElementById(id).value} function b(id){return document.getElementById(id).checked} function fmtDate(d){ if(!d) return '—'; const dt=new Date(d+'T00:00:00'); return dt.toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}); } // ══════ TAB SWITCH ══════ function switchTab(id,btn){ document.querySelectorAll('.tab-pane').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active')); document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active'); btn.classList.add('active'); } // ══════ SIZE PRESET ══════ function applyPreset(btn,w,h){ document.querySelectorAll('.size-preset-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('card-width').value=w; document.getElementById('card-height').value=h; updateCard(); } // ══════ IMAGE LOADERS ══════ function loadLogo(input){ if(!input.files[0]) return; const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=e=>{logoSrc=e.target.result;updateCard();}; r.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]); } function removeLogo(){logoSrc=null;updateCard();} function loadPhoto(input){ if(!input.files[0]) return; const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=e=>{photoSrc=e.target.result;updateCard();}; r.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]); } function removePhoto(){photoSrc=null;updateCard();} function loadBgImage(input){ if(!input.files[0]) return; const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=e=>{bgImageSrc=e.target.result;updateCard();}; r.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]); } function removeBgImage(){bgImageSrc=null;updateCard();} // ══════ BG TYPE ══════ function setBgType(type){ currentBgType=type; ['solid','gradient','image'].forEach(t=>{ document.getElementById('bg-'+t+'-btn').classList.toggle('active',t===type); document.getElementById('bg-'+t+'-opts').style.display=t===type?'':'none'; }); updateCard(); } // ══════ OUTLINE ══════ function setOutline(type){ currentOutline=type; ['none','solid','dashed','double','groove','ridge'].forEach(t=>{ const b=document.getElementById('outline-'+t+'-btn'); if(b) b.classList.toggle('active',t===type); }); if(type!=='none'){ const w=parseInt(v('outline-width'))||0; if(w<2) document.getElementById('outline-width').value=2; } updateCard(); } // ══════ MAIN RENDER ══════ function updateCard(){ const card=document.getElementById('id-card'); const W=parseInt(v('card-width'))||320; const H=parseInt(v('card-height'))||200; card.style.width=W+'px'; card.style.height=H+'px'; const sc=W/320; document.getElementById('radius-val').textContent=v('card-radius')+'px'; // ── Background ── let bgCSS=''; if(currentBgType==='solid'){ bgCSS=v('bg-solid-color'); } else if(currentBgType==='gradient'){ const c1=v('bg-grad-1'),c2=v('bg-grad-2'),c3=v('bg-grad-3'),dir=v('bg-grad-dir'); bgCSS=b('bg-use-3') ?`linear-gradient(${dir},${c1},${c2},${c3})` :`linear-gradient(${dir},${c1},${c2})`; } else { bgCSS=v('bg-solid-color'); } card.style.background=bgCSS; card.style.borderRadius=v('card-radius')+'px'; // ── Outline ── const outW=parseInt(v('outline-width'))||0; const outC=v('outline-color'); card.style.border=(currentOutline==='none'||outW===0)?'none':`${outW}px ${currentOutline} ${outC}`; // ── Typography values ── const iF=v('inst-font'), iS=(parseInt(v('inst-size'))||13)*sc, iC=v('inst-color'); const iBold=b('inst-bold')?'700':'400', iItal=b('inst-italic')?'italic':'normal'; const sF=v('sub-font'), sS=(parseInt(v('sub-size'))||8)*sc, sC=v('sub-color'); const sBold=b('sub-bold')?'700':'400', sItal=b('sub-italic')?'italic':'normal'; const nF=v('std-name-font'), nS=(parseInt(v('std-name-size'))||11)*sc, nC=v('std-name-color'); const nBold=b('std-name-bold')?'700':'400'; const inF=v('info-font'), inS=(parseInt(v('info-size'))||8)*sc, inC=v('info-color'); const lblC=v('label-color'), lblS=(parseInt(v('label-size'))||7)*sc; const dtF=v('date-font'), dtS=(parseInt(v('date-size'))||8)*sc, dtC=v('date-color'); const sigF=v('sig-font'), sigS=(parseInt(v('sig-size'))||10)*sc, sigC=v('sig-color'); const badgeC=v('badge-color'), badgeBg=v('badge-bg'), badgeS=(parseInt(v('badge-size'))||8)*sc; const divC=v('divider-color'); const infoValC=v('info-val-color'); const decoC=v('deco-color'); const texOpacity=parseFloat(v('tex-opacity'))||0.55; // ── Texture (Canvas-based data URL) ── const texDataURL=getTexDataURL(currentTexture,W,H,texOpacity); // ── Decorative shapes SVG ── let decoSVG=''; const showCircles=b('deco-circles'); const showStrip=b('deco-strip'); const showTriangle=b('deco-triangle'); const showDLines=b('deco-lines'); const showHex=b('deco-hexagon'); const cr=Math.round(50*sc); let svgContent=''; if(showStrip) svgContent+=`<rect x="0" y="0" width="${W}" height="${Math.round(5*sc)}" fill="${decoC}" opacity="0.9"/>`; if(showCircles){ svgContent+=`<circle cx="${W+Math.round(25*sc)}" cy="${-Math.round(25*sc)}" r="${cr}" fill="${decoC}" opacity="0.22"/>`; svgContent+=`<circle cx="${-Math.round(20*sc)}" cy="${H+Math.round(20*sc)}" r="${Math.round(40*sc)}" fill="${decoC}" opacity="0.18"/>`; svgContent+=`<circle cx="${W-Math.round(15*sc)}" cy="${Math.round(45*sc)}" r="${Math.round(28*sc)}" fill="${decoC}" opacity="0.13"/>`; } if(showTriangle){ const ts=Math.round(70*sc); svgContent+=`<polygon points="${W},${H-ts} ${W},${H} ${W-ts},${H}" fill="${decoC}" opacity="0.32"/>`; } if(showDLines){ const sp=Math.round(18*sc); for(let i=-H;i<W+H;i+=sp){ svgContent+=`<line x1="${i}" y1="0" x2="${i+H}" y2="${H}" stroke="${decoC}" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.08"/>`; } } if(showHex){ const hR=Math.round(40*sc); const hx=W-hR+10, hy=Math.round(H*0.55); const hex6=Array.from({length:6},(_,a)=>{ const ang=Math.PI/180*(60*a-30); return `${hx+hR*Math.cos(ang)},${hy+hR*Math.sin(ang)}`; }).join(' '); svgContent+=`<polygon points="${hex6}" fill="none" stroke="${decoC}" stroke-width="${Math.round(1.5*sc)}" opacity="0.2"/>`; // small hex const shR=Math.round(22*sc); const sx=Math.round(20*sc), sy=H-Math.round(20*sc); const shex6=Array.from({length:6},(_,a)=>{ const ang=Math.PI/180*(60*a-30); return `${sx+shR*Math.cos(ang)},${sy+shR*Math.sin(ang)}`; }).join(' '); svgContent+=`<polygon points="${shex6}" fill="none" stroke="${decoC}" stroke-width="${Math.round(1.2*sc)}" opacity="0.15"/>`; } const svgDataURL=svgContent ? `data:image/svg+xml;base64,${btoa(`<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="${W}" height="${H}">${svgContent}</svg>`)}` : null; // ── BG Image ── let bgImgHTML=''; if(currentBgType==='image'&&bgImageSrc){ const ov=parseFloat(v('bg-overlay'))||0.45; const ovc=v('bg-overlay-color'); bgImgHTML=` <img src="${bgImageSrc}" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;z-index:0"/> <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:${ovc};opacity:${ov};z-index:1"></div>`; } // ── Info rows ── const gap=Math.round(3*sc); const rows=[ {label:'Student Name', val:v('std-name'), font:nF, size:nS, color:nC, bold:nBold}, {label:'Student ID', val:v('std-id'), font:inF,size:inS,color:infoValC,bold:'600'}, {label:'Department', val:v('std-dept'), font:inF,size:inS*0.92,color:infoValC,bold:'400'}, {label:'Programme', val:v('std-prog'), font:inF,size:inS*0.92,color:infoValC,bold:'400'}, {label:'Year / Semester',val:v('std-year'), font:inF,size:inS*0.92,color:infoValC,bold:'400'}, {label:'Address', val:v('std-address'), font:inF,size:inS*0.88,color:infoValC,bold:'400'}, ]; const infoHTML=rows.map(r=>` <div style="margin-bottom:${gap}px"> <div style="font-size:${lblS}px;color:${lblC};text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.7px;font-weight:600;font-family:${inF}">${r.label}</div> <div style="font-size:${r.size}px;color:${r.color};font-weight:${r.bold};font-family:${r.font};border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);padding-bottom:1px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis">${r.val||'—'}</div> </div>`).join(''); const pad=Math.round(13*sc); const logoSz=Math.round(56*sc); const pW=Math.round(68*sc), pH=Math.round(84*sc); const showPhoto=b('show-photo'); const bR=Math.round(16*sc), bPV=Math.round(3*sc), bPH=Math.round(14*sc); card.innerHTML=` ${bgImgHTML} ${svgDataURL?`<img src="${svgDataURL}" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:2;pointer-events:none">`:''} ${texDataURL?`<img src="${texDataURL}" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:3;pointer-events:none">`:''} <!-- Header --> <div style="width:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding:${pad}px ${pad}px ${Math.round(5*sc)}px;position:relative;z-index:5"> ${logoSrc ?`<div style="width:${logoSz}px;height:${logoSz}px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;border:${Math.round(2.5*sc)}px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.45);margin-bottom:${Math.round(5*sc)}px"><img src="${logoSrc}" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover"></div>` :`<div style="width:${logoSz}px;height:${logoSz}px;border-radius:50%;border:${Math.round(2*sc)}px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.3);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:${Math.round(5*sc)}px"><span style="font-size:${Math.round(7.5*sc)}px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);text-align:center;padding:4px">LOGO</span></div>` } <div style="font-family:${iF};font-size:${iS}px;color:${iC};font-weight:${iBold};font-style:${iItal};text-align:center;line-height:1.2;max-width:90%">${v('inst-name')||'Institution Name'}</div> <div style="font-family:${sF};font-size:${sS}px;color:${sC};font-weight:${sBold};font-style:${sItal};text-align:center;margin-top:${Math.round(2*sc)}px;max-width:92%">${v('inst-sub')||''}</div> <div style="width:86%;height:${Math.max(1,Math.round(2*sc))}px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,${divC},transparent);margin:${Math.round(5*sc)}px auto"></div> <div style="display:inline-block;padding:${bPV}px ${bPH}px;border-radius:${bR}px;background:${badgeBg};font-size:${badgeS}px;color:${badgeC};font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.22)">IDENTITY CARD</div> </div> <!-- Body --> <div style="width:100%;display:flex;gap:${Math.round(8*sc)}px;padding:0 ${pad}px ${Math.round(6*sc)}px;flex:1;position:relative;z-index:5;overflow:hidden"> ${showPhoto?` <div style="flex-shrink:0"> <div style="width:${pW}px;height:${pH}px;border-radius:${Math.round(7*sc)}px;overflow:hidden;border:${Math.round(2*sc)}px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.38);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"> ${photoSrc?`<img src="${photoSrc}" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover">` :`<span style="font-size:${Math.round(7.5*sc)}px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);text-align:center;padding:4px">PHOTO</span>`} </div> </div>`:''} <div style="flex:1;overflow:hidden">${infoHTML}</div> </div> <!-- Footer --> <div style="width:100%;padding:${Math.round(4*sc)}px ${pad}px ${Math.round(9*sc)}px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;position:relative;z-index:5"> <div> <div style="font-family:${dtF};font-size:${lblS}px;color:${lblC};text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.7px;font-weight:600">Issue Date</div> <div style="font-family:${dtF};font-size:${dtS}px;color:${dtC};font-weight:600">${fmtDate(v('issue-date'))}</div> <div style="font-family:${dtF};font-size:${lblS}px;color:${lblC};text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.7px;font-weight:600;margin-top:${Math.round(3*sc)}px">Expiry Date</div> <div style="font-family:${dtF};font-size:${dtS}px;color:${dtC};font-weight:600">${fmtDate(v('expire-date'))}</div> </div> <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:${Math.round(2*sc)}px"> <div style="font-family:${sigF};font-size:${sigS}px;font-style:italic;color:${sigC}">${v('sig-name')||'Authorized Signatory'}</div> <div style="width:${Math.round(65*sc)}px;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.42)"></div> <div style="font-family:${inF};font-size:${lblS}px;color:${lblC};text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px">Authorized Signature</div> </div> </div> `; } // ══════ DOWNLOAD ══════ function downloadCard(){ const btn=document.querySelector('.btn-download'); btn.textContent='⏳ Generating...'; btn.disabled=true; const card=document.getElementById('id-card'); html2canvas(card,{ scale:3, useCORS:true, allowTaint:true, backgroundColor:null, logging:false, imageTimeout:0, removeContainer:true, }).then(canvas=>{ const link=document.createElement('a'); link.download='student-id-card.png'; link.href=canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); link.click(); btn.textContent='⬇ Download ID Card (PNG)'; btn.disabled=false; }).catch(()=>{ btn.textContent='⬇ Download ID Card (PNG)'; btn.disabled=false; alert('Download failed. Please try again.'); }); } // ══════ INIT ══════ window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{ buildPremiumGrid(); buildTextureGrid(); // sync range display document.getElementById('tex-opacity').addEventListener('input',()=>{ document.getElementById('tex-opacity-val').textContent=Math.round(parseFloat(v('tex-opacity'))*100)+'%'; }); document.getElementById('card-radius').addEventListener('input',()=>{ document.getElementById('radius-val').textContent=v('card-radius')+'px'; }); updateCard(); }); </script> </body> </html> <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title>Student ID Card Generator</title> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Arial:wght@400;700&family=Times+New+Roman:wght@400;700&family=Courier+New:wght@400;700&family=Georgia:wght@400;700&family=Verdana:wght@400;700&family=Comic+Sans+MS:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <style> * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; } body { font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); min-height: 100vh; padding: 20px; } .container { max-width: 1600px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 30px; } .panel { background: white; padding: 30px; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); max-height: 100vh; overflow-y: auto; } .panel h2 { color: #667eea; margin-bottom: 20px; border-bottom: 3px solid #667eea; padding-bottom: 10px; font-size: 18px; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 20px; } label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #333; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px; } input[type="text"], input[type="number"], input[type="date"], input[type="color"], input[type="file"], input[type="range"], select, textarea { width: 100%; padding: 10px; border: 2px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; transition: border-color 0.3s; font-family: inherit; } input[type="text"]:focus, input[type="number"]:focus, input[type="date"]:focus, input[type="color"]:focus, input[type="file"]:focus, input[type="range"]:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus { outline: none; border-color: #667eea; } textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 80px; } .row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 15px; } .row-3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 15px; } .color-picker-group { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .color-picker-group input[type="color"] { width: 60px; height: 45px; padding: 5px; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; } .color-picker-group input[type="text"] { flex: 1; } button { background: #667eea; color: white; border: none; padding: 12px 25px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s; width: 100%; } button:hover { background: #764ba2; } .preview-container { background: white; padding: 40px; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); overflow: auto; max-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; } #idCard { border: 3px solid #333; border-radius: 15px; padding: 30px; position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; overflow: hidden; background-size: cover; background-position: center; box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); margin-bottom: 30px; } #textureOverlay { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; opacity: 0.3; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; } .card-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; z-index: 2; } #institutionLogo { width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; border: 2px solid #333; flex-shrink: 0; } .card-institution { text-align: center; flex: 1; margin: 0 15px; } #institutionName { font-size: 28px; font-weight: bold; margin: 0; color: #000; line-height: 1.2; } #middleText { font-size: 14px; color: #555; margin-top: 3px; line-height: 1; } .card-content { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; margin: 15px 0; position: relative; z-index: 2; } .card-left { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; } .card-right { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; } #studentPhoto { width: 120px; height: 140px; object-fit: cover; border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 8px; } .card-info { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin: 6px 0; font-size: 13px; gap: 10px; } .info-label { font-weight: bold; min-width: 55px; } .card-footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; margin-top: 15px; position: relative; z-index: 2; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 2px solid #333; } .signature-section { text-align: center; flex: 1; } #signatureText { border-bottom: 2px solid #000; font-size: 14px; font-style: italic; padding-bottom: 3px; min-width: 100px; display: inline-block; } .date-section { text-align: center; font-size: 11px; } .date-label { font-size: 10px; color: #666; margin-top: 3px; } .date-value { font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal; } .controls-section { margin-top: 20px; display: flex; gap: 10px; width: 100%; } .controls-section button { flex: 1; padding: 12px; } .divider { border-top: 2px solid #333; margin: 12px 0; position: relative; z-index: 2; } .design-options { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 10px; } .design-option { padding: 10px; border: 2px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; font-size: 12px; } .design-option:hover, .design-option.active { border-color: #667eea; background: #f0f4ff; } .size-presets { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 10px; } .size-preset { padding: 10px; border: 2px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; font-size: 11px; transition: all 0.3s; } .size-preset:hover, .size-preset.active { border-color: #667eea; background: #f0f4ff; } .color-palette { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 10px; margin-top: 10px; } .color-swatch { width: 100%; height: 40px; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid #ddd; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; position: relative; } .color-swatch:hover { transform: scale(1.05); border-color: #667eea; } .color-swatch.active { border-color: #667eea; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5); } .texture-options { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 10px; } .texture-option { padding: 15px; border: 2px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; transition: all 0.3s; background-size: 30px; background-position: center; background-repeat: repeat; min-height: 60px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .texture-option:hover, .texture-option.active { border-color: #667eea; transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3); } .premium-badge { display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffd700, #ffed4e); color: #333; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; margin-left: 5px; } .tabs { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 2px solid #eee; } .tab-btn { padding: 10px 15px; background: #f5f5f5; border: none; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0; font-weight: bold; transition: all 0.3s; font-size: 13px; } .tab-btn.active { background: #667eea; color: white; } .tab-content { display: none; } .tab-content.active { display: block; } .range-value { display: inline-block; background: #667eea; color: white; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px; margin-left: 10px; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .container { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } } </style> </head> <body> <div class="container"> <!-- Control Panel 1 --> <div class="panel"> <h2>Card Configuration</h2> <!-- Size Settings --> <div class="form-group"> <label>Card Size Presets</label> <div class="size-presets"> <div class="size-preset active" data-width="500" data-height="312">Standard<br><small>500×312</small></div> <div class="size-preset" data-width="600" data-height="375">Large<br><small>600×375</small></div> <div class="size-preset" data-width="400" data-height="250">Small<br><small>400×250</small></div> </div> </div> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Custom Width (px)</label> <input type="number" id="cardWidth" value="500" min="300" max="1000" onchange="updateCardSize()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Custom Height (px)</label> <input type="number" id="cardHeight" value="312" min="200" max="700" onchange="updateCardSize()"> </div> </div> <!-- Institution Settings --> <h2>Institution Details</h2> <div class="form-group"> <label>Institution Logo</label> <input type="file" id="logoUpload" accept="image/*"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Institution Name</label> <input type="text" id="institutionNameInput" value="XYZ University" onchange="updateCard()" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Institution Name - Font</label> <select id="institutionFont" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="Arial">Arial</option> <option value="Times New Roman">Times New Roman</option> <option value="Courier New">Courier New</option> <option value="Georgia">Georgia</option> <option value="Verdana">Verdana</option> <option value="Comic Sans MS">Comic Sans MS</option> </select> </div> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Institution Size (px)</label> <input type="number" id="institutionSize" value="28" min="14" max="48" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Institution Color</label> <input type="color" id="institutionColor" value="#000000" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label> <input type="checkbox" id="institutionBold" onchange="updateCard()"> Bold </label> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label> <input type="checkbox" id="institutionItalic" onchange="updateCard()"> Italic </label> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Middle Text</label> <input type="text" id="middleTextInput" placeholder="Enter text below name" onchange="updateCard()" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Middle Text - Font</label> <select id="middleTextFont" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="Arial">Arial</option> <option value="Times New Roman">Times New Roman</option> <option value="Courier New">Courier New</option> <option value="Georgia">Georgia</option> <option value="Verdana">Verdana</option> </select> </div> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Middle Text Size (px)</label> <input type="number" id="middleTextSize" value="14" min="10" max="32" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Middle Text Color</label> <input type="color" id="middleTextColor" value="#555555" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <!-- Student Information --> <h2>Student Information</h2> <div class="form-group"> <label>Student Name</label> <input type="text" id="studentName" value="John Doe" onchange="updateCard()" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Student ID</label> <input type="text" id="studentId" value="STU-2024-001" onchange="updateCard()" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Class / Grade</label> <input type="text" id="studentClass" value="Grade 12" onchange="updateCard()" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Department / Section</label> <input type="text" id="studentDept" value="Science" onchange="updateCard()" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Address</label> <textarea id="studentAddress" onchange="updateCard()" oninput="updateCard()">123 Main Street, City, Country</textarea> </div> <!-- Photo Section --> <h2>Student Photo</h2> <div class="form-group"> <label>Upload Photo (Optional)</label> <input type="file" id="photoUpload" accept="image/*"> </div> <!-- Dates Settings --> <h2>Validity Dates</h2> <div class="form-group"> <label>Issue Date</label> <input type="date" id="issueDate" onchange="updateDateDisplay()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Expiry Date</label> <input type="date" id="expiryDate" onchange="updateDateDisplay()"> </div> <!-- Date Text Styling --> <div class="form-group"> <label>Date Text - Font</label> <select id="dateFont" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="Arial">Arial</option> <option value="Times New Roman">Times New Roman</option> <option value="Courier New">Courier New</option> <option value="Georgia">Georgia</option> <option value="Verdana">Verdana</option> </select> </div> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Date Text Size (px)</label> <input type="number" id="dateSize" value="11" min="8" max="18" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Date Text Color</label> <input type="color" id="dateColor" value="#000000" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label> <input type="checkbox" id="dateBold" onchange="updateCard()"> Bold </label> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label> <input type="checkbox" id="dateItalic" onchange="updateCard()"> Italic </label> </div> </div> <!-- Date Label Styling --> <div class="form-group"> <label>Date Label - Font</label> <select id="dateLabelFont" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="Arial">Arial</option> <option value="Times New Roman">Times New Roman</option> <option value="Courier New">Courier New</option> <option value="Georgia">Georgia</option> <option value="Verdana">Verdana</option> </select> </div> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Date Label Size (px)</label> <input type="number" id="dateLabelSize" value="10" min="8" max="16" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Date Label Color</label> <input type="color" id="dateLabelColor" value="#666666" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <!-- Signature --> <h2>Signature</h2> <div class="form-group"> <label>Signature Name</label> <input type="text" id="signatureName" value="Authority" onchange="updateCard()" oninput="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Signature Font</label> <select id="signatureFont" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="Arial">Arial</option> <option value="Times New Roman">Times New Roman</option> <option value="Courier New">Courier New</option> <option value="Georgia">Georgia</option> <option value="Verdana">Verdana</option> </select> </div> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Signature Size (px)</label> <input type="number" id="signatureSize" value="14" min="10" max="24" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Signature Color</label> <input type="color" id="signatureColor" value="#000000" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> </div> <!-- Control Panel 2 --> <div class="panel"> <!-- Background Settings --> <h2>Background & Design</h2> <div class="form-group"> <label>Background Type</label> <select id="bgType" onchange="changeBgType()"> <option value="solid">Solid Color</option> <option value="gradient">Gradient Color</option> <option value="image">Image</option> </select> </div> <!-- Solid Color --> <div id="solidColorGroup" class="form-group"> <label>Solid Color</label> <div class="tabs"> <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="switchColorTab(event, 'custom')">Custom</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchColorTab(event, 'premium')">Premium <span class="premium-badge">GOLD</span></button> </div> <div id="custom-tab" class="tab-content active"> <input type="color" id="bgColor" value="#ffffff" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div id="premium-tab" class="tab-content"> <div class="color-palette" id="premiumColorPalette"></div> </div> </div> <!-- Gradient Color --> <div id="gradientGroup" class="form-group" style="display:none;"> <label>Gradient Colors <span class="premium-badge">PREMIUM</span></label> <div class="tabs"> <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="switchGradientTab(event, 'custom')">Custom</button> <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchGradientTab(event, 'premium')">Premium</button> </div> <div id="gradient-custom-tab" class="tab-content active"> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Color 1</label> <input type="color" id="gradientColor1" value="#667eea" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Color 2</label> <input type="color" id="gradientColor2" value="#764ba2" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> </div> <div id="gradient-premium-tab" class="tab-content"> <div class="color-palette" id="premiumGradientPalette"></div> </div> </div> <!-- Image Background --> <div id="imageGroup" class="form-group" style="display:none;"> <label>Upload Background Image</label> <input type="file" id="bgImage" accept="image/*" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <!-- Texture Options --> <h2>Texture & Pattern <span class="premium-badge">PREMIUM</span></h2> <div class="form-group"> <label>Texture Type</label> <div class="texture-options" id="textureOptions"></div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Texture Opacity (%)</label> <input type="range" id="textureOpacity" min="0" max="100" value="30" onchange="updateCard()"> <span class="range-value" id="textureOpacityValue">30%</span> </div> <!-- Card Design --> <h2>Card Design</h2> <div class="form-group"> <label>Border Style</label> <div class="design-options"> <div class="design-option active" data-border="3px solid #333" onclick="setBorderStyle(event)">Solid</div> <div class="design-option" data-border="3px dashed #333" onclick="setBorderStyle(event)">Dashed</div> <div class="design-option" data-border="5px double #333" onclick="setBorderStyle(event)">Double</div> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Border Color</label> <input type="color" id="borderColor" value="#333333" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Border Radius (px)</label> <input type="number" id="borderRadius" value="15" min="0" max="50" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Card Opacity (%)</label> <input type="range" id="cardOpacity" min="0" max="100" value="100" onchange="updateCard()"> <span class="range-value" id="opacityValue">100%</span> </div> <!-- Text Styling --> <h2>Student Info Text</h2> <div class="form-group"> <label>Text Font</label> <select id="textFont" onchange="updateCard()"> <option value="Arial">Arial</option> <option value="Times New Roman">Times New Roman</option> <option value="Courier New">Courier New</option> <option value="Georgia">Georgia</option> <option value="Verdana">Verdana</option> </select> </div> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Text Size (px)</label> <input type="number" id="textSize" value="13" min="10" max="28" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Text Color</label> <input type="color" id="textColor" value="#000000" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label><input type="checkbox" id="textBold" onchange="updateCard()"> Bold</label> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label><input type="checkbox" id="textItalic" onchange="updateCard()"> Italic</label> </div> </div> <!-- Label Styling --> <h2>Label Text</h2> <div class="row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Label Size (px)</label> <input type="number" id="labelSize" value="12" min="8" max="20" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Label Color</label> <input type="color" id="labelColor" value="#333333" onchange="updateCard()"> </div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label><input type="checkbox" id="labelBold" onchange="updateCard()"> Bold Labels</label> </div> </div> </div> <!-- Preview Section -->
