href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto:wght@400;700&family=Open+Sans:wght@400;700&family=Lato:wght@400;700&family=Montserrat:wght@400;700&family=Poppins:wght@400;700&family=Oswald:wght@400;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700&family=Merriweather:wght@400;700&family=Nunito:wght@400;700&family=Raleway:wght@400;700&family=Ubuntu:wght@400;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html-to-image/1.11.11/html-to-image.min.js"></script> <style> *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box} body{font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f0c29,#302b63,#24243e);min-height:100vh;color:#fff;overflow-x:hidden} .app-header{text-align:center;padding:30px 20px 10px} .app-header h1{font-size:2.2rem;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00d2ff,#3a7bd5,#00d2ff);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;letter-spacing:1px} .app-header p{color:#aaa;font-size:.95rem;margin-top:5px} .container{display:flex;gap:25px;padding:20px 30px;max-width:1500px;margin:0 auto;flex-wrap:wrap} .panel{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:16px;padding:22px;backdrop-filter:blur(10px)} .left-panel{flex:1;min-width:340px;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:#3a7bd5 transparent} .left-panel::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px} .left-panel::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#3a7bd5;border-radius:3px} .right-panel{flex:1;min-width:400px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-start;position:sticky;top:20px} .section{margin-bottom:18px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);padding-bottom:15px} .section:last-child{border-bottom:none} .section-title{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#00d2ff;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;cursor:pointer;user-select:none} .section-content{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px} .row{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap} label{font-size:.8rem;color:#ccc;display:block;margin-bottom:3px} input[type="text"],input[type="number"],input[type="date"],input[type="color"],select,textarea{width:100%;padding:8px 10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:8px;color:#fff;font-size:.85rem;outline:none;transition:border .3s} input:focus,select:focus,textarea:focus{border-color:#3a7bd5} input[type="color"]{width:45px;height:35px;padding:2px;cursor:pointer;border-radius:6px} input[type="file"]{display:none} .file-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3a7bd5,#00d2ff);border:none;border-radius:8px;color:#fff;font-size:.8rem;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .2s} .file-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.03)} select{cursor:pointer} .size-presets{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:8px} .preset-btn{padding:6px 12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:8px;color:#ccc;font-size:.75rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s} .preset-btn:hover,.preset-btn.active{background:#3a7bd5;color:#fff;border-color:#3a7bd5} .texture-options{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap} .texture-opt{width:50px;height:35px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid transparent;transition:border .3s} .texture-opt:hover,.texture-opt.active{border-color:#00d2ff} .outline-options{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap} .outline-opt{padding:6px 10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:6px;color:#ccc;font-size:.75rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s} .outline-opt:hover,.outline-opt.active{background:#3a7bd5;color:#fff;border-color:#3a7bd5} .bg-type-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px} .bg-type-btn{flex:1;padding:7px;text-align:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:8px;color:#ccc;font-size:.78rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s} .bg-type-btn:hover,.bg-type-btn.active{background:#3a7bd5;color:#fff;border-color:#3a7bd5} .bg-settings{display:none} .bg-settings.active{display:block} .field-font-controls{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin-top:4px;padding:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border-radius:6px} .field-font-controls select,.field-font-controls input{width:auto;min-width:60px} .small-input{width:55px!important;min-width:55px!important} .bold-btn{padding:3px 8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:4px;color:#ccc;cursor:pointer;font-weight:bold;font-size:.8rem;line-height:1} .bold-btn.active{background:#3a7bd5;color:#fff;border-color:#3a7bd5} .remove-btn{background:rgba(255,50,50,.2);border:1px solid rgba(255,50,50,.4);color:#ff6b6b;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:.7rem;cursor:pointer} .remove-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,50,50,.4)} .collapsible-content{max-height:2000px;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .4s ease} .collapsible-content.collapsed{max-height:0;padding:0} .tip-box{background:rgba(0,210,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,210,255,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:.78rem;color:#8ecae6;line-height:1.4} #cardPreview{position:relative;overflow:hidden} .download-btn{margin-top:15px;padding:12px 35px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#00b09b,#96c93d);border:none;border-radius:10px;color:#fff;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .3s;box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,176,155,.4)} .download-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,176,155,.6)} .download-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:wait;transform:none} .download-status{font-size:.75rem;color:#ff6b6b;margin-top:6px;min-height:18px;text-align:center} .download-status.success{color:#96c93d} .premium-section{background:rgba(255,215,0,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,0.2); border-radius:8px; padding:12px; margin-top:12px;} .checkbox-label{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.85rem;color:#e0e0e0} .checkbox-label input{width:16px;height:16px;accent-color:#3a7bd5} @media(max-width:860px){.container{flex-direction:column}.right-panel{position:relative;top:0}} </style> </head> <body> <div class="app-header"> <h1>&#127891; Student ID Card Generator</h1> <p>Design your professional student identity card &mdash; perfect for GitHub Student Developer Pack verification</p> </div> <div class="container"> <div class="panel left-panel"> <div class="tip-box"> &#128161; <strong>Tip:</strong> For GitHub Student Developer Pack approval, ensure your ID includes: <strong>full name</strong>, <strong>institution name</strong>, <strong>issue &amp; expiry dates</strong> covering the current academic period, and an <strong>institution logo</strong>. </div> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">&#128207; Card Size</div> <div class="section-content collapsible-content"> <label>Presets</label> <div class="size-presets"> <button class="preset-btn active" onclick="setSize(340,215,this)">Standard</button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="setSize(320,200,this)">Compact</button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="setSize(400,250,this)">Large</button> <button class="preset-btn" onclick="setSize(300,420,this)">Portrait</button> </div> <div class="row"> <div style="flex:1"><label>Width (px)</label><input type="number" id="cardWidth" value="340" min="200" max="600" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> <div style="flex:1"><label>Height (px)</label><input type="number" id="cardHeight" value="215" min="150" max="500" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">&#127963; Institution Info</div> <div class="section-content collapsible-content"> <label>Institution Logo</label> <div class="row"> <label class="file-btn" for="logoUpload">&#128247; Upload Logo</label> <input type="file" id="logoUpload" accept="image/*" onchange="handleFile(event,'logo')"> <button class="remove-btn" onclick="removeFile('logo')">Remove</button> </div> <div style="margin-top:8px"> <label>Institution Name</label> <input type="text" id="instName" value="University of Technology" oninput="updatePreview()"> <div class="field-font-controls"> <select id="instNameFont" onchange="updatePreview()" style="min-width:100px"></select> <input type="number" class="small-input" id="instNameSize" value="14" min="8" max="30" onchange="updatePreview()"> <input type="color" id="instNameColor" value="#1a1a2e" onchange="updatePreview()"> <button class="bold-btn" id="instNameBold" onclick="toggleBold(this)">B</button> </div> </div> <div> <label>Subtitle (centered below name)</label> <input type="text" id="subtitle" value="Student Identity Card" oninput="updatePreview()"> <div class="field-font-controls"> <select id="subtitleFont" onchange="updatePreview()" style="min-width:100px"></select> <input type="number" class="small-input" id="subtitleSize" value="9" min="6" max="20" onchange="updatePreview()"> <input type="color" id="subtitleColor" value="#444444" onchange="updatePreview()"> <button class="bold-btn" id="subtitleBold" onclick="toggleBold(this)">B</button> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">&#128100; Student Photo</div> <div class="section-content collapsible-content"> <div class="row"> <label class="file-btn" for="photoUpload">&#128247; Upload Photo</label> <input type="file" id="photoUpload" accept="image/*" onchange="handleFile(event,'photo')"> <button class="remove-btn" onclick="removeFile('photo')">Remove</button> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">&#128221; Student Details</div> <div class="section-content collapsible-content"> <div> <label>Full Name</label> <input type="text" id="studentName" value="John Michael Doe" oninput="updatePreview()"> <div class="field-font-controls"> <select id="studentNameFont" onchange="updatePreview()" style="min-width:100px"></select> <input type="number" class="small-input" id="studentNameSize" value="11" min="7" max="22" onchange="updatePreview()"> <input type="color" id="studentNameColor" value="#1a1a2e" onchange="updatePreview()"> <button class="bold-btn" id="studentNameBold" onclick="toggleBold(this)">B</button> </div> </div> <div> <label>Student ID Number</label> <input type="text" id="studentId" value="STU-2025-04821" oninput="updatePreview()"> <div class="field-font-controls"> <select id="studentIdFont" onchange="updatePreview()" style="min-width:100px"></select> <input type="number" class="small-input" id="studentIdSize" value="9" min="6" max="18" onchange="updatePreview()"> <input type="color" id="studentIdColor" value="#333333" onchange="updatePreview()"> <button class="bold-btn" id="studentIdBold" onclick="toggleBold(this)">B</button> </div> </div> <div> <label>Department / Program</label> <input type="text" id="department" value="Computer Science & Engineering" oninput="updatePreview()"> <div class="field-font-controls"> <select id="departmentFont" onchange="updatePreview()" style="min-width:100px"></select> <input type="number" class="small-input" id="departmentSize" value="9" min="6" max="18" onchange="updatePreview()"> <input type="color" id="departmentColor" value="#333333" onchange="updatePreview()"> <button class="bold-btn" id="departmentBold" onclick="toggleBold(this)">B</button> </div> </div> <div> <label>Session / Batch</label> <input type="text" id="session" value="2024 - 2028" oninput="updatePreview()"> <div class="field-font-controls"> <select id="sessionFont" onchange="updatePreview()" style="min-width:100px"></select> <input type="number" class="small-input" id="sessionSize" value="9" min="6" max="18" onchange="updatePreview()"> <input type="color" id="sessionColor" value="#333333" onchange="updatePreview()"> <button class="bold-btn" id="sessionBold" onclick="toggleBold(this)">B</button> </div> </div> <div> <label>Blood Group</label> <select id="bloodGroup" onchange="updatePreview()"> <option value="">-- Select --</option> <option value="A+">A+</option><option value="A-">A-</option> <option value="B+" selected>B+</option><option value="B-">B-</option> <option value="O+">O+</option><option value="O-">O-</option> <option value="AB+">AB+</option><option value="AB-">AB-</option> </select> </div> <div> <label>Date of Birth</label> <input type="date" id="dob" value="2003-06-15" onchange="updatePreview()"> </div> <div> <label>Address</label> <textarea id="address" rows="2" oninput="updatePreview()">123 Academic Street, Knowledge City</textarea> <div class="field-font-controls"> <select id="addressFont" onchange="updatePreview()" style="min-width:100px"></select> <input type="number" class="small-input" id="addressSize" value="8" min="5" max="16" onchange="updatePreview()"> <input type="color" id="addressColor" value="#444444" onchange="updatePreview()"> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">&#128197; Issue &amp; Expiry Dates</div> <div class="section-content collapsible-content"> <div class="row"> <div style="flex:1"><label>Issue Date</label><input type="date" id="issueDate" value="2025-01-15" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> <div style="flex:1"><label>Expiry Date</label><input type="date" id="expiryDate" value="2026-12-31" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> </div> <div class="field-font-controls"> <select id="dateFont" onchange="updatePreview()" style="min-width:100px"></select> <input type="number" class="small-input" id="dateSize" value="8" min="5" max="14" onchange="updatePreview()"> <input type="color" id="dateColor" value="#333333" onchange="updatePreview()"> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">&#9999;&#65039; Authorized Signature</div> <div class="section-content collapsible-content"> <label>Signatory Name</label> <input type="text" id="signatureName" value="Dr. A. Rahman" oninput="updatePreview()"> <div class="field-font-controls"> <select id="signatureFont" onchange="updatePreview()" style="min-width:100px"></select> <input type="number" class="small-input" id="signatureSize" value="10" min="6" max="18" onchange="updatePreview()"> <input type="color" id="signatureColor" value="#222222" onchange="updatePreview()"> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section"> <div class="section-title" onclick="toggleSection(this)">&#127912; Card Design &amp; Background</div> <div class="section-content collapsible-content"> <div class="premium-section"> <label style="color:#ffd700; font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:10px; font-size:0.9rem">✨ Premium Enhancements</label> <div class="row" style="margin-bottom:12px"> <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" id="showHole" onchange="updatePreview()"> Lanyard Hole</label> <label class="checkbox-label" style="margin-left:15px"><input type="checkbox" id="showHolo" onchange="updatePreview()"> Hologram Shine</label> </div> <div class="row" style="align-items:center"> <label style="margin:0; min-width:80px; color:#ccc">ID Graphic:</label> <select id="idCodeType" onchange="updatePreview()" style="flex:1"> <option value="none">Text Only</option> <option value="barcode" selected>Barcode Overlay</option> <option value="qrcode">QR Code Overlay</option> </select> </div> </div> <label style="margin-top:12px">Outline Style</label> <div class="outline-options" id="outlineOptions"> <button class="outline-opt active" data-val="none">None</button> <button class="outline-opt" data-val="solid">Solid</button> <button class="outline-opt" data-val="double">Double</button> <button class="outline-opt" data-val="dashed">Dashed</button> <button class="outline-opt" data-val="ridge">Ridge</button> <button class="outline-opt" data-val="groove">Groove</button> <button class="outline-opt" data-val="inset">Inset</button> </div> <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px"> <div><label>Outline Color</label><input type="color" id="outlineColor" value="#1a3a5c" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> <div style="flex:1"><label>Width (px)</label><input type="number" id="outlineWidth" value="3" min="1" max="10" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> </div> <div style="margin-top:8px"><label>Border Radius (px)</label><input type="number" id="borderRadius" value="12" min="0" max="40" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> <label style="margin-top:12px">Texture Overlay</label> <div class="texture-options" id="textureOptions"> <div class="texture-opt active" data-val="none" style="background:#fff" title="None"></div> <div class="texture-opt" data-val="diagonal" style="background:repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,#aaa 0,#aaa 1px,#fff 1px,#fff 5px)" title="Diagonal"></div> <div class="texture-opt" data-val="horizontal" style="background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,#aaa 0,#aaa 1px,#fff 1px,#fff 5px)" title="Horizontal"></div> <div class="texture-opt" data-val="dots" style="background:radial-gradient(circle,#aaa 1px,#fff 1px);background-size:6px 6px" title="Dots"></div> <div class="texture-opt" data-val="checker" style="background:repeating-conic-gradient(#aaa 0% 25%,#fff 0% 50%) 0 0/8px 8px" title="Checker"></div> <div class="texture-opt" data-val="cross" style="background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,#aaa 0,#aaa 1px,transparent 1px,transparent 6px),repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,#aaa 0,#aaa 1px,transparent 1px,transparent 6px)" title="Cross"></div> </div> <div class="row" style="margin-top:6px"> <div style="flex:1"><label>Texture Opacity (%)</label><input type="number" id="textureOpacity" value="25" min="0" max="100" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> </div> <label style="margin-top:12px">Background Type</label> <div class="bg-type-row" id="bgTypeRow"> <button class="bg-type-btn active" data-val="solid">Solid</button> <button class="bg-type-btn" data-val="gradient">Gradient</button> <button class="bg-type-btn" data-val="image">Image</button> </div> <div id="bgSolid" class="bg-settings active"> <label>Background Color</label> <input type="color" id="bgColor" value="#f0f4f8" onchange="updatePreview()"> </div> <div id="bgGradient" class="bg-settings"> <div class="row"> <div><label>Color 1</label><input type="color" id="gradColor1" value="#e0eafc" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> <div><label>Color 2</label><input type="color" id="gradColor2" value="#cfdef3" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> <div style="flex:1"><label>Angle</label><input type="number" id="gradAngle" value="135" min="0" max="360" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> </div> </div> <div id="bgImage" class="bg-settings"> <label class="file-btn" for="bgImgUpload">&#128247; Upload Background</label> <input type="file" id="bgImgUpload" accept="image/*" onchange="handleFile(event,'bg')"> <button class="remove-btn" onclick="removeFile('bg')" style="margin-left:8px">Remove</button> <div style="margin-top:6px"><label>Opacity (%)</label><input type="number" id="bgImgOpacity" value="100" min="0" max="100" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> </div> <label style="margin-top:12px">Decorative Shapes</label> <div class="row"> <select id="decoShape" onchange="updatePreview()"> <option value="none">None</option> <option value="circles" selected>Corner Circles</option> <option value="stripes">Side Stripes</option> <option value="cornerAccents">Corner Accents</option> <option value="waveBottom">Bottom Wave</option> <option value="polygonTop">Top Polygon</option> </select> <div><label>Shape Color</label><input type="color" id="decoColor" value="#1a3a5c" onchange="updatePreview()"></div> </div> <label style="margin-top:12px">Field Labels Style</label> <div class="field-font-controls"> <select id="labelFont" onchange="updatePreview()" style="min-width:100px"></select> <input type="number" class="small-input" id="labelSize" value="7" min="5" max="14" onchange="updatePreview()"> <input type="color" id="labelColor" value="#555555" onchange="updatePreview()"> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="panel right-panel"> <div class="card-preview-area"> <h3 style="color:#00d2ff;margin-bottom:10px;font-size:.95rem">&#128065; Live Preview</h3> <div id="cardPreview"></div> <button class="download-btn" id="downloadBtn" onclick="downloadCard()">&#11015; Download as PNG</button> <div class="download-status" id="downloadStatus"></div> </div> </div> </div> <script> /* ===== STATE ===== */ const S={logoSrc:null,photoSrc:null,bgImgSrc:null,bgType:'solid',outline:'none',texture:'none'}; /* ===== FONTS ===== */ const FONTS=['Poppins','Roboto','Open Sans','Lato','Montserrat','Oswald','Playfair Display','Merriweather','Nunito','Raleway','Ubuntu','PT Sans']; const FONT_IDS=['instNameFont','subtitleFont','studentNameFont','studentIdFont','departmentFont','sessionFont','addressFont','dateFont','signatureFont','labelFont']; FONT_IDS.forEach(id=>{const s=document.getElementById(id);FONTS.forEach(f=>{const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=f;o.textContent=f;s.appendChild(o)})}); document.getElementById('instNameFont').value='Montserrat'; document.getElementById('subtitleFont').value='Poppins'; document.getElementById('studentNameFont').value='Poppins'; document.getElementById('studentIdFont').value='Roboto'; document.getElementById('departmentFont').value='Roboto'; document.getElementById('sessionFont').value='Roboto'; document.getElementById('addressFont').value='Roboto'; document.getElementById('dateFont').value='Roboto'; document.getElementById('signatureFont').value='Playfair Display'; document.getElementById('labelFont').value='Roboto'; /* ===== HELPERS ===== */ const V=id=>document.getElementById(id).value; const N=id=>parseInt(document.getElementById(id).value)||0; function formatDate(d){if(!d)return '';return new Date(d+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US',{year:'numeric',month:'short',day:'numeric'});} function toggleSection(el){el.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('collapsed')} function toggleBold(btn){btn.classList.toggle('active');updatePreview()} function isBold(id){const b=document.getElementById(id);return b&&b.classList.contains('active')?'700':'400'} /* ===== FILE HANDLING ===== */ function handleFile(e,type){ const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return; const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=ev=>{ if(type==='logo')S.logoSrc=ev.target.result; else if(type==='photo')S.photoSrc=ev.target.result; else if(type==='bg')S.bgImgSrc=ev.target.result; updatePreview(); }; r.readAsDataURL(f); } function removeFile(type){ if(type==='logo'){S.logoSrc=null;document.getElementById('logoUpload').value=''} else if(type==='photo'){S.photoSrc=null;document.getElementById('photoUpload').value=''} else if(type==='bg'){S.bgImgSrc=null;document.getElementById('bgImgUpload').value=''} updatePreview(); } /* ===== SIZE ===== */ function setSize(w,h,btn){ document.getElementById('cardWidth').value=w; document.getElementById('cardHeight').value=h; document.querySelectorAll('.preset-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); updatePreview(); } /* ===== OUTLINE ===== */ document.getElementById('outlineOptions').addEventListener('click',e=>{ const btn=e.target.closest('.outline-opt');if(!btn)return; document.querySelectorAll('.outline-opt').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active');S.outline=btn.dataset.val;updatePreview(); }); /* ===== TEXTURE ===== */ document.getElementById('textureOptions').addEventListener('click',e=>{ const btn=e.target.closest('.texture-opt');if(!btn)return; document.querySelectorAll('.texture-opt').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active');S.texture=btn.dataset.val;updatePreview(); }); /* ===== BG TYPE ===== */ document.getElementById('bgTypeRow').addEventListener('click',e=>{ const btn=e.target.closest('.bg-type-btn');if(!btn)return; document.querySelectorAll('.bg-type-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active');S.bgType=btn.dataset.val; document.querySelectorAll('.bg-settings').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active')); document.getElementById('bg'+S.bgType.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+S.bgType.slice(1)).classList.add('active'); updatePreview(); }); /* ===== GRAPHICS & SVG GENERATORS ===== */ function getTexSVG(opacity){ if(S.texture === 'none') return ''; let w, h, content; switch(S.texture){ case 'diagonal': w=6; h=6; content=`<path d="M-1,7L7,-1" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1.5"/>`; break; case 'horizontal': w=5; h=5; content=`<rect width="5" height="1.5" fill="#000"/>`; break; case 'dots': w=8; h=8; content=`<circle cx="2" cy="2" r="1.5" fill="#000"/>`; break; case 'checker': w=10; h=10; content=`<rect width="5" height="5" fill="#000"/><rect x="5" y="5" width="5" height="5" fill="#000"/>`; break; case 'cross': w=6; h=6; content=`<path d="M3,0L3,6M0,3L6,3" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1.5"/>`; break; default: return ''; } return `<svg width="100%" height="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;z-index:2;pointer-events:none;opacity:${opacity}"> <defs><pattern id="texPat" width="${w}" height="${h}" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">${content}</pattern></defs> <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#texPat)"/> </svg>`; } function getDecoHTML(c){ switch(V('decoShape')){ case'circles':return`<div style="position:absolute;top:-18px;right:-18px;width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:50%;background:${c};opacity:.15"></div><div style="position:absolute;bottom:-15px;left:-15px;width:50px;height:50px;border-radius:50%;background:${c};opacity:.12"></div><div style="position:absolute;top:30%;right:-10px;width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;background:${c};opacity:.1"></div>`; case'stripes':return`<div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:6px;height:100%;background:${c};opacity:.5;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0"></div><div style="position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:3px;height:100%;background:${c};opacity:.3;border-radius:4px 0 0 4px"></div>`; case'cornerAccents':return`<div style="position:absolute;top:5px;left:5px;width:20px;height:20px;border-top:3px solid ${c};border-left:3px solid ${c};opacity:.5"></div><div style="position:absolute;top:5px;right:5px;width:20px;height:20px;border-top:3px solid ${c};border-right:3px solid ${c};opacity:.5"></div><div style="position:absolute;bottom:5px;left:5px;width:20px;height:20px;border-bottom:3px solid ${c};border-left:3px solid ${c};opacity:.5"></div><div style="position:absolute;bottom:5px;right:5px;width:20px;height:20px;border-bottom:3px solid ${c};border-right:3px solid ${c};opacity:.5"></div>`; case'waveBottom':return `<svg style="position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:100%;height:35%;z-index:0;opacity:0.2" viewBox="0 0 1000 100" preserveAspectRatio="none"><path fill="${c}" d="M0,50 C300,150 700,-50 1000,50 L1000,100 L0,100 Z"/></svg>`; case'polygonTop':return `<svg style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:35%;z-index:0;opacity:0.2" viewBox="0 0 100 100" preserveAspectRatio="none"><polygon fill="${c}" points="0,0 100,0 100,70 0,20"/></svg>`; default:return''; } } function getBarcodeSVG(c) { return `<svg width="70" height="22" viewBox="0 0 80 24" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="opacity:0.85"> <path fill="${c}" d="M0,0h3v24H0V0z M4,0h1v24H4V0z M7,0h4v24H7V0z M13,0h2v24H13V0z M17,0h3v24H17V0z M22,0h1v24H22V0z M25,0h3v24H25V0z M30,0h4v24H30V0z M36,0h1v24H36V0z M39,0h2v24H39V0z M43,0h5v24H43V0z M50,0h2v24H50V0z M54,0h1v24H54V0z M57,0h4v24H57V0z M63,0h3v24H63V0z M68,0h2v24H68V0z M72,0h3v24H72V0z M77,0h3v24H77V0z"/> </svg>`; } function getQRSVG(c) { return `<svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 20 20" style="opacity:0.85"> <path fill="${c}" d="M0,0h7v7H0V0z M1,1v5h5V1H1z M2,2h3v3H2V2z"/> <path fill="${c}" d="M13,0h7v7h-7V0z M14,1v5h5V1h-5z M15,2h3v3h-3V2z"/> <path fill="${c}" d="M0,13h7v7H0v-7z M1,14v5h5v-5H1z M2,15h3v3H2v-3z"/> <rect x="8" y="0" width="2" height="2" fill="${c}"/><rect x="11" y="2" width="2" height="2" fill="${c}"/><rect x="8" y="4" width="4" height="2" fill="${c}"/><rect x="18" y="9" width="2" height="2" fill="${c}"/><rect x="8" y="8" width="6" height="4" fill="${c}"/><rect x="15" y="12" width="4" height="2" fill="${c}"/><rect x="8" y="15" width="4" height="4" fill="${c}"/><rect x="13" y="16" width="2" height="2" fill="${c}"/><rect x="17" y="15" width="2" height="5" fill="${c}"/><rect x="1" y="8" width="5" height="3" fill="${c}"/><rect x="4" y="11" width="2" height="2" fill="${c}"/> </svg>`; } /* ===== PREVIEW ===== */ function updatePreview(){ const card=document.getElementById('cardPreview'); const w=N('cardWidth'),h=N('cardHeight'),rad=N('borderRadius'); let border='none'; if(S.outline!=='none')border=`${N('outlineWidth')}px ${S.outline} ${V('outlineColor')}`; let bgCSS=''; if(S.bgType==='solid')bgCSS=V('bgColor'); else if(S.bgType==='gradient')bgCSS=`linear-gradient(${N('gradAngle')}deg,${V('gradColor1')},${V('gradColor2')})`; else bgCSS='#f0f4f8'; const logo=S.logoSrc ?`<img src="${S.logoSrc}" style="width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.5);flex-shrink:0">` :`<div style="width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(0,0,0,.15);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.6rem;color:#888;flex-shrink:0;border:2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,.2)">LOGO</div>`; const photo=S.photoSrc ?`<img src="${S.photoSrc}" style="width:72px;height:88px;border-radius:6px;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,.2);flex-shrink:0">` :`<div style="width:72px;height:88px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.6rem;color:#888;border:2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,.2);flex-shrink:0">PHOTO</div>`; let bgLayer=''; if(S.bgType==='image'&&S.bgImgSrc){ bgLayer=`<div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0"><img src="${S.bgImgSrc}" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;opacity:${N('bgImgOpacity')/100}"></div>`; } const texLayer = getTexSVG(N('textureOpacity')/100); const decoLayer=`<div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:1;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden">${getDecoHTML(V('decoColor'))}</div>`; const showHole = document.getElementById('showHole').checked; const showHolo = document.getElementById('showHolo').checked; const idCodeType = V('idCodeType'); const holeHTML = showHole ? `<svg width="45" height="12" style="position:absolute;top:8px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:10"><rect width="45" height="12" rx="6" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.3)" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/><path d="M5,11 L40,11" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.6)" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/></svg>` : ''; const holoHTML = showHolo ? `<svg width="100%" height="100%" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;z-index:8;pointer-events:none;"><defs><linearGradient id="holo" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="20%" stop-color="rgba(255,255,255,0)"/><stop offset="25%" stop-color="rgba(255,255,255,0.4)"/><stop offset="30%" stop-color="rgba(255,255,255,0)"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="rgba(255,255,255,0)"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="rgba(255,255,255,0)"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#holo)"/></svg>` : ''; let codeGraphic = ''; if(idCodeType === 'barcode') codeGraphic = getBarcodeSVG(V('studentIdColor')); else if(idCodeType === 'qrcode') codeGraphic = getQRSVG(V('studentIdColor')); const ff=id=>`font-family:'${V(id)}',sans-serif`; const fz=id=>`font-size:${N(id)}px`; const fc=id=>`color:${V(id)}`; const fw=id=>`font-weight:${isBold(id)}`; const decoC=V('decoColor'); const isP=h>w; function fld(lbl,val,fontId,sizeId,colorId,boldId){ if(!val)return''; const bw=boldId?fw(boldId):'font-weight:600'; return`<div style="margin-bottom:1px"><div style="${ff('labelFont')};${fz('labelSize')};${fc('labelColor')};font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;opacity:.7">${lbl}</div><div style="${ff(fontId)};${fz(sizeId)};${fc(colorId)};${bw};border-bottom:1px dotted rgba(0,0,0,.2);padding-bottom:1px;min-height:13px">${val}</div></div>`; } card.style.cssText=`width:${w}px;height:${h}px;border-radius:${rad}px;border:${border};background:${bgCSS};position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.3)`; card.innerHTML=` ${bgLayer}${texLayer}${decoLayer}${holeHTML}${holoHTML} <div style="position:relative;z-index:3;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;width:100%;height:100%;padding: ${showHole ? '22px' : '14px'} 16px 10px"> <div style="width:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:2px"> ${logo} <div style="flex:1;text-align:center"> <div style="${ff('instNameFont')};${fz('instNameSize')};${fc('instNameColor')};${fw('instNameBold')};line-height:1.2">${V('instName')||'Institution Name'}</div> <div style="${ff('subtitleFont')};${fz('subtitleSize')};${fc('subtitleColor')};${fw('subtitleBold')};margin-top:2px;line-height:1.2">${V('subtitle')||''}</div> </div> </div> <div style="width:90%;height:2px;margin:6px auto;border-radius:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,${decoC}55,transparent)"></div> <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;width:100%;flex:1;align-items:flex-start;${isP?'flex-direction:column;align-items:center':''}"> <div style="flex-shrink:0">${photo}</div> <div style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;${isP?'align-items:center;text-align:center':''}"> ${fld('Name',V('studentName'),'studentNameFont','studentNameSize','studentNameColor','studentNameBold')} ${fld('ID No.',V('studentId'),'studentIdFont','studentIdSize','studentIdColor','studentIdBold')} ${fld('Department',V('department'),'departmentFont','departmentSize','departmentColor','departmentBold')} ${fld('Session',V('session'),'sessionFont','sessionSize','sessionColor','sessionBold')} ${fld('Blood Group',V('bloodGroup'),'studentIdFont','studentIdSize','studentIdColor',null)} ${V('dob')?fld('Date of Birth',formatDate(V('dob')),'dateFont','dateSize','dateColor',null):''} ${V('address')?`<div style="margin-bottom:1px"><div style="${ff('labelFont')};${fz('labelSize')};${fc('labelColor')};font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;opacity:.7">Address</div><div style="${ff('addressFont')};${fz('addressSize')};${fc('addressColor')};line-height:1.3">${V('address')}</div></div>`:''} </div> </div> <div style="width:100%;margin-top:auto;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;padding-top:6px"> <div style="display:flex;gap:12px"> <div style="text-align:center"><div style="${ff('labelFont')};${fz('labelSize')};${fc('labelColor')};text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.7">Issue Date</div><div style="${ff('dateFont')};${fz('dateSize')};${fc('dateColor')};font-weight:600">${formatDate(V('issueDate'))}</div></div> <div style="text-align:center"><div style="${ff('labelFont')};${fz('labelSize')};${fc('labelColor')};text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.7">Expiry Date</div><div style="${ff('dateFont')};${fz('dateSize')};${fc('dateColor')};font-weight:600">${formatDate(V('expiryDate'))}</div></div> </div> <div style="text-align:center"> <div style="width:80px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.4);margin-bottom:2px;min-height:16px;${ff('signatureFont')};${fz('signatureSize')};${fc('signatureColor')};font-style:italic;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center">${V('signatureName')||''}</div> <div style="${ff('labelFont')};${fz('labelSize')};${fc('labelColor')};text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.7">Authorized Signature</div> </div> </div> <div style="width:100%;text-align:center;margin-top:4px;${ff('studentIdFont')};font-size:${Math.max(N('studentIdSize')-1,7)}px;${fc('studentIdColor')};letter-spacing:1px;opacity:.8;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;flex-direction:column;gap:3px"> ${codeGraphic} <div style="font-weight:600">${V('studentId')||''}</div> </div> </div>`; } /* ===== DOWNLOAD — ROBUST HTML-TO-IMAGE METHOD ===== */ function downloadCard(){ const btn = document.getElementById('downloadBtn'); const status = document.getElementById('downloadStatus'); const card = document.getElementById('cardPreview'); btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = '⏳ Generating...'; status.textContent = 'Please wait, rendering high-res image...'; status.classList.remove('success'); setTimeout(() => { // Verify Library Loaded if(typeof htmlToImage === 'undefined'){ status.textContent = '❌ Error: html-to-image library failed to load. Please check your internet connection.'; btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = '&#11015; Download as PNG'; return; } // Generate high-resolution blob (pixelRatio 3 ensures sharp text/images) htmlToImage.toBlob(card, { pixelRatio: 3 }) .then(function (blob) { if(!blob) throw new Error("Image Blob could not be created."); // Trigger Download const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const link = document.createElement('a'); link.download = 'student-id-card-pro.png'; link.href = url; document.body.appendChild(link); link.click(); document.body.removeChild(link); // Cleanup memory setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 5000); // Success Message status.classList.add('success'); status.textContent = '✅ Downloaded successfully!'; btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = '&#11015; Download as PNG'; setTimeout(() => { status.textContent = ''; status.classList.remove('success'); }, 3000); }) .catch(function (error) { console.error('Download Error:', error); status.textContent = '❌ Error: Failed to generate image. ' + (error.message || 'Check console.'); btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = '&#11015; Download as PNG'; }); }, 100); } /* ===== INIT ===== */ updatePreview(); </script> </body> </html> <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title>Student ID Card Generator</title> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;600;700;900&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&family=Roboto:wght@300;400;700&family=Montserrat:wght@400;600;700;900&family=Oswald:wght@400;600;700&family=Raleway:wght@400;600;700&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;900&family=Dancing+Script:wght@400;700&family=Merriweather:wght@400;700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"> <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js"></script> <style> *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box} body{min-height:100vh;background:#1a1a2e;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;color:#fff} .main-layout{display:flex;min-height:100vh} .sidebar{width:500px;min-width:500px;background:#16213e;border-right:2px solid #0f3460;overflow-y:auto;height:100vh;position:sticky;top:0;padding:20px} .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px}.sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#16213e}.sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#0f3460;border-radius:3px} .sidebar-title{text-align:center;font-size:20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e94560,#0f3460);-webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;margin-bottom:15px;font-weight:900} .tab-container{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:15px;flex-wrap:wrap} .tab-btn{flex:1;min-width:60px;padding:8px 4px;border:none;border-radius:8px;background:#0f3460;color:#a0a0b0;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif} .tab-btn.active{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e94560,#533483);color:#fff}.tab-btn:hover{background:#1a3a6e;color:#fff} .tab-content{display:none}.tab-content.active{display:block} .section-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#e94560;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin:16px 0 8px;padding-bottom:5px;border-bottom:1px solid #0f3460} .form-group{margin-bottom:10px}.form-group label{display:block;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#8a8a9a;margin-bottom:3px} .form-group input[type="text"],.form-group input[type="date"],.form-group select{width:100%;padding:8px 10px;border:1.5px solid #0f3460;border-radius:6px;background:#1a1a2e;color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif;outline:none} .form-group input:focus,.form-group select:focus{border-color:#e94560} .form-group input[type="color"]{width:100%;height:36px;border:2px solid #0f3460;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;background:transparent;padding:2px} .form-group input[type="range"]{width:100%;accent-color:#e94560;cursor:pointer} .form-group input[type="file"]{width:100%;padding:6px;font-size:12px;color:#8a8a9a;border:1.5px dashed #0f3460;border-radius:6px;background:#1a1a2e} .form-row{display:flex;gap:10px}.form-row .form-group{flex:1} .range-value{font-size:11px;color:#e94560;font-weight:700;float:right} .checkbox-group{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px} .checkbox-group input[type="checkbox"]{accent-color:#e94560;width:16px;height:16px;cursor:pointer} .checkbox-group label{font-size:12px;color:#c0c0d0;margin:0;cursor:pointer} .color-presets{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px} .color-preset{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;border:3px solid transparent;transition:all .3s} .color-preset:hover{border-color:#fff;transform:scale(1.2)} .texture-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:6px;margin-top:8px} .texture-btn{padding:8px 4px;border:2px solid #0f3460;border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;color:#c0c0d0;background:#1a1a2e;transition:all .3s;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif} .texture-btn:hover,.texture-btn.active{border-color:#e94560;color:#fff;background:#0f3460} .btn{width:100%;padding:12px;border:none;border-radius:10px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;margin-top:8px;transition:all .3s;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif} .btn-generate{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e94560,#533483);color:#fff} .btn-print{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#43a047,#2e7d32);color:#fff} .btn-reset{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f57c00,#e65100);color:#fff} .btn-jpg{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e88e5,#1565c0);color:#fff} .btn-png{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#8e24aa,#6a1b9a);color:#fff} .btn:hover{opacity:.85;transform:translateY(-1px)}.btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none} .btn-row{display:flex;gap:8px}.btn-row .btn{flex:1} .download-status{text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:#43a047;margin-top:6px;min-height:18px} .preview-area{flex:1;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;padding:40px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 20% 80%,rgba(233,69,96,.05) 0%,transparent 50%),radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%,rgba(83,52,131,.05) 0%,transparent 50%),#1a1a2e} .card-outer{border-radius:20px;padding:5px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#4a148c,#1a237e,#1565c0);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5);transition:all .5s ease} .card{border-radius:17px;width:430px;padding:30px 30px 20px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f0f4ff,#fff);transition:all .5s ease} .card-texture-canvas{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:0} .card-gloss-overlay{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:2;display:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.35) 0%,rgba(255,255,255,.05) 40%,transparent 60%,rgba(255,255,255,.1) 100%)} .card-watermark{position:absolute;font-size:90px;opacity:.04;font-weight:900;transform:rotate(-30deg);top:35%;left:5%;pointer-events:none;z-index:1;color:#000;display:none;font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif} .card>*:not(.card-texture-canvas):not(.card-gloss-overlay):not(.card-watermark){position:relative;z-index:3} .uni-logo{width:72px;height:72px;margin:0 auto 10px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e8f5e9,#c8e6c9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:32px;overflow:hidden;transition:all .4s} .uni-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%} .uni-name{font-size:24px;font-weight:700;font-style:italic;color:#1a237e;margin-bottom:2px;transition:all .4s} .uni-tagline{font-size:14px;font-style:italic;color:#5c6bc0;margin-bottom:20px;transition:all .4s} .stu-photo{width:130px;height:130px;border-radius:50%;border:4px solid #7986cb;margin:0 auto 15px;overflow:hidden;background:#c5cae9;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .4s} .stu-photo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover} .stu-photo-placeholder{font-size:50px;color:#7986cb} .stu-name{font-size:26px;font-weight:700;color:#1a237e;margin-bottom:8px;transition:all .4s} .info-line{font-size:14px;color:#37474f;margin-bottom:5px;line-height:1.7;transition:all .4s} .info-label{font-weight:600;color:#5c6bc0} .dept-line{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#1565c0;margin:8px 0;transition:all .4s} .session-line{font-size:14px;color:#37474f;margin-bottom:5px;transition:all .4s} .blood-gender{display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;gap:20px;margin:6px 0;font-size:14px;color:#37474f;transition:all .4s} .blood-val{color:#d32f2f;font-weight:700;font-size:16px} .card-divider{border:none;border-top:1.5px solid #c5cae9;margin:18px 0 12px;transition:all .4s} .card-footer{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;font-size:12px;color:#546e7a;transition:all .4s} .card-footer-left{text-align:left;line-height:1.8}.card-footer-right{text-align:right} .card-sig{font-family:'Dancing Script',cursive;font-size:20px;font-style:italic;font-weight:700;color:#1a237e;transition:all .4s} .card-sig-label{font-size:11px;color:#78909c} /* Live preview indicator */ .live-badge{display:inline-block;background:#43a047;color:#fff;font-size:9px;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:10px;margin-left:6px;vertical-align:middle} @media print{.sidebar{display:none!important}.preview-area{background:#fff!important}body{background:#fff!important}.main-layout{display:block}} @media(max-width:1000px){.main-layout{flex-direction:column}.sidebar{width:100%;min-width:unset;height:auto;position:relative}} </style> </head> <body> <div class="main-layout"> <div class="sidebar"> <h2 class="sidebar-title">🎨 Advanced ID Card Generator</h2> <div class="tab-container"> <button class="tab-btn active" data-tab="info">📝 Info</button> <button class="tab-btn" data-tab="colors">🎨 Colors</button> <button class="tab-btn" data-tab="fonts">🔤 Fonts</button> <button class="tab-btn" data-tab="layout">📐 Layout</button> <button class="tab-btn" data-tab="texture">✨ Effects</button> <button class="tab-btn" data-tab="download">📥 Save</button> </div> <!-- TAB: INFO --> <div class="tab-content active" id="tab-info"> <div class="section-title">🏫 University / Institute</div> <div class="form-group"><label>University Logo (Upload)</label><input type="file" id="logoInput" accept="image/*"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Or Emoji Logo</label><input type="text" id="logoEmoji" value="📖" maxlength="4" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"> <label>University Name</label> <input type="text" id="uniNameInput" value="University of Technology" oninput="liveUpdate()"> </div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Uni Name Size <span class="range-value" id="szUniVal2">24px</span></label><input type="range" id="szUni" min="14" max="38" value="24" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Uni Name Color</label><input type="color" id="clrUniName" value="#1a237e" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> </div> <!-- TAGLINE - সব control একসাথে --> <div class="form-group" style="margin-top:8px"> <label>Tagline / Motto <span class="live-badge">LIVE</span></label> <input type="text" id="taglineInput" value="Excellence in Education" oninput="liveUpdate()" placeholder="Type tagline here..."> </div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Tagline Size <span class="range-value" id="szTagVal">14px</span></label> <input type="range" id="szTag" min="8" max="28" value="14" oninput="liveUpdate()"> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Tagline Color</label> <input type="color" id="clrTagline" value="#5c6bc0" oninput="liveUpdate()"> </div> </div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"> <label>Tagline Font</label> <select id="fontTagline" onchange="liveUpdate()"> <option value="'Poppins',sans-serif">Poppins</option> <option value="'Playfair Display',serif">Playfair Display</option> <option value="'Lora',serif" selected>Lora</option> <option value="'Montserrat',sans-serif">Montserrat</option> <option value="'Raleway',sans-serif">Raleway</option> <option value="'Nunito',sans-serif">Nunito</option> <option value="'Merriweather',serif">Merriweather</option> <option value="'Dancing Script',cursive">Dancing Script</option> <option value="Georgia,serif">Georgia</option> </select> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label>Tagline Weight</label> <select id="wtTagline" onchange="liveUpdate()"> <option value="300">Light</option> <option value="400" selected>Normal</option> <option value="600">Semi Bold</option> <option value="700">Bold</option> </select> </div> </div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="chkTagItalic" checked onchange="liveUpdate()"><label for="chkTagItalic">Tagline Italic</label></div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="chkTagShow" checked onchange="liveUpdate()"><label for="chkTagShow">Show Tagline</label></div> <div class="section-title">📸 Student Photo</div> <div class="form-group"><label>Upload Photo</label><input type="file" id="photoInput" accept="image/*"></div> <div class="section-title">👤 Student Details</div> <div class="form-group"><label>Full Name</label><input type="text" id="nameInput" value="John Smith" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Student ID</label><input type="text" id="idInput" value="STU-2024-001" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Roll</label><input type="text" id="rollInput" value="2024001" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Registration</label><input type="text" id="regInput" value="REG-2024-5678" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> </div> <div class="form-group"><label>Department</label><select id="deptInput" onchange="liveUpdate()"><option>Computer Science & Engineering</option><option>Electrical & Electronic Engineering</option><option>Mechanical Engineering</option><option>Civil Engineering</option><option>Business Administration</option><option>Pharmacy</option><option>Mathematics</option><option>Physics</option><option>Chemistry</option><option>English</option></select></div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Session</label><select id="sessionInput" onchange="liveUpdate()"><option>2024-2028</option><option>2023-2027</option><option>2022-2026</option><option>2021-2025</option></select></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Semester</label><select id="semesterInput" onchange="liveUpdate()"><option>1st Semester</option><option>2nd Semester</option><option>3rd Semester</option><option>4th Semester</option><option>5th Semester</option><option>6th Semester</option><option>7th Semester</option><option>8th Semester</option></select></div> </div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Blood Group</label><select id="bloodInput" onchange="liveUpdate()"><option>A+</option><option>A-</option><option>B+</option><option>B-</option><option>O+</option><option>O-</option><option>AB+</option><option>AB-</option></select></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Gender</label><select id="genderInput" onchange="liveUpdate()"><option>Male</option><option>Female</option><option>Other</option></select></div> </div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Date of Birth</label><input type="date" id="dobInput" value="2002-05-15" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Nationality</label><input type="text" id="nationalityInput" value="American" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> </div> <div class="form-group"><label>Address</label><input type="text" id="addressInput" value="123 Main Street, City, State 12345" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Issue Date</label><input type="date" id="issueInput" value="2024-01-15" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Expire Date</label><input type="date" id="expireInput" value="2028-01-14" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> </div> </div> <!-- TAB: COLORS --> <div class="tab-content" id="tab-colors"> <div class="section-title">🌈 Border Gradient</div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Color 1</label><input type="color" id="borderColor1" value="#4a148c" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Color 2</label><input type="color" id="borderColor2" value="#1a237e" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Color 3</label><input type="color" id="borderColor3" value="#1565c0" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> </div> <div class="section-title">⚡ Quick Themes</div> <div class="color-presets" id="borderPresets"> <div class="color-preset" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4a148c,#1565c0)" data-c1="#4a148c" data-c2="#1a237e" data-c3="#1565c0"></div> <div class="color-preset" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e94560,#533483)" data-c1="#e94560" data-c2="#8e24aa" data-c3="#533483"></div> <div class="color-preset" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff9800,#e65100)" data-c1="#ff9800" data-c2="#f57c00" data-c3="#e65100"></div> <div class="color-preset" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#00897b,#004d40)" data-c1="#00897b" data-c2="#00695c" data-c3="#004d40"></div> <div class="color-preset" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ef5350,#b71c1c)" data-c1="#ef5350" data-c2="#c62828" data-c3="#b71c1c"></div> <div class="color-preset" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffd700,#ff8c00)" data-c1="#ffd700" data-c2="#ffa000" data-c3="#ff8c00"></div> <div class="color-preset" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#212121,#616161)" data-c1="#212121" data-c2="#424242" data-c3="#616161"></div> <div class="color-preset" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1b5e20,#388e3c)" data-c1="#1b5e20" data-c2="#2e7d32" data-c3="#388e3c"></div> </div> <div class="section-title">📄 Card Background</div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>BG Top</label><input type="color" id="bgColor1" value="#f0f4ff" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>BG Bottom</label><input type="color" id="bgColor2" value="#ffffff" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> </div> <div class="section-title">🔤 Text Colors</div> <div class="form-row"><div class="form-group"><label>Student Name</label><input type="color" id="clrStuName" value="#1a237e" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div><div class="form-group"><label>Department</label><input type="color" id="clrDept" value="#1565c0" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div></div> <div class="form-row"><div class="form-group"><label>Label (ID,Roll)</label><input type="color" id="clrLabel" value="#5c6bc0" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div><div class="form-group"><label>Info Text</label><input type="color" id="clrInfo" value="#37474f" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div></div> <div class="form-row"><div class="form-group"><label>Blood</label><input type="color" id="clrBlood" value="#d32f2f" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div><div class="form-group"><label>Signature</label><input type="color" id="clrSig" value="#1a237e" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div></div> <div class="form-row"><div class="form-group"><label>Footer</label><input type="color" id="clrFooter" value="#546e7a" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div><div class="form-group"><label>Divider</label><input type="color" id="clrDivider" value="#c5cae9" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div></div> <div class="form-row"><div class="form-group"><label>Photo Border</label><input type="color" id="clrPhotoBorder" value="#7986cb" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div><div class="form-group"><label>Logo BG</label><input type="color" id="clrLogoBg" value="#e8f5e9" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div></div> </div> <!-- TAB: FONTS --> <div class="tab-content" id="tab-fonts"> <div class="section-title">🔤 Fonts</div> <div class="form-group"><label>University Name</label><select id="fontUni" onchange="liveUpdate()"><option value="'Playfair Display',serif">Playfair Display</option><option value="'Poppins',sans-serif">Poppins</option><option value="'Montserrat',sans-serif">Montserrat</option><option value="'Oswald',sans-serif">Oswald</option><option value="'Raleway',sans-serif">Raleway</option><option value="'Merriweather',serif">Merriweather</option><option value="'Lora',serif">Lora</option><option value="'Nunito',sans-serif">Nunito</option><option value="Georgia,serif">Georgia</option></select></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Student Name</label><select id="fontName" onchange="liveUpdate()"><option value="'Poppins',sans-serif">Poppins</option><option value="'Montserrat',sans-serif">Montserrat</option><option value="'Playfair Display',serif">Playfair Display</option><option value="'Oswald',sans-serif">Oswald</option><option value="'Raleway',sans-serif">Raleway</option><option value="'Nunito',sans-serif">Nunito</option><option value="'Roboto',sans-serif">Roboto</option><option value="'Merriweather',serif">Merriweather</option></select></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Body Text</label><select id="fontBody" onchange="liveUpdate()"><option value="'Poppins',sans-serif">Poppins</option><option value="'Roboto',sans-serif">Roboto</option><option value="'Montserrat',sans-serif">Montserrat</option><option value="'Nunito',sans-serif">Nunito</option><option value="'Raleway',sans-serif">Raleway</option><option value="'Lora',serif">Lora</option><option value="Arial,sans-serif">Arial</option></select></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Signature</label><select id="fontSig" onchange="liveUpdate()"><option value="'Dancing Script',cursive">Dancing Script</option><option value="'Lora',serif">Lora</option><option value="Georgia,serif">Georgia</option><option value="'Playfair Display',serif">Playfair Display</option><option value="'Merriweather',serif">Merriweather</option></select></div> <div class="section-title">📏 Sizes</div> <div class="form-group"><label>Student Name <span class="range-value" id="szNameVal">26px</span></label><input type="range" id="szName" min="16" max="40" value="26" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Department <span class="range-value" id="szDeptVal">15px</span></label><input type="range" id="szDept" min="10" max="24" value="15" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Info Text <span class="range-value" id="szInfoVal">14px</span></label><input type="range" id="szInfo" min="10" max="20" value="14" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Signature <span class="range-value" id="szSigVal">20px</span></label><input type="range" id="szSig" min="14" max="32" value="20" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Footer <span class="range-value" id="szFootVal">12px</span></label><input type="range" id="szFoot" min="9" max="16" value="12" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="section-title">💪 Weight & Style</div> <div class="form-row"> <div class="form-group"><label>Uni Weight</label><select id="wtUni" onchange="liveUpdate()"><option value="400">Normal</option><option value="600">Semi Bold</option><option value="700" selected>Bold</option><option value="900">Black</option></select></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Name Weight</label><select id="wtName" onchange="liveUpdate()"><option value="400">Normal</option><option value="600">Semi Bold</option><option value="700" selected>Bold</option><option value="900">Black</option></select></div> </div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="chkUniItalic" checked onchange="liveUpdate()"><label for="chkUniItalic">University Italic</label></div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="chkNameUpper" onchange="liveUpdate()"><label for="chkNameUpper">Name UPPERCASE</label></div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="chkDeptBold" checked onchange="liveUpdate()"><label for="chkDeptBold">Dept Bold</label></div> </div> <!-- TAB: LAYOUT --> <div class="tab-content" id="tab-layout"> <div class="section-title">📐 Card</div> <div class="form-group"><label>Width <span class="range-value" id="lyWidthVal">430px</span></label><input type="range" id="lyWidth" min="300" max="580" value="430" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Padding <span class="range-value" id="lyPadVal">30px</span></label><input type="range" id="lyPad" min="10" max="50" value="30" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Radius <span class="range-value" id="lyRadVal">20px</span></label><input type="range" id="lyRad" min="0" max="40" value="20" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Border <span class="range-value" id="lyBorderVal">5px</span></label><input type="range" id="lyBorder" min="1" max="15" value="5" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="section-title">📸 Photo</div> <div class="form-group"><label>Size <span class="range-value" id="lyPhotoVal">130px</span></label><input type="range" id="lyPhoto" min="60" max="200" value="130" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Border <span class="range-value" id="lyPhotoBdrVal">4px</span></label><input type="range" id="lyPhotoBdr" min="0" max="10" value="4" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="section-title">🏫 Logo</div> <div class="form-group"><label>Size <span class="range-value" id="lyLogoVal">72px</span></label><input type="range" id="lyLogo" min="40" max="120" value="72" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="section-title">📏 Spacing</div> <div class="form-group"><label>Line Gap <span class="range-value" id="lyGapVal">5px</span></label><input type="range" id="lyGap" min="0" max="15" value="5" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="section-title">🌗 Shadow</div> <div class="form-group"><label>Size <span class="range-value" id="lyShadowVal">60px</span></label><input type="range" id="lyShadow" min="0" max="120" value="60" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Opacity <span class="range-value" id="lyShadowOpVal">50%</span></label><input type="range" id="lyShadowOp" min="0" max="100" value="50" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> </div> <!-- TAB: EFFECTS --> <div class="tab-content" id="tab-texture"> <div class="section-title">✨ Texture</div> <div class="texture-grid" id="textureGrid"> <div class="texture-btn active" data-tex="none">None</div> <div class="texture-btn" data-tex="dots">Dots</div> <div class="texture-btn" data-tex="lines">Lines</div> <div class="texture-btn" data-tex="grid">Grid</div> <div class="texture-btn" data-tex="diagonal">Diagonal</div> <div class="texture-btn" data-tex="cross">Cross</div> <div class="texture-btn" data-tex="waves">Waves</div> <div class="texture-btn" data-tex="diamond">Diamond</div> </div> <div class="form-group" style="margin-top:12px"><label>Opacity <span class="range-value" id="texOpVal">8%</span></label><input type="range" id="texOp" min="1" max="40" value="8" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="texColor" value="#000000" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="section-title">💧 Watermark</div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="chkWatermark" onchange="liveUpdate()"><label for="chkWatermark">Show Watermark</label></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Text</label><input type="text" id="watermarkText" value="UNIVERSITY" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Size <span class="range-value" id="wmSizeVal">90px</span></label><input type="range" id="wmSize" min="40" max="160" value="90" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="section-title">🌈 Effects</div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="chkGloss" onchange="liveUpdate()"><label for="chkGloss">Glossy Shine</label></div> <div class="checkbox-group"><input type="checkbox" id="chkGlow" onchange="liveUpdate()"><label for="chkGlow">Border Glow</label></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Glow Color</label><input type="color" id="glowColor" value="#e94560" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Glow Size <span class="range-value" id="glowIntVal">30px</span></label><input type="range" id="glowInt" min="5" max="80" value="30" oninput="liveUpdate()"></div> </div> <!-- TAB: DOWNLOAD --> <div class="tab-content" id="tab-download"> <div class="section-title">📥 Settings</div> <div class="form-group"><label>File Name</label><input type="text" id="dlFileName" value="student-id-card"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>Scale <span class="range-value" id="dlScaleVal">3x</span></label><input type="range" id="dlScale" min="1" max="5" value="3" oninput="$('dlScaleVal').textContent=this.value+'x'"></div> <div class="form-group"><label>JPG Quality <span class="range-value" id="dlQualVal">95%</span></label><input type="range" id="dlQual" min="50" max="100" value="95" oninput="$('dlQualVal').textContent=this.value+'%'"></div> <div class="section-title">🎨 Background</div> <div class="form-group"><label>Type</label><select id="dlBgOption" onchange="$('dlCustomBgGroup').style.display=this.value==='custom'?'block':'none'"><option value="transparent">Transparent (PNG)</option><option value="white">White</option><option value="dark">Dark</option><option value="custom">Custom</option></select></div> <div class="form-group" id="dlCustomBgGroup" style="display:none"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="dlCustomBg" value="#ffffff"></div> <div class="section-title">🖼️ Download</div> <button class="btn btn-jpg" onclick="downloadCard('jpg')">📷 Download JPG</button> <button class="btn btn-png" onclick="downloadCard('png')">🖼️ Download PNG (Transparent)</button> <button class="btn btn-print" onclick="window.print()">🖨️ Print</button> <div class="download-status" id="dlStatus"></div> </div> <div style="margin-top:15px"> <button class="btn btn-generate" onclick="liveUpdate()">🎴 Refresh</button> <div class="btn-row" style="margin-top:6px"> <button class="btn btn-jpg" onclick="downloadCard('jpg')" style="font-size:12px">📷 JPG</button> <button class="btn btn-png" onclick="downloadCard('png')" style="font-size:12px">🖼️ PNG</button> <button class="btn btn-print" onclick="window.print()" style="font-size:12px">🖨️ Print</button> <button class="btn btn-reset" onclick="resetAll()" style="font-size:12px">🔄 Reset</button> </div> <div class="download-status" id="dlStatusBottom"></div> </div> </div> <!-- PREVIEW --> <div class="preview-area"> <div class="card-outer" id="cardOuter"> <div class="card" id="cardInner"> <canvas class="card-texture-canvas" id="texCanvas"></canvas> <div class="card-gloss-overlay" id="glossOverlay"></div> <div class="card-watermark" id="wmEl">UNIVERSITY</div> <div class="uni-logo" id="logoEl"><span id="logoContent">📖</span></div> <h1 class="uni-name" id="uniNameEl">University of Technology</h1> <p class="uni-tagline" id="taglineEl">Excellence in Education</p> <div class="stu-photo" id="photoEl"><span class="stu-photo-placeholder">👤</span></div> <h2 class="stu-name" id="stuNameEl">John Smith</h2> <p class="info-line"><span class="info-label">ID:</span> <span id="valId">STU-2024-001</span></p> <p class="info-line"><span class="info-label">Roll:</span> <span id="valRoll">2024001</span></p> <p class="info-line"><span class="info-label">Reg:</span> <span id="valReg">REG-2024-5678</span></p> <p class="dept-line" id="deptEl">Computer Science & Engineering</p> <p class="session-line" id="sessionEl"><span id="valSession">2024-2028</span> &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <span id="valSemester">1st Semester</span></p> <div class="blood-gender" id="bgRow"><span>🩸 <span class="blood-val" id="valBlood">A+</span></span><span><span id="valGenderIcon">♂</span> <span id="valGender">Male</span></span></div> <p class="info-line"><span class="info-label">DOB:</span> <span id="valDob">2002-05-15</span></p> <p class="info-line"><span class="info-label">Nationality:</span> <span id="valNat">American</span></p> <p class="info-line" id="valAddr">123 Main Street, City, State 12345</p> <hr class="card-divider" id="dividerEl"> <div class="card-footer" id="footerEl"> <div class="card-footer-left"><div>Issue: <span id="valIssue">2024-01-15</span></div><div>Expire: <span id="valExpire">2028-01-14</span></div></div> <div class="card-footer-right"><div class="card-sig" id="sigEl">John Smith</div><div class="card-sig-label">Signature</div></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <script> const $=id=>document.getElementById(id), val=id=>$(id).value, chk=id=>$(id).checked; let currentTexture='none', logoImageSrc=null; // Tabs document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active')); document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active')); b.classList.add('active');$('tab-'+b.dataset.tab).classList.add('active'); })); // Uploads $('logoInput').addEventListener('change',e=>{const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;const r=new FileReader();r.onload=ev=>{logoImageSrc=ev.target.result;$('logoContent').innerHTML=`<img src="${logoImageSrc}" alt="Logo">`;$('logoEmoji').value='';};r.readAsDataURL(f);}); $('photoInput').addEventListener('change',e=>{const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;const r=new FileReader();r.onload=ev=>{$('photoEl').innerHTML=`<img src="${ev.target.result}" alt="Photo">`;};r.readAsDataURL(f);}); // Presets $('borderPresets').addEventListener('click',e=>{const p=e.target.closest('.color-preset');if(!p)return;$('borderColor1').value=p.dataset.c1;$('borderColor2').value=p.dataset.c2;$('borderColor3').value=p.dataset.c3;liveUpdate();}); $('textureGrid').addEventListener('click',e=>{const b=e.target.closest('.texture-btn');if(!b)return;document.querySelectorAll('.texture-btn').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));b.classList.add('active');currentTexture=b.dataset.tex;liveUpdate();}); // Draw texture on real canvas function drawTextureOnCanvas(canvas, w, h, scaleFactor) { const s = scaleFactor || 2; canvas.width = w * s; canvas.height = h * s; if (canvas.style) { canvas.style.width = w + 'px'; canvas.style.height = h + 'px'; } const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height); if (currentTexture === 'none') return; const texColor = val('texColor') || '#000'; const opacity = parseInt(val('texOp')) / 100 || 0.08; const cr = parseInt(texColor.slice(1,3),16), cg = parseInt(texColor.slice(3,5),16), cb = parseInt(texColor.slice(5,7),16); ctx.scale(s, s); ctx.globalAlpha = opacity; ctx.strokeStyle = `rgb(${cr},${cg},${cb})`; ctx.fillStyle = `rgb(${cr},${cg},${cb})`; ctx.lineWidth = 1; switch(currentTexture) { case 'dots': for(let y=0;y<h;y+=14)for(let x=0;x<w;x+=14){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x+7,y+7,1.2,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();} break; case 'lines': for(let y=0;y<h;y+=12){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(w,y);ctx.stroke();} break; case 'grid': for(let y=0;y<h;y+=20){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(w,y);ctx.stroke();}for(let x=0;x<w;x+=20){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,0);ctx.lineTo(x,h);ctx.stroke();} break; case 'diagonal': for(let i=-h;i<w+h;i+=12){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(i,0);ctx.lineTo(i+h,h);ctx.stroke();} break; case 'cross': for(let i=-h;i<w+h;i+=16){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(i,0);ctx.lineTo(i+h,h);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(i+h,0);ctx.lineTo(i,h);ctx.stroke();} break; case 'waves': for(let y=0;y<h;y+=16){ctx.beginPath();for(let x=0;x<w;x++)ctx.lineTo(x,y+Math.sin(x*.08)*5);ctx.stroke();} break; case 'diamond': for(let y=0;y<h;y+=20)for(let x=0;x<w;x+=20){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x+10,y);ctx.lineTo(x+20,y+10);ctx.lineTo(x+10,y+20);ctx.lineTo(x,y+10);ctx.closePath();ctx.stroke();} break; } ctx.globalAlpha = 1; ctx.setTransform(1,0,0,1,0,0); } // LIVE UPDATE function liveUpdate() { const name = val('nameInput') || 'John Smith'; $('stuNameEl').textContent = name; $('valId').textContent = val('idInput') || 'STU-2024-001'; $('valRoll').textContent = val('rollInput') || '2024001'; $('valReg').textContent = val('regInput') || 'REG-2024-5678'; $('deptEl').textContent = val('deptInput'); $('valSession').textContent = val('sessionInput'); $('valSemester').textContent = val('semesterInput'); $('valBlood').textContent = val('bloodInput'); const g = val('genderInput'); $('valGender').textContent = g; $('valGenderIcon').textContent = g==='Male'?'♂':g==='Female'?'♀':'⚧'; $('valDob').textContent = val('dobInput') || '2002-05-15'; $('valNat').textContent = val('nationalityInput') || 'American'; $('valAddr').textContent = val('addressInput') || '123 Main Street, City, State 12345'; $('valIssue').textContent = val('issueInput') || '2024-01-15'; $('valExpire').textContent = val('expireInput') || '2028-01-14'; $('sigEl').textContent = name; $('uniNameEl').textContent = val('uniNameInput') || 'University of Technology'; // ===== TAGLINE FIX ===== const tagText = val('taglineInput'); const tagEl = $('taglineEl'); // Show/hide tagline if (chk('chkTagShow')) { tagEl.style.display = 'block'; tagEl.textContent = tagText || 'Excellence in Education'; } else { tagEl.style.display = 'none'; } // Tagline size const tagSize = val('szTag'); $('szTagVal').textContent = tagSize + 'px'; tagEl.style.fontSize = tagSize + 'px'; // Tagline color tagEl.style.color = val('clrTagline'); // Tagline font tagEl.style.fontFamily = val('fontTagline'); // Tagline weight tagEl.style.fontWeight = val('wtTagline'); // Tagline italic tagEl.style.fontStyle = chk('chkTagItalic') ? 'italic' : 'normal'; // Logo emoji if (val('logoEmoji') && !logoImageSrc) $('logoContent').textContent = val('logoEmoji'); // Uni name size + color (from Info tab) const uniSz = val('szUni'); $('szUniVal2').textContent = uniSz + 'px'; $('uniNameEl').style.fontSize = uniSz + 'px'; $('uniNameEl').style.color = val('clrUniName'); // Colors const outer = $('cardOuter'), card = $('cardInner'); outer.style.background = `linear-gradient(180deg,${val('borderColor1')},${val('borderColor2')},${val('borderColor3')})`; card.style.background = `linear-gradient(180deg,${val('bgColor1')},${val('bgColor2')})`; $('stuNameEl').style.color = val('clrStuName'); $('deptEl').style.color = val('clrDept'); $('valBlood').style.color = val('clrBlood'); $('sigEl').style.color = val('clrSig'); $('dividerEl').style.borderTopColor = val('clrDivider'); $('footerEl').style.color = val('clrFooter'); document.querySelectorAll('.info-line').forEach(e => e.style.color = val('clrInfo')); document.querySelectorAll('.info-label').forEach(e => e.style.color = val('clrLabel')); $('sessionEl').style.color = val('clrInfo'); $('bgRow').style.color = val('clrInfo'); $('photoEl').style.borderColor = val('clrPhotoBorder'); $('logoEl').style.background = val('clrLogoBg'); // Fonts $('uniNameEl').style.fontFamily = val('fontUni'); $('stuNameEl').style.fontFamily = val('fontName'); $('sigEl').style.fontFamily = val('fontSig'); document.querySelectorAll('.info-line,.session-line,.blood-gender,.card-footer').forEach(e => e.style.fontFamily = val('fontBody')); // Sizes const sz = (s,d,t) => { const v=val(s);$(d).textContent=v+'px';$(t).style.fontSize=v+'px'; }; sz('szName','szNameVal','stuNameEl'); sz('szDept','szDeptVal','deptEl'); sz('szSig','szSigVal','sigEl'); const isz = val('szInfo'); $('szInfoVal').textContent = isz+'px'; document.querySelectorAll('.info-line,.session-line,.blood-gender').forEach(e => e.style.fontSize = isz+'px'); $('szFootVal').textContent = val('szFoot')+'px'; $('footerEl').style.fontSize = val('szFoot')+'px'; // Weights $('uniNameEl').style.fontWeight = val('wtUni'); $('stuNameEl').style.fontWeight = val('wtName'); $('uniNameEl').style.fontStyle = chk('chkUniItalic') ? 'italic' : 'normal'; $('stuNameEl').style.textTransform = chk('chkNameUpper') ? 'uppercase' : 'none'; $('deptEl').style.fontWeight = chk('chkDeptBold') ? '700' : '400'; // Layout const ly = (s,d) => { const v=val(s); $(d).textContent = v + (d.includes('Op')?'%':'px'); return +v; }; const cw=ly('lyWidth','lyWidthVal'); card.style.width=cw+'px'; const cp=ly('lyPad','lyPadVal'); card.style.padding=`${cp}px ${cp}px ${cp-10}px`; const cr=ly('lyRad','lyRadVal'); card.style.borderRadius=Math.max(cr-3,0)+'px'; outer.style.borderRadius=cr+'px'; const bw=ly('lyBorder','lyBorderVal'); outer.style.padding=bw+'px'; const ps=ly('lyPhoto','lyPhotoVal'); $('photoEl').style.width=ps+'px'; $('photoEl').style.height=ps+'px'; const pb=ly('lyPhotoBdr','lyPhotoBdrVal'); $('photoEl').style.borderWidth=pb+'px'; const ls=ly('lyLogo','lyLogoVal'); $('logoEl').style.width=ls+'px'; $('logoEl').style.height=ls+'px'; $('logoEl').style.fontSize=Math.round(ls*.45)+'px'; const lg=ly('lyGap','lyGapVal'); document.querySelectorAll('.info-line').forEach(e=>e.style.marginBottom=lg+'px'); const ss=ly('lyShadow','lyShadowVal'), so=ly('lyShadowOp','lyShadowOpVal'); // Texture canvas $('texOpVal').textContent = val('texOp')+'%'; drawTextureOnCanvas($('texCanvas'), card.offsetWidth, card.offsetHeight, 2); // Watermark $('wmEl').style.display = chk('chkWatermark') ? 'block' : 'none'; $('wmEl').textContent = val('watermarkText') || 'UNIVERSITY'; const wm=val('wmSize'); $('wmSizeVal').textContent=wm+'px'; $('wmEl').style.fontSize=wm+'px'; // Gloss $('glossOverlay').style.display = chk('chkGloss') ? 'block' : 'none'; // Shadow+Glow const bs = `0 ${Math.round(ss*.33)}px ${ss}px rgba(0,0,0,${so/100})`; if (chk('chkGlow')) { const gc=val('glowColor'), gi=val('glowInt'); $('glowIntVal').textContent=gi+'px'; outer.style.boxShadow = `${bs},0 0 ${gi}px ${gc}88,0 0 ${gi*2}px ${gc}44`; } else outer.style.boxShadow = bs; } // DOWNLOAD function showStatus(msg,err){['dlStatus','dlStatusBottom'].forEach(id=>{$(id).textContent=msg;$(id).style.color=err?'#e94560':'#43a047';});if(msg)setTimeout(()=>['dlStatus','dlStatusBottom'].forEach(id=>$(id).textContent=''),5000);} function roundedClip(ctx,w,h,r){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(r,0);ctx.lineTo(w-r,0);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(w,0,w,r);ctx.lineTo(w,h-r);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(w,h,w-r,h);ctx.lineTo(r,h);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(0,h,0,h-r);ctx.lineTo(0,r);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(0,0,r,0);ctx.closePath();} async function downloadCard(format){ const btns=document.querySelectorAll('.btn-jpg,.btn-png'); btns.forEach(b=>b.disabled=true); showStatus('⏳ Generating...'); try{ const target=$('cardOuter'); const scale=parseInt(val('dlScale'))||3; const quality=parseInt(val('dlQual'))/100||.95; const fileName=val('dlFileName')||'student-id-card'; const borderRadius=parseInt(val('lyRad'))||20; const bgOpt=val('dlBgOption'); let bgColor=format==='jpg'?(bgOpt==='dark'?'#1a1a2e':bgOpt==='custom'?val('dlCustomBg'):'#ffffff'):null; const rawCanvas=await html2canvas(target,{ scale:scale, useCORS:true, allowTaint:true, backgroundColor:null, logging:false, imageTimeout:15000, onclone:(doc)=>{ const el=doc.getElementById('cardOuter'); if(el) el.style.boxShadow='none'; // Re-draw texture on cloned canvas const clonedCard=doc.getElementById('cardInner'); const clonedCanvas=doc.getElementById('texCanvas'); if(clonedCanvas && clonedCard){ drawTextureOnCanvas(clonedCanvas, clonedCard.offsetWidth, clonedCard.offsetHeight, 2); } } }); const w=rawCanvas.width, h=rawCanvas.height, r=borderRadius*scale; const finalCanvas=document.createElement('canvas'); finalCanvas.width=w; finalCanvas.height=h; const fCtx=finalCanvas.getContext('2d'); if(format==='jpg'&&bgColor){fCtx.fillStyle=bgColor;fCtx.fillRect(0,0,w,h);} fCtx.save();roundedClip(fCtx,w,h,r);fCtx.clip();fCtx.drawImage(rawCanvas,0,0);fCtx.restore(); const link=document.createElement('a'); if(format==='jpg'){link.download=fileName+'.jpg';link.href=finalCanvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg',quality);} else{link.download=fileName+'.png';link.href=finalCanvas.toDataURL('image/png');} document.body.appendChild(link);link.click();document.body.removeChild(link);
